body:
You are a critical player in this fight, friend. Let’s keep pushing. |

_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62648794/404098145/253275352?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWY4MjM0Yy03Y2U4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1AluNgrq3uUwNElgWaGNTimwaTMvN8BVXQTvGNa1W8I=)
Excited to start a new month off with some positive news, team: **Thanks to your support — and contributions from _thousands_ of Democrats across the country — we were able to hit our fundraising goal for April.** It’s never been more important for us to keep this campaign on track. With Republicans’ mounting attacks against our fundamental freedoms, Trump’s impending criminal cases, and the widespread MAGA extremism we’re seeing take over state legislatures across the country, _we cannot grow complacent._ I know we’ve asked a lot of you since Republicans took back the House last year, but every month we hit our fundraising goals, we send a powerful message to GOP extremists like Kevin McCarthy, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and Jim Jordan that the American people are standing with us — _not them._ You are a critical player in this fight, friend. Let’s keep pushing. subject: re: White House Correspondents Dinner

body:
They flaunted their left-wing bias right in the faces of the American people.
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuYHMGGxz4NCtxSXaVs1lq71EZmySWWGDwCRKf31FRHv93tPofRob5pGGZ8vUGwO4kVsZABPfGMCpevv9Q54-Tiaf33-dcyPr6rGn8J0BpOfs_1ePK4UPlsadKpO5FlADYubbUmpodK2gyW5tOSgQVtVYoxRY9RYaCbUG0Q-q6n2TUQscBK85cM6BywI9b7RoeI9C64oPrOIPioWboh3dV1q2MBc4hWxsbynN62tSx6BbPW6LLx4UF-_2xs7s3ec2-IXQ5l8TxZQPW3SLpZXiNccpBErJewZdxLG0DjVa5UAJW_Y9E92WwiV4R1tgwhy-cofrtC3omTBIF3swtGG2dI1MmMOp_JdMMfmYmDBa15KBvMSRHBPmPHx05-X9E-4v-PqIMHdQFf75ND-zpXXzg8aRVqlYxa_7gt3tbwAAAP__CcmNUg)
---
Friend,
This past weekend, the Fake News gathered in Washington, D.C. for the White House Correspondents Dinner to pat each other on the backs and cheer on Crooked Joe’s re-election campaign.
But worst of all, they FLAUNTED their biased “reporting” right in the American people’s faces...
With a smile on his face, Crooked Joe admitted that the media has completely let him get away with answering zero questions for the past two years.
**Most telling of all, the main host of the evening openly acknowledged the Fake News’ double standard surrounding the raid of Mar-a-Lago.**
**While the Fake News was screaming about President Trump _securely_ keeping documents at Mar-a-Lago he himself _DECLASSIFIED_ , they turned a blind eye to all of the many, many boxes of documents Crooked Joe had stashed next to his Corvette.**
Sadly, the documents hoax is _not just a joke_ for reporters in Washington to laugh at.
It’s yet another instance of election interference by the Deep State to take down President Trump and threaten his freedom.
**While the Swamp laughs about their own hypocrisy and bias, President Trump is being unjustly persecuted by a power-drunk establishment that wants to stop him from returning to the White House.**
But so far, their tactics have absolutely backfired. The more they attack our movement, the stronger our America First campaign becomes.
With your support, we will overcome ANY obstacle that is thrown our way and we will Make America Great Again!
[**So please, make a contribution to help President Trump SURGE even higher in the polls.**](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kcGq2zwQhZ9mvLORR7IsL7z47y-yCW1podzQTZBHSjLBko0t33D79MUh7fY7h-F8jIvzyJfPHto3QLyxXwER5H-AeFRvp6_6-H605fzl-4_S6kY99hT_B8T8OYd_1deVKkTH405bW_geySBREfpaG-xM02JX3HpSjfStQapJDSiMUa5BPwRnOq_90BXco0ApGoFCCBS6oiA6IzsxkDRGiQso8eBU-Sm50d_zssW5oikWY3_LeV6fkw6AhzXQtoTqwWkJfm_szH2E0sWwMLnyPnHK5WVLfnG8crqWNMXIOYcAeEg01s6TIdd6bKWrhwHkYcvxHIPnLYK0L1-9w3XaFgogLfHZvRi5ODu-JpD25VT_TaaUQ8ogrTGNBtTnNLIHae8r_mzMSb6fnvD5EWk_sFX0-5f9Viy9nx88jrzqFpS47gt2tz8BAAD__23AjVQ)
Thank you,
Team Trump

Trump Save America JFC, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding President Trump, and we’re glad you’re on our team.

Thank you for joining Team Trump. It’s because of grassroots supporters like YOU that we’ve been able to consistently call out the Fake News media EVERY SINGLE TIME they try to spread misinformation or outright LIES about the important work President Trump is doing to SAVE AMERICA. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. subject: FWD: Make sure to Register ASAP!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Hurry and register for the Republican Action Conferenece on May 5th and 6th in Kennewick! | | | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=400ac418d6&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Dear Peter,

If you're planning to attend the 2023 Republican Action Conference, please [register by the end of the day today](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=87c4c23c9d&e=6a281f566d)! Our final counts for meals are due soon, and we need to provide the hotel with an accurate headcount.

[Don't miss out on this incredible event with fantastic speakers and informative panels. Register today to secure your spot and join fellow Republicans in making a difference!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=ba1d4439b1&e=6a281f566d)

Looking forward to seeing you there!

Best regards,

Amanda St. George
Director of Administrative Services
Washington State Republican Party
---
| |
---
| **BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com**

Hey Peter,
Time is running out! There's just one week left to [secure your tickets](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=e7aa4441ca&e=6a281f566d) for the [2023 Republican Action Conference](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=aa95a68afe&e=6a281f566d). Join us as we bring together Republican leaders, activists, and supporters from across Washington State to discuss critical issues, strategies, and the future of our party.

We have an incredible [lineup of speakers](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=da2d56284c&e=6a281f566d), including Raul Garcia, former Gubernatorial candidate who will be speaking at our Friday Night Welcome Reception, our lunch speakers: Semi Bird, 2024 Gubernatorial candidate, Joe Kent, CD-3 Congressional Candidate, and Kellyanna Brooking, Genz Media Pundit and host of "A Few Words," along with our banquet speakers: Jim Walsh, LD 19 State Representative and a keynote address from Liz Harrington, President Trump's 2024 Spokesperson.

In addition to our fantastic speakers, we're offering a variety of informative and [engaging panels](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=7accaa030f&e=6a281f566d) to help you make a difference in your community:
* Campaigning 101: Building a Winning Campaign
* Grassroots Activism: Organizing for Victory
* Citizen Lobbying: Influencing Olympia
* Ballot Harvesting: Collecting Republican Votes
* Campaign Fundraising 101
* Delivering Your Message

Don't miss this opportunity to connect with like-minded Republicans, learn from experienced political leaders, and become a driving force for change in our state. [Register now to secure your spot at the 2023 Republican Action Conference!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=0049911896&e=6a281f566d)

Remember, there's only one week left to register. [Click here to reserve your seat today](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4ed2ae59f6&e=6a281f566d)!
---
| [Register for the Republican Action Conference today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b89aae9dac&e=6a281f566d "Register for the Republican Action Conference today!")
---
| We look forward to seeing you at the conference!

-Team WAGOP
---
| [More Information on our 2023 Republican Action Conference](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=991f4f1eb3&e=6a281f566d "More Information on our 2023 Republican Action Conference")

---

name: Team Durbin
subject: Just In: Senate confirms Biden’s 120th federal judge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Democrats need your support to keep up this momentum.
#
Big news this evening, Peter:
**Thanks to Senator Durbin’s work as Chair of the Judiciary Committee, the Senate just confirmed President Biden’s 120th federal judge.**
With help from supporters like you, Democrats strengthened our Senate majority in the last election — meaning we can continue to put well-qualified, diverse judges in our federal courts to uphold the rule of law.
**[President Biden, Senator Durbin, and the Democratic Senate majority are working hard to make progress each and every day — but MAGA Republicans are fighting for a total takeover in the next election so they can undo everything we’ve accomplished. name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: The data is clear: Americans want action to stop gun violence. But the NRA-backed GOP has a long history of stalling progress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
Quite frankly, I’m fed up.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62656361/404132406/857475129?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTU4MjQ5NS04OWU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QBbOmkMKSeONbVTgJEDNEap7CG_vCfjxu7-fmJXcf-Q=)
---
Friends, check out a new Fox News poll on gun violence reduction: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62656362/404132414/-97450415?refcode=JMFC_20230501_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTU4MjQ5NS04OWU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QBbOmkMKSeONbVTgJEDNEap7CG_vCfjxu7-fmJXcf-Q=&emci=479a996c-4fe8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ba582495-89e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6576167) The data is clear: Americans want meaningful legislation to stop gun violence. They want action, and they want it now.

**The NRA has spent decades padding the bank accounts of Republicans to buy their silence and stall lifesaving, common-sense legislation.**

Quite frankly, I'm fed up. This Fox News poll tells us one glaring fact — Republicans who are stonewalling gun violence reduction legislation are out of excuses.

Listen, I went to Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School. I walked in those hallways and learned in those classrooms. I saw what that tragic shooting did to my community. I saw the pain and suffering those parents went through and continue to deal with.

Do you think the parents of gun violence victims care about House GOP hearings on DC public urination, drag queens, or banning books?

Here's the glaring and unsettling truth that I told Marjorie Taylor Greene in a committee hearing about banning books:

**Republicans are worried about banning books but let me remind you, Dead kids can't read.**

It's time to use the power the American people gave us to confront gun violence with real solutions, such as raising the age to buy guns from 18 to 21, banning assault weapons, and putting red flag laws in place. We put these measures in place in Florida and it's working!

_Why?_ Because it was common sense. Because we knew as a state that we had to do better. Because gun violence IS preventable.

That's why I ran for Congress — to advocate for (and accomplish) meaningful reform to ensure the tragedies we've seen in Parkland and beyond never happen again.

[**The data is clear, but we need Democrats to take action. I need you to sign my petition to stand with me in support of legislation that will end gun violence in our communities. If we stand together, they can't ignore us. Sign on now:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62656363/404132421/-97450415?refcode=JMFC_20230501_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTU4MjQ5NS04OWU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QBbOmkMKSeONbVTgJEDNEap7CG_vCfjxu7-fmJXcf-Q=&emci=479a996c-4fe8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ba582495-89e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6576167) | [CLICK TO ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62656364/404132427/-97450415?refcode=JMFC_20230501_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTU4MjQ5NS04OWU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QBbOmkMKSeONbVTgJEDNEap7CG_vCfjxu7-fmJXcf-Q=&emci=479a996c-4fe8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ba582495-89e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6576167)

Thanks,

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62656365/404132428/-97450415?refcode=JMFC_20230501_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTU4MjQ5NS04OWU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QBbOmkMKSeONbVTgJEDNEap7CG_vCfjxu7-fmJXcf-Q=&emci=479a996c-4fe8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ba582495-89e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6576167)

clean_body: Quite frankly, I’m fed up. | = Friends, check out a new Fox News poll on gun violence reduction: The data is clear: Americans want meaningful legislation to stop gun violence. They want action, and they want it now. The NRA has spent decades padding the bank accounts of Republicans to buy their silence and stall lifesaving, common-sense legislation. Quite frankly, I'm fed up. This Fox News poll tells us one glaring fact — Republicans who are stonewalling gun violence reduction legislation are out of excuses. Listen, I went to Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School. I walked in those hallways and learned in those classrooms. I saw what that tragic shooting did to my community. I saw the pain and suffering those parents went through and continue to deal with. Do you think the parents of gun violence victims care about House GOP hearings on DC public urination, drag queens, or banning books? Here's the glaring and unsettling truth that I told Marjorie Taylor Greene in a committee hearing about banning books: Republicans are worried about banning books but let me remind you, Dead kids can't read. It's time to use the power the American people gave us to confront gun violence with real solutions, such as raising the age to buy guns from 18 to 21, banning assault weapons, and putting red flag laws in place. We put these measures in place in Florida and it's working! Why? Because it was common sense. Because we knew as a state that we had to do better. Because gun violence IS preventable. That's why I ran for Congress — to advocate for (and accomplish) meaningful reform to ensure the tragedies we've seen in Parkland and beyond never happen again. | Thanks, Jared Moskowitz Congressman, FL-23 | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. Box 8784, Coral Springs, FL 33065 www.jaredforflorida.com/ Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact, make a=. to receive fewer emails. to update your information. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Colorado Stealing Our Kids’ Hearts, Minds & Bodies
body:
Episode #6 of Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl is LIVE!
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-r/) Hi Peter, We are on the precipice of the government taking complete control of our kid's hearts, minds, and futures. And if they succeed, it will leave scars that they may never heal from. Today's guest on Unleashed is proof of that. Just two weeks ago, Jared Polis signed a [**' Trans Tourism' Law**](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-y/) to ensure people in other states can come to Colorado for an abortion at any age, can begin puberty blockers, or receive sex change operations and mastectomies without fear of prosecution. In other words, children that are 12+ years old may travel to Colorado for radical sterilizing procedures under Polis's protection. They WILL NOT notify parents. [It's a first-of-its-kind in America](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-j/) - one that Jared Polis is PROUD to taunt in Colorado. Oli London, activist and author of the new book [Gender Madness](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-t/), shares his devastating journey with gender dysphoria and woke ideology. He's now using his story to advocate for millions of young people who question their own identity.
### **Episode #6 - STEALING OUR KIDS' HEARTS, MINDS & BODIES: GENDER MADNESS IN COLORADO**
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-i/) [WATCH ON YOUTUBE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-d/) [WATCH ON RUMBLE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-h/) [LISTEN HERE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-k/) _Not into podcasts? I post transcripts of my monologues and full episode breakdowns every week on my Substack.[You can subscribe here!](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-b/)_
## **ICYMI: A weekly recap of some lies exposed and truths UNLEASHED...**
### **1\. Joe Biden announces his run for a second term. Here are my thoughts...**
It seems Democrats like Biden and Polis wholeheartedly believe that our children are their possession and the responsibility of the government, not the parents.[This week's episode](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-n/) of Unleashed has some BIG truths. We're going to dig into EXACTLY what Biden is talking about in THIS video. It might be my most controversial topic yet. [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-p/)
### **2\. It's not an accident that the number of transgender youths doubled in the last 5 years, and children 's mastectomies are up 389 percent... It's a radical agenda being pushed on our kids.**
I don't care what you do as an adult -- be who you want to be, go to as many drag shows as you want, change your body however you want to. But LEAVE OUR KIDS ALONE.[In this clip](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-x/), Oli London talks about the VERY serious implications of the new "Trans Tourism" laws passed in Colorado by our Governor and we need to talk about it. I'm so grateful activists like Oli London and Caitlyn Jenner are coming out against this woke ideology and radical experimentation being pushed on our kids. [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-m/)
### **3\. Elon Musk and Tucker Carlson are speaking out against the corrupt media, advocating for more citizen-led journalism. **
[Elon Musk](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-c/) understands that people just want to know the TRUTH. The corporate press can't stand when people tell the truth, so they cancel them, or mock them. In the Governor's race, I felt like I was fighting the media more often than I was Jared Polis. He spent tens of millions in ads with them, so of course, they drove the narrative he directed.My goal with Unleashed is to expose the lies of the Colorado media -- let's create our OWN media platforms that are not beholden to political power players. Hopefully, [Tucker Carlson](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-q/) does the same soon! He understands we are in a war between good & evil -- and dares to say so. [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-a/) If you've been liking the podcast so far, [here are the ways you can help us grow](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-f/)!Have a great week,Heidi [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-z/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-v/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-e/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-s/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-g/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-w/) | Heidi GanahlLone Tree, CO [Preferences](https://heidi4gov.updatemyprofile.com/i-quhkhiy-E8C3E4FD-ttjjilthht-yd) | [Unsubscribe](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-u-quhkhiy-ttjjilthht-yh/)
---

body:
Practical suggestions for how to support RFK's Presidential campaign

| [ ](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kennedy_curious&n=1)
---
Peter -- This message is for people who would like to support our movement, as well as those who are, for now, still learning about Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. If you're just curious, we thank you for still having hope for American politics. Stay tuned so you can better understand our candidate and his positions. For those who would like to support us in practical ways, here are some suggestions. 1\. Share our [website](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kennedy_curious&n=2) and its beautiful launch video with friends and family, and encourage them to subscribe to this newsletter. 2\. Follow RFK Jr. on Twitter and Facebook. 3\. [Donate](https://www.kennedy24.com/support?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kennedy_curious&n=3) to the campaign. Money is the lifeblood of a campaign and, needless to say, we depend on grassroots contributions from small donors. We are so grateful to those who have shared and donated already. Your generosity affirms our feeling that there is still hope for America to return its government to the people. With thanks, Team Kennedy
[](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kennedy_curious&n=4)[http://www.kennedy24.com/](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kennedy_curious&n=5)

name: Priority Gold
subject: Leaked Video: Is Your Bank Safe? Protect Yourself Now
body:
Back in November financial regulators were caught on tape plotting to hide alarming market signals

| | |
# **Leaked Gov’t Video: Is Your Money at Risk? Act Now!**
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Back in November financial regulators were caught on tape plotting to hide alarming market signals from depositors to prevent a bank-run panic. **[> > Click here to watch and see them plotting with your own eyes <<](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665446%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JgPUX%2bdPCMu6RcMTDk4GMA&sysid=1)** This is a worrying situation that should concern anyone with money in the bank.

Did you know that the **FDIC insures $9 trillion of bank deposits with only $125 billion worth of assets?**

This means they cannot insure everybody in a crisis when many people want to withdraw their money all at once.

But there's something you can do to protect yourself.

We've created a **[free bank-bail in guide](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665447%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QW04B%2fRHyIPMnGEugRtEhA&sysid=1)** that can help you safeguard your retirement savings and hard-earned money, tax and penalty-free.

**[Download our guide now to learn how you can protect your money.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665448%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fykBkhDlibQW3Mn%2fgiiymQ&sysid=1)**

Don't wait until it's too late to take action. Protect your retirement savings now.

To Protecting Your Future, **Priority Gold**
---

Your America News

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I am ready to defeat Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It's a myth that Joe Biden is actually running for president. He's not.

| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zorhqbb71hrnj0l2r7r14emp93v6ce4g0vl19e5g_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h68or2cdh2bs)
Fellow American,

Joe Biden officially announced that he's running for president.

He's not *really* running - it's just the managerial class using Joe Biden as a front to advance its own agenda. **To them Biden's cognitive impairment isn't a bug._It's a feature._ **

The administrative state more effectively controls its puppets when they are hollowed-out husks of themselves. The fact that it's elder abuse is just a cost of doing business for Biden's handlers. It's revealing that the DNC refuses to host primary debates this year; they're spitting in the face of their grassroots base.

Fellow American, that's why it's so important to me that, on the Republican side, we have a robust primary - one where we can actually debate the *real* issues Americans face every day.

But to have a primetime spot on the debate stage in August, I need your help. We need to build our team of unique donors to this campaign. **[That's why I am asking for just $1 today.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlg7g6oi1mpuuvfqh0l9avj5uluocek8e3a7kp10_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h68or2cdh2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3aikuomja6uoht4s07ccon828ppvmmfed589nto_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h68or2cdh2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgd00nfr0hp5ctglint45j499v128nr4k8aiu3n0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h68or2cdh2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf4fr1h76f6i5t4h36hrp3klnbmkdi059es2jhr0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h68or2cdh2bs) | | [Chip in $24 ➔](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9f46mf8etchvbrnj9nlhvlqhecmtfmhakrlj8cg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h68or2cdh2bs)

We won't anoint a chosen candidate from day one like the Left. This is how the managerial class crushes everyday citizens - not with a bang, but with a whimper.

I am looking to you, Fellow American. **[Before the end of the day, will you chip in $1 or more to not only help offset the millions Joe Biden and Dems are raising today, but also to help us get one step closer to securing a spot on the stage for the first Presidential Debate?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlmicr9ibt4q8cb1jgr0p7jv5sbupk6sbbaiulig_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h68or2cdh2bs)**

The left hides from debate. We embrace it. Put me at the center of that debate stage.

Thanks,

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd9llgsb63mq6r4riuoh1m0315d2ponbupnqb70g_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h68or2cdh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** DONATE TODAY -> **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl3epvf3f0jrerqimtug278it0n7mvkr8ab2i168_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h68or2cdh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zagj4thphar7hopqalp2tfvdge8h7r0ic8u5q1f0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h68or2cdh2bs)

But to have a primetime spot on the debate stage in August, I need your help. We need to build our team of unique donors to this campaign. | | | ---|---|--- | | We won't anoint a chosen candidate from day one like the Left. This is how the managerial class crushes everyday citizens - not with a bang, but with a whimper. I am looking to you, Fellow American. The left hides from debate. We embrace it. Put me at the center of that debate stage. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I am ready to defeat Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It's a myth that Joe Biden is actually running for president. He's not.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh576gmankso0jn8pb81ggvnmfse64t68270mlio_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h6aoj6c1h2bs)
Fellow American,

Joe Biden officially announced that he's running for president.

He's not *really* running - it's just the managerial class using Joe Biden as a front to advance its own agenda. **To them Biden's cognitive impairment isn't a bug._It's a feature._ **

The administrative state more effectively controls its puppets when they are hollowed-out husks of themselves. The fact that it's elder abuse is just a cost of doing business for Biden's handlers. It's revealing that the DNC refuses to host primary debates this year; they're spitting in the face of their grassroots base.

Fellow American, that's why it's so important to me that, on the Republican side, we have a robust primary - one where we can actually debate the *real* issues Americans face every day.

But to have a primetime spot on the debate stage in August, I need your help. We need to build our team of unique donors to this campaign. **[That's why I am asking for just $1 today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zan09a1lvo2tdhai1bju31vgpi2dbqm45jbg34mg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h6aoj6c1h2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrp59gna6dc3g5vhf9uvrekr0vua8g61s7uguoig_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h6aoj6c1h2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjvnk3r4q23jugb25ac2b22se5i7vftq6dic6150_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h6aoj6c1h2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg6ahboke2s391it0l8svv81ddaq22jfou23apqg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h6aoj6c1h2bs) | | [Chip in $24 ➔](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znq8mas9kda4113v8kui9ncos02737400cvqaif0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h6aoj6c1h2bs)

We won't anoint a chosen candidate from day one like the Left. This is how the managerial class crushes everyday citizens - not with a bang, but with a whimper.

I am looking to you, Fellow American. **[Before the end of the day, will you chip in $1 or more to not only help offset the millions Joe Biden and Dems are raising today, but also to help us get one step closer to securing a spot on the stage for the first Presidential Debate?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbpeqthfk4nkdjlhl2p1f33pufafehafrvjdbm48_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h6aoj6c1h2bs)**

The left hides from debate. We embrace it. Put me at the center of that debate stage.

Thanks,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjovk2nbu0pcstk5gp7vb5duhegaptbfoe0mpsn8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h6aoj6c1h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjl1peu431ikq79auhc6oif34m1ickpvvf1j065o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h6aoj6c1h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zptas95t3q0rf21gn0dq8smc2jfrk83jgof1dof8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h6aoj6c1h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2r2qaug49ectsg0q3k7ejroldqvmlib5lqsf030_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h6aoj6c1h2bs)| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu792tmm888qqt868gi67fphocu5lc0sdrabsn0g_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h6aoj6c1h2bs)| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8v855p0rgmdag6b5e3vdpv2kfuih29nc8sag4h8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1h6aoj6c1h2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Answers to life’s persistent questions
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWVRFeWDAN

Our "Introduction to Western Philosophy" course is now available
on DVD.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWVRFeWDAN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

Our "Introduction to Western Philosophy"
course is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy
today.

Aristotle wrote: "All men by nature desire to
know."

The pursuit of knowledge about the most
important things has been the central activity of Hillsdale
College for over 179 years.

In contrast, most American colleges and
universities have embraced the "postmodern" idea that knowledge,
like truth, is relative-that there are no real answers to
questions like "What is the best kind of life?" and "What is the
right way to act?"

In 1931, Winston Churchill wrote an essay
where he imagined a future where mankind had secured a life of
great pleasure, wealth, and convenience. But, Churchill wondered,
would that be sufficient for happiness?

What did they know more than we know about
the answers to the simple questions which man has asked since the
earliest dawn of reason-'Why are we here? What is the purpose of
life? Whither are we going?'

No material progress, even though it takes
shapes we cannot now conceive, or however it may expand the
faculties of man, can bring comfort to his soul.

Hillsdale's free online course, "Introduction
to Western Philosophy," examines just such questions as Churchill
poses.

This course pursues answers to these
questions by studying the arguments of great Western philosophers
such as Plato, Aristotle, Thomas Aquinas, Immanuel Kant, and C.S.
Lewis.

And this 14-lecture course is now available
in a special DVD box set perfect for viewing in your home or a
small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool
curriculum or personal study.

The "Introduction to Western Philosophy" DVD
box-set can be yours with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more
to Hillsdale College. Reserve your copy today using this secure
link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61760524:WVRFeWDAN:m:3:2532013465:0DC65B0BD35725049F378B411606102E:r

Hillsdale produces and promotes free online
courses, as we do all of our work while refusing to accept
government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or
state student grants or loans.

With your tax-deductible gift today, we can
enroll thousands of Americans in "Introduction to Western
Philosophy" and other online courses on topics such as the
Constitution and American history.

Please help promote Hillsdale's free online
courses such as "Introduction to Western Philosophy" and other
educational outreach efforts in this critical time for America
with a tax-deductible gift.

And remember, when you give a gift of $100 or
more today, we'll send you a special DVD box set of "Introduction
to Western Philosophy" as our thank-you. Quantities are limited,
though, and you won't find this DVD anywhere else but from
Hillsdale.

You can make your tax-deductible gift in
support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts and receive
your DVD box set using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61760524:WVRFeWDAN:m:3:2532013465:0DC65B0BD35725049F378B411606102E:r

Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in
its educational mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since
1844

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWVRFeWDAN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Democrats won a majority in the PA House of Representatives last year, part of a blue tsunami that crashed through The Keystone State in the midterms! But in two weeks there are 2 special elections for open seats. With only a one-seat margin, if GOPers win both, they take control of the PA House of Representatives.
body:
2 weeks to the special election!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfe5c4b85-96e7-4db3-8718-57965a5c00fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**Equality for all, women controlling their bodies, voting rights, gun safety and more could be imperiled in two weeks in Pennsylvania.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T86700da7-e4d1-49d1-9c02-883c191bd8ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Democrats won a majority in the PA House of Representatives this past election, part of a blue tsunami that crashed through The Keystone State in the midterms!_**_It gave us this incredible image of the first woman to become Speaker in PA's 200+ year history._** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta63ab81b-ff76-4085-a465-937ec8636b42/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_But in mere two weeks there are 2 special elections for open seats. With only a one-seat margin, if GOPers win both, they take control of the PA House of Representatives.__ It would be a disaster, removing our Speaker, shutting down all progressive Governor Josh Shapiro wants to do and harming the 13 million Americans living there. And the_** _ _**_tens of millions who live in surrounding states impacted by how PA regulates guns, pollution of air and water and more. What happens in PA doesn't stay there--air & bullets don't see state lines._** _This is why we must support Heather Boyd, whose campaign centerpiece is "protecting women's bodily autonomy" and Trevor S. Finn, who promises to put the lives of children ahead of allowing criminals to conceal carry guns._ **_We can't let Republicans win back the chamber._** [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Democrats Heather Boyd & Trevor S. Finn to protect 13 million Pennsylvanians and tens of millions of additional Americans from being forced into a hell of MAGA Republicanism?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3adc9d94-a54d-47e9-b75b-c6686e042a0f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for always fighting the fights that matter!** Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1a0b949-0d77-4004-b79c-a57981e0b8bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/paspecialelectionsremind3-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td4763ec0-fc9f-4266-ad29-e335a8bdc7d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Alan Keck
subject: For the fifth and final time…
body:
...I’m taking the debate stage.
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjljhuk-dytiuyidkd-r/) _I only have a minute, because at the top of the hour -**8pm EST -I'm joining KET's Kentucky Tonight for my FIFTH and FINAL debate of the primary election.** [**_Are you planning to watch?_**](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjljhuk-dytiuyidkd-j/)_ Because this is our FINAL opportunity to make the case for the Keck Game Plan before Kentuckians cast their ballot on May 16th. [📺 JOIN THE KET REPUBLICAN DEBATE LIVESTREAM](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjljhuk-dytiuyidkd-t/) _**If you 've kept up with these debates, and tuned in to each one, I can't thank you enough.**_ Kentucky doesn't deserve a continuation of the status quo, but fresh leadership with a record of private and public sector successes that career politicians in the Commonwealth just can't match. _At the offset of the first four debates,**I 'm confident that with your support, we've proven ourselves to be that candidate, ready to put Kentucky back on the map, solve our workforce crisis, get our kids learning again, and so much more.**_So, if you're free in a few minutes-[__**join me for my FIFTH and FINAL primary debate**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjljhuk-dytiuyidkd-i/)-and I'll catch you on the other side! [📺 JOIN THE KET REPUBLICAN DEBATE LIVESTREAM](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjljhuk-dytiuyidkd-d/) God Bless. [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjljhuk-dytiuyidkd-h/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjljhuk-dytiuyidkd-k/) Alan Keck ### | [Unsubscribe](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-u-pjljhuk-dytiuyidkd-u/)
---

name: Alec
subject: Your interview
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is Alec with the House GOP Leadership program.

| |
---
| | | This is Alec with the House GOP Leadership program.

I'm reaching out because you were selected for an exclusive interview for House GOP Leadership.

We're asking the top 5% of patriots on our list for their input in helping us plan out our majority strategy.

This is a one question poll and I promise it won't take more than 30 seconds of your time. Please tell us what your NUMBER 1 issue that we should focus on is!

---

**WHAT IS YOUR NUMBER 1 ISSUE?**
* Border Security
* Economy & Inflation
* Election Integrity
* Protecting Life
* Lowering Crime

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|*

# **Leaked Gov 't Video: Is Your Money at Risk? Act Now!**
---
|

| Dear Fellow American,

Back in November financial regulators were caught on tape plotting to hide alarming market signals from depositors to prevent a bank-run panic. **[> > Click here to watch and see them plotting with your own eyes <<](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f32dd3fe07844b7081d7d7772c6df020&_e=9tQpfFQZMQzttcN4CB9WlY-zKCuHbMaoA9K24Lt6RZwIxZOuVckD4XZHg3iP-lXdgqxo1IaP3dtJvZW-ZApxS1HwfnJFhJNVS5lbn-95M5Ephg2RVhM36jH5XqfGu8wuDZy6E3UMoVfUiQWiqQpKGInKfnRSFXoJEQKCOQWNlQ6pZL8kqIj7Hi9jRRfmL3JI0IyFMlx-iEBso9JeGzLvKBivwj6R7RXiO3gQi_tuU40z8FSAyantg5o_-s0OkYeYMXHF_UsHB0HqCwbfM1uYqA%3D%3D)** This is a worrying situation that should concern anyone with money in the bank.

Did you know that the **FDIC insures $9 trillion of bank deposits with only $125 billion worth of assets?**

This means they cannot insure everybody in a crisis when many people want to withdraw their money all at once.

But there's something you can do to protect yourself.

We've created a **[free bank-bail in guide](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f32dd3fe07844b7081d7d7772c6df020&_e=9tQpfFQZMQzttcN4CB9WlY-zKCuHbMaoA9K24Lt6RZwIxZOuVckD4XZHg3iP-lXdgqxo1IaP3dtJvZW-ZApxS1HwfnJFhJNVS5lbn-95M5FaLp-04lCWfXhhxnpBOvKmfWzUbIk9WsuSKocoN7wPm1ddCoDuwUED0vycrOBDpX8GXpixEi296Ptw_gPg9dGkF8iKBtp5YK70xZOLJxdcd_K_AcMhGeqLFHwqL8XMY1SSFRjOIppBSsOCwGLC4VhOm0fkZ27q_nQDrf5-KGsG9g%3D%3D)** that can help you safeguard your retirement savings and hard-earned money, tax and penalty-free.

**[Download our guide now to learn how you can protect your money.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f32dd3fe07844b7081d7d7772c6df020&_e=9tQpfFQZMQzttcN4CB9WlY-zKCuHbMaoA9K24Lt6RZwIxZOuVckD4XZHg3iP-lXdgqxo1IaP3dtJvZW-ZApxS1HwfnJFhJNVS5lbn-95M5EmYF0VtjVZOJIWqi45miKH_EGsrpyNBSkhkYqhFRfXXueq18qcRPe7hYPbXNq5I68pdvuyys-xVgvsY9WukB79a-Ij7Md-NhCm2bKPlhqpGfnm4XZeouPotIRIC0wyDzjZcfw49ZuGgUuU_UmymDqgp-m_k99UHBPKaN9f084JSw%3D%3D)**

Don't wait until it's too late to take action. Protect your retirement savings now.

To Protecting Your Future, **Priority Gold**

Good morning! Today we’re covering the Texas manhunt for a suspect deported from the US four times, the potential Hollywood writers’ strike, and how aggressive Republicans should be in attacking President Biden’s age.

# Tuesday, May 2, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today we’re covering the Texas manhunt for a suspect deported from the US four times, the potential Hollywood writers’ strike, and how aggressive Republicans should be in attacking President Biden’s age. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? [Sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQgOGngS3WcYeBDAxdsqVrR4vAEV-FQ-SgVH37Sp09___yfV2Xa5Imj_tn2jiO2peUh7x5gfkEeEJaUJdYmZFJczQuEKC36PUaKblanaeQkQDBEAZjqkveBnsOnrVEBCSYAQ2AMfOEEG4ccjlnuIVCRVngIqPv03eXx1i5tt_-5n3KfdMtrmM8X4o-FF4UXg6WPZbnj7QmL-eVhfuWpP2HcUz5CwAA__9kgUm7) and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? [ Drop us a line](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover) and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to stay informed throughout the day? [Follow us on Instagram](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GtljHgQMZGLp4S9eOFoHDvgqbyEZB_fuqXbp0f-9J7-M-3wMX3pf3sJFvuc4hNn7RDOMF8IJ6Rpl8JkLSkry6Og1oDVq5-kgEQEFDjiMYk28WNCmVrHokcCFL9gioYQRUAEqNA4J7kIvpFuHhkk7CACVu9Rg-K-9tpVy-6ouOIdZNFr-29jyFfhM4CZx67wPvZwvLEbYfQuD0p-zUT4GTPHx6di6Fz6sVBpYtcPnNtf_vvgMAAP__B3BRjw) and stay in touch.

## Texas Murder Suspect Has Been Deported Multiple Times
US Immigration officials say Francisco Oropesa, the man accused of shooting five of his neighbors in Cleveland, Texas, including a 9-year-old boy, has [been deported four times](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOhCAURb8GO83zISoFxTZ0s-2WhoGHsEGYKDvO_P3Grbe5zU1OTs7XbbmZmGJeP81GqvqyGFvjkxYQLWCLfMHGKU-ExBtS_ThzwGnAqQlK2FlKz0fr_USjF6OEAaTh0pGUKFwTFQJyEIA9QN-LDmG-02ydtHCfHXdsAHKxlr37LjHXQD69y5P2zpatSSrU-jgY_2CoGerzPDub8_Ux1BeZoQZxTc9Q_xwMtU30pGSyayu9zNFmimu4l709Qik15rXdSnbmzVDH7OjVhbqlZlfuccaU4jFObIB1MzH9KdT_i_wGAAD__y85YV4) in the past but keeps re-entering the country illegally. So far, despite a widening manhunt over three days involving more than 200 officers, officials say, they have "zero leads" and are [offering an $80,000 reward](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFu7CAQAL8Gd1jLYmyuoHiNu3ttSouD5UxkgwX4nPx9dKnTjTTNaD7uy93GLabnf7uTaSEv1rX4ogUUB-QoF-y8CURIsiMjRi0BpwGnbjWDmianxOCsItAjKIF6lOImcfTB61sXDQJKUIACQAjVI-gHaedvDh7aS88GIB9bLv1njqmtFLbv_KLSu7x3m1lbOyqT_xjODOfrunr3qImu-vYM5zcynBt92crrmnOL6cnrWQ9yjYdik4vVZZ5LPqhavtu0nqnxcqbKY2qZe7KeU_K80GWL5zkEKuQZzl0x_rjitsU6TmyA527j9tvV_t70EwAA__-7RWu8). The FBI released [new photos of Oropesa](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGTsyAQQH-NdjjLokIKiq-xy9de6SAsujdEMkJi8u9vcvXVr3nvfV3nq-PE-_rf3cjWmGfnKz9phkEAClQztsFGIiTVkpWjUYC6R91ulmSA8SIHqXtjtFEBvPdGg3ZaBhXHli0CKhgAJYCUQ4dgFjI-XDwsJqjQ9ECBaz6678x73Simd37S0fl8a5Pdar2XRv1rcGpwOs-zi_m101k-vMHpURqc4sLioESuUBE7neK-5ZqLiI-VPyXCef8oFER01aX0FmXLufK-ikHsxOu25KOISi9X2sOG-8kpcRl108N6c5x-Xerfa34CAAD__-vgZ8E), showing a prominent tattoo of a woman wearing a headdress on his arm. Police have warned the public that Oropesa is considered dangerous and not to approach him if they see him.
## Military Tracking Another Mystery Balloon
The U.S. military is [tracking a mysterious new balloon](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFugzAQQL8GNqPjDIYMHrqwpWtHdNhHuNbYkXGC8vdVOnd70hue9L6u85UkSLx90s62rGkmV-TJM_QKUKGesfZ2ZUbWNdvWjBpw6HCoN9vBAGwuqzG-J-OcX4GcXxxdzNKSo1osAmroAVuAtu0bhHHh0fmLg2X02lcdsJeScvOdJJaN1_BKT86NS3sd7FbK_aj0R4VThdN5nk1cXOTzePsKpzdWOD0OtUuQQvmlSib3I_GmKKaycVb76yicJT0OtVAIKUWVXaQRNUCdrb-fEoIcZqg6uO0k4a9d_l_xGwAA___PzmLL) crossing the ocean from Hawaii towards Mexico. The government says the balloon poses no danger or security risk, but they have no idea who it belongs to or what it is. Officials say the balloon is transmitting no signals and could be a weather balloon off-course. It will be subject to [being shot down](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1urDAQQOGngQ5kxthmCxe3odvbpkTGHpZJ_LMys4t4-yipU5_iSN_Hfbk7ipQf_11Cy1tZnGd64yJUJ6ADuUAb7IYIKFu0g56kADOCaXc7qqD0zW2wyXFyN2-UMtobta1mCG7VLVkQIIUSMAgxDKoHMa04-XDzYp2CDM0oMBCX2n8WyrzjFq_yxtr7ktpod-bn0ch_DcwNzOd59pfbS_mpDcyYGSs7ygkzNzC_ukSR2NWr4-r8F-VH53LhHWuXroOxUnkdHYhBKz0q3e-cYltteJ4UIx3aNKN4JEfxd89_a3wHAAD__wGaYko) if it comes near land. Meanwhile, newly revealed satellite photos [(picture)](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DvO3CAQAODT4A5rGPzgL1xEkdxtmhQpLQzDehL8EMyutbdPkzI3-PT9eiwPz5mP5w-_0yTpXHwQftMCvQbUaBds4pSIkGxDkxmcBRw7HJttGlfj3BBConUdhxSh_zKmH0aXQkopuYYnBLTQAxoAY_oWwa3kQvwKsLpoo-qAIstZ2t8nH7JRyp_zTaUN597kaRO5qrLfFM4K5_u-2-g5f3bPuQ1n-_qjcD7orgpnX4RDJm0QbGfQKpx_eqGcWUhfHORVqGoDkETn83jq7xsfVEnvnFl8-eg1837pSqGQ6EiViujVV2o32XNTpnjdnDPXYVQdPP8Z9kb-n_Y3AAD__x6ScAc) from last November show a large blimp on the ground at a Chinese military base, a few months before a similar Chinese spy balloon crossed the United States and was [shot down](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvgzAQRn-N2Q4dZ0icgSELW7J06IiMfQ6uHF-E3aD8-6pVl0qdvu9tT-_9Ml9sTDHfrvbOYw0yW1fjk2ccAAlIz9T4MTAT64bH7mA00rGnY7OO1JMbfGeQ9IIel6APJ8LBLlpr4ww1cSQkjQNSh9h1Q0toFjbOnxwuxmuvemQfq2zth8RcVw7pJU_eWif3Jo1rrY-i9FnRpGja9731HDgXbm_yVDRdeS-_A29VtsjfeN5qdIn_PE3GDL1WNAUggmIDpxeUVaQW8LJncGvMXBjK4wWLTUkkg4QART7rCs5ukmK24MSWqmhqttE_9phSLIej6vF2tzH9aNf_K34FAAD__-Z5c5o) off the coast of South Carolina.
## States Protest New Equity-Based Mortgage Fee Rule
Top financial officials from 27 states sent a letter to President Biden [protesting new White House rules](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2ymzAQQOGngW6ZZcXfLSjS0DltSkZIK9gYkEcrmzhPn3Hq25_im_PrNt-s7HKuP-3BYw5xti7Li2dsAQnIzFT6MTATm5LHuhsMUt9QX27jYmyD2Lo2DN411LSuDtwZ6mr8CrUfShkJyWCLVCPWdVsRDgsPzn85XAZvfNEge8kxVb-jnHnjsL_ji1Pl4lHu45bzQwvzo6CpoOm6rirEP8tT5WTVT1PQ9Ii7ZHFa0EQ9aLaZFazeYRHPJ_DpYRMFL2o1c4JP794QYnJyrrDG6MGljwKWmFK8OCnoc1Hx8pchid7fcMSUV7uylmn0j0v2XbTriwbXw8r-X5u_n_cvAAD__z_JdTs) that redistribute mortgage fees from people with good credit to people with worse credit in the name of equity. The new federal rules will impact how much [new borrowers pay](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAURp8Gb1iXi7HJwNCq8pauHS1-rm0qbCKgifL2VTp3_j6dI52v63K1McVz-7QHmbbmxfoW77SA4oAc5YJdMCsRkuzIiFFLwGnAqduNc4KGSWoSoIJeJzcKR9IGEdSAFm0XDQJKUIACQAjVI2hH2oeLB6eDDGwACrHl0n_neLad1vTMdyq9z0eXzN7arTL5xnBmOFvnT3rUfsuvmeH8_lPjSbUynH15cXj1uRDf80H8yKVtdiPuc22vS225PJmcY2Dy46L1qAFVV0y4PWJKsY4TG2A7bEx_9vZ_jN8AAAD__03xYHA) for a home loan through government lenders. Those with good credit will essentially pay more in order to subsidize people with lower credit scores. State officials and other mortgage experts warn the new rule, which went into effect May 1, is a ["recipe for disaster,"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1urDAQQOGngW7QMOa3oLgN3d42JTJ4gImMjWyz7L59tKnTn-LT-XpMDy1W3PZfHzyk1U96SfLkCWtAAlIT5WZYmYlVzkPZdAqprajN92FBva61alVdmb5vyt70La5dqahquJt1LgMhKayRSsSyrAvCbuZuMf2Cc2eUySpkI8mH4tuLSzuv9u2fHIrFH7kd9pTOmKl_GY0Zjfd9F6t_zVcUxzF-mozGwNoCx6QTZzTy6-SQIvgrBb2xgVkMuwiObzh8SJveGMJlGc7LSdzFbTBfbw4RNu8NLOHjgcCLnAxGoo6JQx4Gc95ircSmzSrcDi3215j-XvYTAAD__-VgccY) penalizing those with good credit and endangering the overall mortgage lending market.
➤ **Dem Senator Ben Cardin** is [retiring from office](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOozAQQL_GdIPMGAIpKK6hy7VXIuMZkjkZO7Jng_L3q2y97XvN0_t3W29eoqT7X3_wrHtefVB58WoHsAjoVmxo3pmRXcNzd5mcxbHHsXnMl33n69Y7i92wEXWhd5PjjpzzEw1jaGRGi84OFjtru25o0U4bT4GuwW4TOTK9ZRLNpf2fJemD9_jOLy5tyEcT54fqsxr3x-BicDnPsw1bTXzWjze4bD6qHLmwweWDDS5fUKFy8poLHL68o08ExEcOxStsnCD4QpJAMxRWKQx-Vy6wy4uBOHjiCpLgmaOohAocOajkZHBpykzPU2KUehlNb--Hl_jTqr-v-w4AAP__VgJzeg) after 50 years in politics, and Washington State Gov. Jay Inslee says he [won't seek re-election ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGvozAQhH-N6YzWCwRSuLiGLtdeiQxeh80ZHNl7sfLvT3l65etGo9Ho0_fnttwcRz7vv91BVkJa3Cb8ogUGDaixW7DxNhAhdQ1Zc5k6wLHHsdltj-NEg8EBx_XqjMd1NROt4Tpc0LsADVsE7GAANADGDC3CtNK0-esG6-Q7r3ogz5Jy-0h8yk4hvtOLcrulo4l2F3kW1f1SOCuca61tIScSSfig8hkpnL8rfVItCudniiy8fWJ1-p5e-uHems8SiXRNp-hC9FdnokibcDp1SFmH9C_LroXy57LJ1j8rx8jlMqoe7ofj-MUkPyv6HwAA__-w2Wq0)when his term is up. Now all eyes are on a half-dozen other potential Democrat retirees, including Joe Manchin, Joe Tester and Bob Casey. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2OpDAQBOCnMZlR0-Y3cHAJ2Vx6IfJPG_pkzMi2Bu3br2a04YZfVVKqf4_tYThy2v-ak3QN12Zc5RdtMEhAiWrDxutAhKQa0t04K8Cpx6k5tLdmDKrH2avFOgUwBQp2WLrBjNC5uWGNgAoGwA6g64YWYbY0O784sLNXXvRAnuuV2_8Xp3pQiF_Xi3LrrrOJ-qj1WYT6I3AVuN733SbrEt3l3QtcT6Iq60HymamUn6Ae9KGN1y5wDcSpVOIkM1XOnHZJsZC8Ddc3DjJZZpfMBKNamqz98-YYuYyT6GE_DcfPmvr7Od8BAAD__015aFQ)) ➤ **Former President Trump** surprisingly agrees to participate in a CNN presidential town hall in New Hampshire next week, his first appearance on CNN since the 2016 presidential campaign. The decision is seen by some as pushback by Trump against Fox News in an effort to reach a wider audience, and CNN is being criticized for it. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQRL_GdEbrNZyhcJGG7tKmRD57OTYyNgLnnPx9ROo008xI8_Q-7vPdceT0fHcb2bLk2fnCL5qhl4AS9YxNsAsRkm7IqtugAU2HplntSD0QBKNuzplA_agCGPToO63I-6Fhi4AaekAFoFTfIgwPGnwYPTyGoIPogAKXfLSfmVNZaYk_-UVH6_PWRLuWsp9CvwmcBE611nbPkQv7fA0ETonqKXC6XgRO0F-hBE7l-Np2WbI8uciQa5KVyyp9SpKT5G2P7K-Gn9IVueRvCQBjZxCaw4a9cox83ozo4Lk5jn845X87vwEAAP__9IpkUQ)) ➤ **Pushback to GOP** candidate Nikki Haley's remark that President Biden is likely to die in the next five years is forcing Republicans to weigh how they attack Biden on age. Some are taking a more indirect approach by targeting VP Kamala Harris, his potential successor should he die in office. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7uOgzAQAL8Gd0bLGoIpXFyTLtdeifxYx5sYjMBKxN-fcvW1M8Vofm7zzXLm9f5tFzI1ltn6yi-aYZCAEtWMIphIhKQEme6iFeDY4yiSGaYu-tHHoAagGLSavHfR4QQ9OutRsEFABQNgB9B1Q4ugHWkfJg9OBxWaHihwLXv7KLzWRDGf5UV768siskm1bkejvhq8Nnhd6X20p02lfPQH8PPJMtlMp9x2CuzrIR-FpONAq0TsNVxQqzbVJYvdhO3NOfNxGZse7ovl_Nep_2__BgAA__-JbVlw)) ➤ **Outgoing Chicago** Mayor Lori Lightfoot begs Texas Gov. Greg Abbot to stop sending illegal migrants to Chicago, saying the city is being overwhelmed. Texas and other states have been sending undocumented migrants to northern cities as a protest against White House immigration policies. In response, Gov Abbott vowed to continue sending migrants to the Windy City.([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LtypDAQQNGvgUyUaF6agGATstl0Q0qPRvSWUFOoZ7D_3mXHjm9y6_x7rk9LiXL8aw-cZePVeqE3rnpQGhR0K9Rh3hABuxrndjSdhqmHqd7nYXOjdwEexgdse7dp5wyMxkyd9kb7mmbQ0OlBQ6t12w4NaOPQ-PDw2pnQharXGEj4av4zZdlxS5_8xqvxfNRp3kXOUnV_KlgqWO77bjb-yHiX717BcnIiIV8qWBJfpBLFXTZmUWdCG4q6SXYV-a2scyyiivCpCuZAOaqD4mWzFOV38jayCjZHvPhVFOX9ddiM9TWH86aUqIxT1et4WEo_c_K71VcAAAD__2pMb7w))
➤ **NBA legends** Stephen Curry and LeBron James will face off in tonight's opening playoff game between the Golden State Warriors and the L.A. Lakers. Both men, near the end of their careers, carried their teams to first-round victories with top-tier performances. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LtyhCAUgOGnwQ7ncHC9FBRp6DZtSofLUdlBcJCs49tnkjr13_zzfT3npwkxpPXT7KTqkmfjanjTDA8OyFHO2Hi1ECHJhpToRwk4dDg0m7IgxIJI0yA8WksdCCt6CSMO0E9maoJCQAkPQAEgxKNFGC2Nzk8O7OilZx2QDzWX9pVDqhst8c5vKq3LexPVVutxMvnBUDPU13W1dB7pNzLUyRqG-qy53Az1zFAHz1DLXkpE7BnqNYe0cjqC42elY6PE3XcpN49kS078ZXY6-WIccbOakJqi_HGFGMPZD6yDdTch_q3U_2V-AgAA___aG2N1)) ➤ **A biological man** took first place in the women's category of the Tour of the Gila bicycle race. Trans cyclist Austin Killips is criticized for the victory over biological women on social media, and Tour officials limited social media replies in an effort to tamp down the controversy. Today we’re covering the Texas manhunt for a suspect deported from the US four times, the potential Hollywood writers’ strike, and how aggressive Republicans should be in attacking President Biden’s age. | | | | | | Tuesday, May 2, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we’re covering the Texas manhunt for a suspect deported from the US four times, the potential Hollywood writers’ strike, and how aggressive Republicans should be in attacking President Biden’s age. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to stay informed throughout the day? and stay in touch. | Texas Murder Suspect Has Been Deported Multiple Times US Immigration officials say Francisco Oropesa, the man accused of shooting five of his neighbors in Cleveland, Texas, including a 9-year-old boy, has in the past but keeps re-entering the country illegally. So far, despite a widening manhunt over three days involving more than 200 officers, officials say, they have "zero leads" and are . The FBI released , showing a prominent tattoo of a woman wearing a headdress on his arm. Police have warned the public that Oropesa is considered dangerous and not to approach him if they see him. Military Tracking Another Mystery Balloon The U.S. military is crossing the ocean from Hawaii towards Mexico. The government says the balloon poses no danger or security risk, but they have no idea who it belongs to or what it is. Officials say the balloon is transmitting no signals and could be a weather balloon off-course. It will be subject to if it comes near land. Meanwhile, newly revealed satellite photos from last November show a large blimp on the ground at a Chinese military base, a few months before a similar Chinese spy balloon crossed the United States and was off the coast of South Carolina. States Protest New Equity-Based Mortgage Fee Rule Top financial officials from 27 states sent a letter to President Biden that redistribute mortgage fees from people with good credit to people with worse credit in the name of equity. The new federal rules will impact how much for a home loan through government lenders. Those with good credit will essentially pay more in order to subsidize people with lower credit scores. State officials and other mortgage experts warn the new rule, which went into effect May 1, is a penalizing those with good credit and endangering the overall mortgage lending market. ➤ Dem Senator Ben Cardin is after 50 years in politics, and Washington State Gov. Jay Inslee says he his term is up. Now all eyes are on a half-dozen other potential Democrat retirees, including Joe Manchin, Joe Tester and Bob Casey. () ➤ Former President Trump surprisingly agrees to participate in a CNN presidential town hall in New Hampshire next week, his first appearance on CNN since the 2016 presidential campaign. The decision is seen by some as pushback by Trump against Fox News in an effort to reach a wider audience, and CNN is being criticized for it. () ➤ Pushback to GOP candidate Nikki Haley's remark that President Biden is likely to die in the next five years is forcing Republicans to weigh how they attack Biden on age. Some are taking a more indirect approach by targeting VP Kamala Harris, his potential successor should he die in office. () ➤ Outgoing Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot begs Texas Gov. Greg Abbot to stop sending illegal migrants to Chicago, saying the city is being overwhelmed. Texas and other states have been sending undocumented migrants to northern cities as a protest against White House immigration policies. In response, Gov Abbott vowed to continue sending migrants to the Windy City.() ➤ NBA legends Stephen Curry and LeBron James will face off in tonight's opening playoff game between the Golden State Warriors and the L.A. body:
Bob needs a big day!
We need to increase our fundraising by 80% in the next two weeks ; otherwise, we may be forced to reduce our staff and cut vendors - personnel essential to helping us compete in the primary election.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1]
If you intend to give to Bob Lorinser during the primary election, he needs you right now. [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
If you have stored your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.
$25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
$50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
$100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [bit.ly/FundDrBob]

Soon, as the Democratic primary heats up, everyone will closely watch Bob Lorinser's first competitive FEC fundraising report. We must demonstrate his grassroots fundraising abilities to continue our two-cycle strategy to defeat the MAGA extremist Jack Bergman.
Dr. Bob Lorinser dislikes asking for money. He's precisely the kind of person we need in Congress; someone focused on campaign finance reform and good legislation that helps hardworking families by bringing resources back to the district.
To advocate for reform, we must get Doc to DC, and we desperately need more fuel in his tank. To compete and bring true democratic , ethical, principled leadership back to this seat, right now - Bob needs you.
Bob needs you. [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
If essential components of our campaign go underfunded, we will not be able to meet critical milestones of our two-cycle strategy. Bob Lorinser has the most viable strategy to defeat MAGA extremist, Jack Bergman.
Bob's battle begins now.
Please help save our Democracy. Help Bob Lorinser continue his fight. Because of the novelty of a new primary opponent chipping at Bob's donations from the right, dark money, corporate PACs, and extremely wealthy donors, he could be out-raised this quarter.
- We cannot let that happen!
We are so proud our average contribution is around $30. Bob has many more donors than his primary opponent to the right of him, but apparently they have deeper pockets. So, we just need more people power, and that includes you [bit.ly/FundDrBob] and those you forward this e-mail to.
Whatever you can contribute, it will go a long way. [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
We are very grateful for your generosity. [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
"Each time we stand up for an ideal, act to improve the lives of others, or strike out against injustices, we send forth a tiny ripple of hope. Those ripples build a current that can swipe down the mightiest walls of resistance." —RFK

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.-8jtAuLAhX_A)
---
Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ \- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they're bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country - the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ \- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation's heroes deserve.**](http://trk.readactnews.-Y0572KGYYNMITepVwVYQ)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.readactnews.-5bLA)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://trk.readactnews.) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day - this year and every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://trk.readactnews._VcCC7exw)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.readactnews.-AewXND0FY7Fkg)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMjItYTBlYWMyMDIxMjkyNDQ5OTk5Njc2OGJkOTNiZjgxMmYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/l6CPEZJG-pGrygF8wXhhWA) to unsubscribe.
---

In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. * Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom. But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - this year and every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.
