subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31e14c9c28fb4cf8adb87891c563e79b&_e=P-XlAjH1u-jhcfrnD-0H-Qf8ygXLKIx-sdqP6UUUZiwDDQvp3l-JiUl5PWl6t1a0Q6C0FI6hg4F0QeyPrWHf7WM2x6x-DW5xiL0pK6g2cDnMujGEtqHQi85OEfmO-giJO-3fZAS1_ddxyROPCSJrCW5YJxwLlwFIjz-qafZLxEdapEptj6mEDY4FMbnFUHTqCVPx5avSd8AkjC2QouXwlPXMIJZSmy-dP3yFuhvD9GrWvlq9R9aYbwUCt7zfijxfTj0hEdKB4tVnPoKRAe8A4QvmM8E1iojLmnoxPlPPrOA%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31e14c9c28fb4cf8adb87891c563e79b&_e=P-XlAjH1u-jhcfrnD-0H-Qf8ygXLKIx-sdqP6UUUZiwDDQvp3l-JiUl5PWl6t1a0Q6C0FI6hg4F0QeyPrWHf7WM2x6x-DW5xiL0pK6g2cDnMujGEtqHQi85OEfmO-giJO-3fZAS1_ddxyROPCSJrCW2Mzmu7oNL4L8yXbO9bKKp-au-GWkVv5f97HspoafT0GCoPL8xA-46ODmJPqK8OKaCdjsmDU4fXj5rJ7-Ht7bZUzXMvfYjFwPkIh3x4X1iHb5Vmo0HBI0NEjTqd1_QBWs7Q6kAFJtYFtAT_U_4EuNk%3D)
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31e14c9c28fb4cf8adb87891c563e79b&_e=P-XlAjH1u-jhcfrnD-0H-Qf8ygXLKIx-sdqP6UUUZiwDDQvp3l-JiUl5PWl6t1a0Q6C0FI6hg4F0QeyPrWHf7WM2x6x-DW5xiL0pK6g2cDnMujGEtqHQi85OEfmO-giJO-3fZAS1_ddxyROPCSJrCWyx3Nh9nnoXnvR9hfq5iA_5ys71sYX0fytatSTzPvzKjQehROxJxJhVj2kWBooug4_k6ZHbrM97dAigGFYnQE9OuzLINwn6qnRPkWPV6iS0n7pSea30ekUFM7Jd7giX2Wd_JJnLCk0GY4eJ97GRPR8%3D)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31e14c9c28fb4cf8adb87891c563e79b&_e=P-XlAjH1u-jhcfrnD-0H-Qf8ygXLKIx-sdqP6UUUZiwDDQvp3l-JiUl5PWl6t1a0Q6C0FI6hg4F0QeyPrWHf7WM2x6x-DW5xiL0pK6g2cDnMujGEtqHQi85OEfmO-giJO-3fZAS1_ddxyROPCSJrCTgnE_EDSXSLZVNUXiLv-JWYIq-ExNCBoFDIQefMXu-RoJ8a-_WlPQ3l8PyMksn4hVEBqqOKA8ukJxI0zfSlIPA6zGNXERc48wrKd1rlw7M4qvGHQjdSE8QefC3WwJf9rCeunZuayqoFEXRo8AdkiKQ%3D)
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31e14c9c28fb4cf8adb87891c563e79b&_e=P-XlAjH1u-jhcfrnD-0H-Qf8ygXLKIx-sdqP6UUUZiwDDQvp3l-JiUl5PWl6t1a0Q6C0FI6hg4F0QeyPrWHf7WM2x6x-DW5xiL0pK6g2cDnMujGEtqHQi85OEfmO-giJO-3fZAS1_ddxyROPCSJrCY9mj_K5oDQYYMXR7rbaXsZMZj4e5y6Vq4SiKzbMWIGAFmiHFx4kxn4XFLSJvncPgRXfDY832QIb37QA-0_NyLkZrSu8LF3dXB_0kOcsay7XF1Xmyb0q-TXtOyCDZmuTCljFBYJVGQRJrFqnzvoi0qE%3D)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31e14c9c28fb4cf8adb87891c563e79b&_e=P-XlAjH1u-jhcfrnD-0H-Qf8ygXLKIx-sdqP6UUUZiwDDQvp3l-JiUl5PWl6t1a0Q6C0FI6hg4F0QeyPrWHf7WM2x6x-DW5xiL0pK6g2cDnMujGEtqHQi85OEfmO-giJO-3fZAS1_ddxyROPCSJrCaayj4JHrRDTQ1HHnCJgUXfjnjYaVr-Nvf9Q15Lv0motXXokKZTqhcrryzK_Z5yh7j13GFMB268-HU5MBWHL3nkTUSKIiKzasCBQ7vUHgUtY9rncydNIdczHuGDojPJS0cChYI2PAnNEwDvF95el53M%3D) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31e14c9c28fb4cf8adb87891c563e79b&_e=P-XlAjH1u-jhcfrnD-0H-Qf8ygXLKIx-sdqP6UUUZiwDDQvp3l-JiUl5PWl6t1a0Q6C0FI6hg4F0QeyPrWHf7WM2x6x-DW5xiL0pK6g2cDnMujGEtqHQi85OEfmO-giJO-3fZAS1_ddxyROPCSJrCeltMTApn-AdmpZTjgjzBZs-ebx_P59zOIGm-IaPSCvT5oa9RhKEOE-FjLERZXtXdBIo1DnnpFhh4F_tNm1ux0z4sRRdmZgKkQOVoEBD7ddAN9uJLOuOv2iGG7_23ZgAOU_WBRbOwSTQ1Y1PsP8ZP_Y%3D)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31e14c9c28fb4cf8adb87891c563e79b&_e=P-XlAjH1u-jhcfrnD-0H-Qf8ygXLKIx-sdqP6UUUZiwDDQvp3l-JiUl5PWl6t1a0Q6C0FI6hg4F0QeyPrWHf7WM2x6x-DW5xiL0pK6g2cDnMujGEtqHQi85OEfmO-giJO-3fZAS1_ddxyROPCSJrCQ0fgaij-P654xR5bR1Z9_U8-g67u3xxiUDaoMcYhyGTZa2ny9Nepgyp8hnCn0OyT1oSKcayNb0w_n91DCS92jfHGdY5cLWeUeolmXB4ItxojpOk9Si-Ng6fVRxJ-d6RCsz67S7QTlkV9kPPfDnqXWs%3D) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

Dear Friends,

We have less than 50 days until next month's Republican Primary.

Join us this week at our campaign office, located at 1108 Courthouse Rd. North Chesterfield, VA 23236, to volunteer.

I am the most conservative candidate in this race and we need to let Republican primary voters know that. Also, the later date of June 20th has created some problems for some voters, so we need to reach them now to let them know that early voting starts this Friday, May 5th.

Please let us know if you can volunteer for an hour or two by [emailing us, chris@chaseforva.com.](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com)

We look forward to seeing you soon.
For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

Join us this week at our campaign office, located at 1108 Courthouse Rd. North Chesterfield, VA 23236, to volunteer. I am the most conservative candidate in this race and we need to let Republican primary voters know that. Also, the later date of June 20th has created some problems for some voters, so we need to reach them now to let them know that early voting starts this Friday, May 5th. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Winning against Leftist "Elites"
body:
This is one of my biggest fights yet.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19050%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HrK60TK0At91YSE35cacCQ&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19050%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HrK60TK0At91YSE35cacCQ&sysid=1)
---
I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. All I'm asking for in an exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT (even just five dollars!) to help Turning Point USA cover the shipping.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19051%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lGjO7rmBDulrBkMs4Trydg&sysid=1)
---
[Get your book now](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19052%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tSUvK1GJjVacMoyoWsmwOg&sysid=1)
---
I know what it takes to FIGHT and WIN against Leftist "Elites" who hate our country, our freedom, and everything that makes America great. I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. **Now Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum (WEF) and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... and I want to reach as many Americans AS POSSIBLE with our important plan to DEFEAT the Great Reset.** [**Because this fight is so important, I am GIVING AWAY my new book,_The American Response to the Great Reset,_ for a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Please make your gift and claim your book right now.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19053%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mF0T6JSsx7h3Vd9N0wt3Dg&sysid=1)
---
[Get your book now](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19052%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tSUvK1GJjVacMoyoWsmwOg&sysid=1)
---
Whether you've heard of the WEF's Great Reset agenda before, or you're just learning of it now ... you must read this book. If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. If you want to make a difference and preserve FREEDOM, PROSPERITY, and AMERICAN GREATNESS for your kids and your grandkids ... you must read this book. [**And I want to send you a copy of _The American Response to the Great Reset_ RIGHT AWAY. Please claim your book right now with a gift to Turning Point USA of ANY AMOUNT, even just five dollars.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19054%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZE4K0XylAJcdRnX%2bnbIVHQ&sysid=1) Thank you for helping Turning Point USA expose and DEFEAT the Great Reset agenda. For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
[Get your book now](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19052%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tSUvK1GJjVacMoyoWsmwOg&sysid=1)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Stop corporate polluters from profiting off our public lands
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1752323?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **HIGH-PRESSURE water, sand, and chemicals BLAST into the ground, cracking the Earth and releasing NOXIOUS GAS! As the GROUND SHAKES, ANIMALS FLEE in terror, and SULFUR fills the air. ** What was a crisp morning on our public lands has become a screeching nightmare for animals and nearby communities. This terrifying scene is the result of the Department of Interior handing our public lands over to corporate polluters so they can frack for profit. **There are just a FEW DAYS LEFT for you to help STOP this from happening on Nevada’s public lands. [Friend, if 1 of every 9 people reading this email takes action, we can SEND A MESSAGE TO THE DOI: don’t let fracking DESTROY our public lands. Please add your name by 11:59 pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1752324?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1752325?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Fracking POISONS air, water, and land with pollution, endangering nearby communities. People exposed to fracking can experience _**coughing fits, dizziness, nausea, and BLISTERING headaches.**_ To make matters worse, polluted rivers and lakes can CONTAMINATE community drinking water.
The DOI is poised to turn over our public lands to corporate polluters, Friend. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today -- **because there’s so little time left for us to stop this.** **_But we can stop it_** \-- if environmentalists like you STAND UP to corporate polluters and demand the DOI conserve public lands. [**PROTECT public lands from FRACKING! Add your name by 11:59 pm TONIGHT!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1752326?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1752325?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio
Fossil Fuels Program Manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)

name: PA Dems
subject: The Presidential election has started! Are you ready?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
Can we count on you? | | |
---
| | Hey Peter, You saw the news — President Joe Biden is running for re-election! Four years ago President Biden began his campaign by saying that we were in a fight for the soul of the nation. Now he is running to finish the fight. It’s no secret that President Biden had a historic first term:
---

If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. If you want to make a difference and preserve FREEDOM, PROSPERITY, and AMERICAN GREATNESS for your kids and your grandkids ... you must read this book. Thank you for helping Turning Point USA expose and DEFEAT the Great Reset agenda. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Pro Life Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:

| | Peter, I just watched extreme MAGA Republicans vote to gut jobs, strip benefits for our veterans and take away food assistance from millions of Americans. Yes, you read that correctly. Team Extreme wants to leave millions of Americans unable to put food on the table or see a doctor. It’s unacceptable, unconscionable and un-American. And I’m going to make sure it costs House Republicans their majority. [_**Here’s my plan: New polls show we’re locked in a neck-and-neck battle for control of Congress. But extreme MAGA Republicans are raking in over $400,000 per day since taking office. I need a massive showing of support – 2,055 gifts before midnight – to make their out-of-control plans completely backfire and hand Team Extreme a stunning rebuke. Can I count on you to chip in $15 before midnight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62676679/404209761/1662333042?refcode=20230502_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmJjODA5OS0wNmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TAvlY_f4SX6Z-Ympg9QXCAzqsfPMVVPnWK6mRXZQRZs=) Peter, let me tell you what I told my Republican colleagues: This is not a serious plan. The result? One-quarter of the nation’s debt was incurred during the Trump presidency. And these people want to lecture America about fiscal responsibility? You’ve got to be kidding me. Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the Majority for Democrats.

Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We absolutely must re-elect Senator Tammy Baldwin, the great progressive from Wisconsin. We can't afford another Ron Johnson (R-WI) in the Senate.
body:
We need her in the Senate
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5bafb26c-0377-4249-b173-ab6675f0a66b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[We can't afford another Ron Johnson (R-WI) in the Senate. We absolutely must re-elect Senator Tammy Baldwin, the great progressive from Wisconsin.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T128cbf09-fd0d-43c0-8869-2ed6e6696260/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** _Let me remind you about treasonous, bag-of-bricks-for-a-brain Senator Johnson, who took a pilgrimage to Putin on July 4th, 2018, returning repeating Russian talking points like a parrot. A rabid anti-vaxxer, anti-choicer and AR-15 promoter who recently spoke in a hearing about how climate change would be good for the U.S:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec8eb963-17d0-4f9b-ad8b-5b332c4e940d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_An all-around disaster, and worst of all we lost to him by a measly 1% in 2022(!), leaving us stuck with this human waste of space for six more years. 1%!!_** _His polar opposite Tammy Baldwin's up for reelection. Baldwin, the first open Senate lesbian, is a stalwart abortion rights supporter, democracy-defender & gun safety proponent good on every issue from climate change to higher wages._**_ Like Sherrod Brown & Raphael Warnock--a Senator from a purple-to-red state as progressive as blue-state colleagues. We need her courage in the Senate._** **_Republicans are recruiting someone as corrupt, stupid & treasonous as Johnson to take on Baldwin, like former Koch-Bros-owned-Gov. Scott Walker, or GOP governor candidate in 2022, Tim Michels. He said if he were elected governor, Republicans "will never lose another election." There's a word for that. It isn't democracy._** _We can't lose Baldwin's passion, smarts and perspective in the Senate, and can't allow an authoritarian clod to win, or we'll have another Johson in the Senate, doing Putin's bidding while claiming vaccines are deadly and climate change is great._ [**_Will you join Blue Amp in giving super-Sen. Baldwin $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to keep the progressive purple state Senator in DC fighting for us?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T10220783-9a7f-4806-acd0-90060ecfde52/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for rejecting Ron-Johnson-type Senators, and fighting to keep their opposites, superb Senators like Tammy Baldwin._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa6352f5-7617-4798-a235-6c41ffbea48b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/re-electtammybaldwinin20242-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb2a8afc8-3b6a-4abc-b5a8-5bf0a64bba02/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Our average donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$25.59**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zee9047o0703eql52aoed5funs9h8tm302vpkl20_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gmao36c9h2bs)
That was our average donation in April, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1o3ib99gji8va7uhb8kslnms7oncsnedrgcgkn0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gmao36c9h2bs)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $25.59?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z939b8kmtn59gtvcclvcpaqouft86hq5bpi32af0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gmao36c9h2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zru4lgg25gfmoo0uf0kokdvfhcda2tqenn1d4f68_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gmao36c9h2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zidrov7bed0brvr0gj19bgrqma6ln7acfqv4pd48_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gmao36c9h2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoqu4epig1ksvsf2v0f9ito82nqikkr0ak4otb38_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gmao36c9h2bs) | | [Chip in $25.59 ➔](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrna6b0352chvbulr329bk6egptrbbs22gpm3jgg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gmao36c9h2bs)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5iekvmqmodmvvpuas0ek6h3gaj73lfdorc3vrd8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gmao36c9h2bs)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1qpkhkjomilnft8evd3mhpqp7qhf9fkgbun4nuo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gmao36c9h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1miqjuscc5v8mds3ap1hpj5d3qv6ah04vjoec08_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gmao36c9h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $25.59 -> **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmab7i50njj5dfn4rqt69oae8sqopmp9g4dsto9o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gmao36c9h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you. | That was our average donation in April, Fellow American. Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, | | | ---|---|--- | | This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. We are leading this race with actual solutions. I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Roy Cooper
subject: What our public school students and teachers deserve:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Today is Teacher Appreciation Day.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62659932/404144409/823540626?refcode=ea.b6ff5029-e7e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.b6ff5029-e7e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmZmNTAyOS1lN2U4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=548fedUeM0PhoIwHkSVrIH7rcQZ77Su7w0Tgbm9JORo=&emci=668417b2-4be8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b6ff5029-e7e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Hi Peter, My mother was a North Carolina public school teacher. I went through the public school system myself and we sent our three daughters to public schools here in NC. **I know firsthand that our state can offer _excellent_ education for every student.** _But that’s only possible when public schools and their teachers have the resources they need to succeed._ **[Today, on Teacher Appreciation Day, I’m asking you to join in my call to keep public dollars in public schools. Sign on here to urge the GOP to ensure public schools are fully funded>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62659933/404144410/-485623296?refcode=ea.b6ff5029-e7e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.b6ff5029-e7e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmZmNTAyOS1lN2U4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=548fedUeM0PhoIwHkSVrIH7rcQZ77Su7w0Tgbm9JORo=&emci=668417b2-4be8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b6ff5029-e7e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN ON »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62659934/404144411/-485623296?refcode=ea.b6ff5029-e7e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.b6ff5029-e7e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmZmNTAyOS1lN2U4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=548fedUeM0PhoIwHkSVrIH7rcQZ77Su7w0Tgbm9JORo=&emci=668417b2-4be8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b6ff5029-e7e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
---
Peter, Republican legislators in Raleigh are _determined_ to strip critical funds from our public school system — and it’s just not right.
Right now, a bill is working its way through the General Assembly to take tax dollars away from public schools in favor of unaccountable and discriminatory private schools. In effect, we’ll be taking funds out of the hands of kids who need them and subsidizing wealthy families who want to send their children to private schools.
Far right legislators are using their power to essentially resegregate schools and reshape what and how our public schools educators teach in an effort to instill their own extremist worldview into North Carolina’s kids.
Our students and teachers deserve so much better.
**[I oppose these dangerous bills and will continue working to give our public school teachers and students the resources they deserve. Join me by signing my petition now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62659935/404144412/-485623296?refcode=ea.b6ff5029-e7e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.b6ff5029-e7e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmZmNTAyOS1lN2U4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=548fedUeM0PhoIwHkSVrIH7rcQZ77Su7w0Tgbm9JORo=&emci=668417b2-4be8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b6ff5029-e7e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)**
Thank you,
Roy Cooper

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: Do you know what they call me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
| | | [](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=5e87c8bf537341d39ea26ef026b127d7&_e=4d1pL_OBT6sFjwFqxqfiY8SMtv_w4P3n18x_4P9hW98z6TKKBbAN1nLgs1N7fNErFLVwNBVgQVbWyRCX0LHRylpRfbwwCJIJ7lKmrsjvxAQh1d8e2RpSHWucXGvYpWmUnUjRRfaWDgD6ibrQ4edm4gwBS52NfupEhR4VestxMrZ2oNZ_3W8OZIBj7kIzHyJEGywLEAKl9_j725mcLjvFpQ8oDJffBYHkeOGi7pLzVb6UMr9kzPVZIrD2jyTbuhkefC6dG-D8G0FZJjmOdSAYShZHJJlHjTZPqssqlt0euZaYCmqyEUhFqUdo7qje-PWevMkEUsHTGmcDtzJofpCq70F5wrF1GzITcrXexOasmU6JA3uh3Ks7dw_aOQTdoZYy)
---
Peter, I know you get lots of messages, but I need you to read every word of this one. Once you finish, I hope you join my team and save America.

Democrats have told me I’m “white adjacent” and “extremist” because I don’t meet the narrative of an oppressed minority immigrant who craves unlimited handouts.

My parents and I escaped communist Vietnam and came to this great country as legal immigrants.

My parents took every opportunity they could - my Dad even took a job where he only saw us every six months.

But I wasn't "oppressed" or held back by their struggles: I was motivated.

I attended the U.S. Naval Academy and served as a Navy Special Operations Officer, diffusing bombs and performing difficult dives in the most dangerous corners on Earth.

I put my life on the line for this country.

So when the radical left want to call me names, I just have one request: call me an American, because I believe I've earned that incredible title.

If you're ready for a new generation of conservative leadership that will unite America under the greatest flag on Earth, I hope you'll join our fight and become a valued member of our incredible team.

Join me today: **[https://secure.winred.com/unleash-america-pac/join-me-today](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=5e87c8bf537341d39ea26ef026b127d7&_e=4d1pL_OBT6sFjwFqxqfiY8SMtv_w4P3n18x_4P9hW98z6TKKBbAN1nLgs1N7fNErFLVwNBVgQVbWyRCX0LHRylpRfbwwCJIJ7lKmrsjvxAQh1d8e2RpSHWucXGvYpWmUnUjRRfaWDgD6ibrQ4edm4gwBS52NfupEhR4VestxMrZ2oNZ_3W8OZIBj7kIzHyJEGywLEAKl9_j725mcLjvFpWj1f1SwYjhARWXzkdBcVshzHeQEXad5KZAr88BUEDqveRWqQ3BUwLjKPkqOPpB05GUdSIpcmIEw5y2ujR-OdsS4-L_BNLIl44AoXl0PMAyJOFjoR1532cK27M-GlI66Fh57pWWJNl6JQ_hemCffrAfUrayE4gOmSJ-U99xCHKbO)**
---
In Liberty,
---
[](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=5e87c8bf537341d39ea26ef026b127d7&_e=4d1pL_OBT6sFjwFqxqfiY8SMtv_w4P3n18x_4P9hW98z6TKKBbAN1nLgs1N7fNErFLVwNBVgQVbWyRCX0LHRylpRfbwwCJIJ7lKmrsjvxAQh1d8e2RpSHWucXGvYpWmUnUjRRfaWDgD6ibrQ4edm4gwBS52NfupEhR4VestxMrZ2oNZ_3W8OZIBj7kIzHyJEGywLEAKl9_j725mcLjvFpXkR90oUesOqWiLQqpzP7Tx5dJ6TM_mPDAk-a4k44p0dnp1TbfRnc0208V51SMFdQOUrlM0wgxPe9Fyhhu6hOkQRwtBOzjzPug6_UW3IJCXpm6oUivMJiyV9EzsvCeTKPAutOuRfcin8e_qlQ775unl4yDKIeEeQdmoVxu0Ivu8R)

# [Gender Madness In Montana](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=118337576&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTE4MzM3NTc2LCJpYXQiOjE2ODMwMzI4MzMsImV4cCI6MTY4NTYyNDgzMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.jD9lH0iFQpVw7oo4JFZyU6zKrUYbG1pDoh3s8qX-uG4)
### The MT Freedom Caucus took on the LGBT mob and won.
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/2ce164f0-4aaa-4761-ae17-0c0ee89569ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| May 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2ce164f0-4aaa-4761-ae17-0c0ee89569ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wL2dlbmRlci1tYWRuZXNzLWluLW1vbnRhbmE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1zdWJzdGFjayZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJmFjdGlvbj1yZXN0YWNrLWNvbW1lbnQiLCJwIjoxMTgzMzc1NzYsInMiOjE0MjQ2MDIsImYiOnRydWUsInUiOjkwNTAxMTkyLCJpYXQiOjE2ODMwMzI4MzMsImV4cCI6MTY4NTYyNDgzMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTAiLCJzdWIiOiJsaW5rLXJlZGlyZWN0In0.qvc4YCskFumtMfWGoGw4sXFhGE6A_MK9xJ1QirYcq3s?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

Friends,
It was a wild week for Freedom Caucuses all over America. >From Montana to Illinois, our brave legislators made national headlines taking on some of the most destructive political forces in America. They delivered wins for you - our supporters - without whom none of this would be possible.
Here's a recap of what happened.
**Montana:**
The MT Freedom Caucus was in the crosshairs of the liberal media this week as their battle to ban pediatric gender mutilation received widespread national attention. Specific attention was paid to their push to censure transgender Democrat Rep. Zooey Zephyr for breaking the rules on decorum when he told them they would have "blood on their hands" for banning sex changes for children.
LGBT activists even [stormed](https://substack.com/redirect/eecfda56-a429-4a41-a53e-992a639e4b2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the state capitol to protest the MTFC holding Rep. Zephyr accountable for breaking the rules. National media also [seized](https://substack.com/redirect/322a8a5d-d7f6-4c14-87d8-d66105a8cc30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the fact that the MT Freedom Caucus refused to use the "right" pronouns for Rep. Zephyr in their press releases. **The self-righteous liberal media decided the controversy was not children getting their bodies mutilated but that the MT Freedom Caucus called a man a man.**
At the end of the day, Gov. Greg Gianforte signed SB99 into law, making Montana the 15th state in America to ban this cruel act of child mutilation.
So much national attention was focused on the MT Freedom Caucus's role in this fight that the Associated Press decided to write [a piece](https://substack.com/redirect/9eac6d4a-2c27-40ee-874c-86b76f3c3386?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) examining the new rise of our state freedom caucuses. Key excerpt:
> The majority of the 11 states with caucuses are controlled by Republican governors and Legislatures. Roth said that's by design. The national network advises its state members to "be loud" against Republicans who have compromised on fiscal and cultural conservative principles, Roth said.
> Freedom caucuses from Idaho to Pennsylvania have focused on abortion, crime and how race, gender and sexuality are navigated in schools and state offices. They've also frequently targeted what Roth called "corporate welfare" including tax incentives designed to lure Hollywood film productions to Wyoming.
**Louisiana:**
The gender madness didn't end in Montana as the LAFC also battled the pronoun mafia this week in their attempts to protect children. The legislature held hearings on [bills](https://substack.com/redirect/614ec0fc-72e7-4049-bc60-4ff034ebeb65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to ban teachers from sexualizing children in the classroom and from using a different name or pronoun for a child without the consent of the parents.
Several LGBT activists testified during the hearing including a drag queen wearing blue face who [called](https://substack.com/redirect/0b54200d-3433-4da9-97dd-f99e5d47e83e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) himself "big gay baby."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/732d076f-2a4e-4113-b663-ff97a6f9a91f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Just another week in paradise...
**Illinois:**
It's been three years since COVID began and insane restrictions are still in place in many places across America. The most ridiculous example of it lately: A 16-year-old kid in Illinois failed his driving test because he refused to wear a mask. Even hospitals in Illinois have stopped requiring masks but you still have to wear one for a test to receive your driver's license?
In response, the IL Freedom Caucus immediately called for the Secretary of State to remove this ridiculous policy. Later that same day, the government complied. The mask mandate will end this month. Freedom Caucuses will always defend your rights.
**Arizona:**
Democrats got especially weird in Arizona this week as a liberal lawmaker was [caught on camera](https://substack.com/redirect/5308c326-aa3a-46bc-815a-9a0ee4a63f1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) swiping Bibles from the House members-only lounge, calling it a "little playful commentary" for separation of church and state.
Attacks on faith like this should never be tolerated and the AZFC right away began pushing GOP leadership for consequences.
**South Carolina:**
Parents in South Carolina had a major victory this week as the House and Senate passed a [bill](https://substack.com/redirect/f034d47f-02ba-4dd9-a43f-f02ea56f3391?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to finally expand school choice in the state. It now heads to Gov. Henry McMaster's desk for signature.
This never would have happened without the SCFC who relentlessly kept pushing the issue.
**Pennsylvania:**
Like South Carolina, the PA Freedom Caucus is also pushing for school choice in the Keystone State. Read this [op-ed](https://substack.com/redirect/a5db5579-7a75-444e-bbc2-e94e47fcf3d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from Freedom Caucus member Rep. Joe D'Orsie calling on Gov. Josh Shapiro to follow through when he said during the campaign that "parents need to have the opportunity to put their children into the best place for them to succeed."
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/a87f35a3-9d5b-4be0-ae9d-91216afd511b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. subject: Over 7,000 Republicans have already...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is why I am personally emailing you today.

| |
---
| | | Over 7,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle! My team just informed me that your membership status is still **INACTIVE** - and we're running out of membership cards! **[Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziqf69orrh77bn1i1b9k7esp52acjmbg3onphubo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gm6o72c3h2bs "Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?")**

**Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House - but if we're going to keep it, expand it, and sweep Democrats out of the Senate and White House in 2024 we're going to need you with us.**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdqbpq4gr05cidrb2c9fe6rnk79h3gsnar93n0d8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gm6o72c3h2bs)
---

Democrats are counting on us, on YOU, to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It's the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda.

This is why I am personally emailing you today. As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU. Step 1 to accomplishing this goal is securing your commitment to the Republican Party.

**[Confirm you're with me. Peter, It’s Election Day across the state and we want to make sure you make your voice heard if you haven’t already! Here’s what you need to know:
* Polls are open from 6 am to 6 pm
* You must bring a photo ID with you to the polls
* If you don’t know your polling location, you can check at **indianavoters.com**

The local elections taking place today have tremendous impact on our communities and our everyday lives. Contests for mayor, city council, and town council around the state will be decided on. name: Team Jazz
subject: 🗞️ Big News!! Speaker Adrienne A. Jones will headline our Spring Happy Hour
body:
Hey there, we'll keep this quick but we just got word that Speaker Adrienne A. Jones is going to join us for our Spring Happy Hour later this month. We hope that you can join us Thursday, May 18th at 6:00pm at The Country Club at Woodmore.

All the details are below and you can RSVP here >> jazzlewis.com/events [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/0518woodmore]

Hope to see you on the 18th,

Team Jazz
--
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=logo]

Join us for a Spring Happy Hour in support of

Majority Whip Jazz Lewis
Chair, Oversight Committee on Personnel and Vice Chair, Capital Budget Subcommittee

House Appropriations Committee

with Special Guest

Speaker Adrienne A. Jones

Thursday, May 18th, 2023
6:00-8:00pm
The Country Club at Woodmore
12320 Pleasant Prospect
Mitchellville, MD 20721
RSVP > [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/0518woodmore]

For questions or to RSVP contact Megan at megan@skybp.com or (240) 283-4899

As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Majority Whip in the Maryland House. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Bowie with his wife and son.

Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

name: Shift WA
subject: QUICK POLL: Who is your pick for governor?
body:
We want to hear from our readers on who they would like to see as our state's next governor! Take a quick moment to let us know your pick. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61761807:WBkLUWDaN:m:1:2610672541:478747569DF7EBA5A981C897CFF4DE08:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

We wanted to send a big thank you to everyone who helped us meet our end-of-month fundraising goal! It is thanks to the generous contributions of people like you that we here at Shift WA can continue our work reporting and commenting on what is happening in our state - and holding the Democrats (and media) accountable.

Since our launch a decade ago, we here at Shift WA have worked hard to inform our readers on what Governor Jay Inslee was doing to our state. From his extreme (and extremely expensive) green agenda, to his record-setting tax-and-spend schemes, to his years-long abuse of power during the pandemic, Gov. Inslee has damaged our state to an unprecedented extent. That's why his Monday announcement that he would not seek re-election comes as a major relief.

So, in the spirit of placing a check on one-man rule in our state, we want to hear from our readers on who they would like to see as our state's next governor! Here are some of the names (in alphabetical order) that have been featured in the media since Inslee's long-awaited retirement announcement:

1. Semi Bird (R), Richland School Board
2. Bob Ferguson (D), Attorney General of WA
3. Hillary Franz (D), Public Lands Commissioner of WA
4. Raul Garcia (R), Doctor/Former Gubernatorial Candidate
5. Mark Mullet (D), State Senator (Issaquah)
6. Jim Walsh (R), State Representative (Aberdeen)
7. J.T. Wilcox (R), State Representative (Yelm)
8. Other (give us your pick!)

Simply click on the link below and take a quick moment to let us know your choice.

**[TAKE THE POLL](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61761808:WBkLUWDaN:m:1:2610672541:478747569DF7EBA5A981C897CFF4DE08:r)**
Thank you,

The Shift WA Team

P.S. To hear more about the newly open 2024 gubernatorial race, Shift WA co-founder Randy Pepple recently joined John Carlson to discuss Gov. Inslee's announcement and possible gubernatorial candidates in 2024\. You can take a listen [here](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61761809:WBkLUWDaN:m:1:2610672541:478747569DF7EBA5A981C897CFF4DE08:r).

| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61761810:WBkLUWDaN:m:1:2610672541:478747569DF7EBA5A981C897CFF4DE08:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14192037&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). clean_body: We want to hear from our readers on who they would like to see as our state's next governor! Take a quick moment to let us know your pick. | | "Shift Washington" | Friends, We wanted to send a big thank you to everyone who helped us meet our end-of-month fundraising goal! It is thanks to the generous contributions of people like you that we here at Shift WA can continue our work reporting and commenting on what is happening in our state - and holding the Democrats (and media) accountable. Since our launch a decade ago, we here at Shift WA have worked hard to inform our readers on what Governor Jay Inslee was doing to our state. From his extreme (and extremely expensive) green agenda, to his record-setting tax-and-spend schemes, to his years-long abuse of power during the pandemic, Gov. Inslee has damaged our state to an unprecedented extent. That's why his Monday announcement that he would not seek re-election comes as a major relief. So, in the spirit of placing a check on one-man rule in our state, we want to hear from our readers on who they would like to see as our state's next governor! Here are some of the names (in alphabetical order) that have been featured in the media since Inslee's long-awaited retirement announcement: 1. Semi Bird (R), Richland School Board 2. Bob Ferguson (D), Attorney General of WA 3. Hillary Franz (D), Public Lands Commissioner of WA 4. Raul Garcia (R), Doctor/Former Gubernatorial Candidate 5. Mark Mullet (D), State Senator (Issaquah) 6. Jim Walsh (R), State Representative (Aberdeen) 7. J.T. Wilcox (R), State Representative (Yelm) 8. Other (give us your pick!) Simply click on the link below and take a quick moment to let us know your choice. Thank you, The Shift WA Team P.S. To hear more about the newly open 2024 gubernatorial race, Shift WA co-founder Randy Pepple recently joined John Carlson to discuss Gov. Inslee's announcement and possible gubernatorial candidates in 2024\. You can take a listen . | | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can to do so. You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on & . When I wrapped up my internship, one of Nikki’s team members told me, “When you graduate, we might give you a call.” Fast forward… The call came and here we are! Before Nikki kicked off her campaign in February, she pulled the whole staff together and told us, “This is a family. I will take care of you.” And she meant it. A presidential campaign as my first “big girl” job is no easy task, but knowing that Nikki takes care of her people made the jump less scary. I not only work for Nikki, but I wholeheartedly support Nikki Haley for President because she’s a class act conservative who will take care of the American people, just like she takes care of her team. name: Kash Patel
subject: I hope this isn’t too personal
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zp838pmoagck7k9iqi5k6mmc3l8botug4fof0eh0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gm1ob5clh2bs)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg2f2vtt700h01jbir9j6ii2mbbcah3bgdpjdcco_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gm1ob5clh2bs)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zenp8eunase6ghb5fbcbpsec9grmclpa1kc152o0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gm1ob5clh2bs)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing.

**Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below.**

[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z23rteo7bimid0og7dktaqti75pa463qf9pqeh0o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gm1ob5clh2bs)
[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgt535jn2tnu3vhqeglbck0hpmgq6ade57lsp040_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gm1ob5clh2bs)
[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4h15qfvtva7kv485u2sfdeu7oj2aolf4kv4q1t8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gm1ob5clh2bs)
[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs1ke4o372klce1ftq20m3i2dmnb7costl58tbag_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gm1ob5clh2bs)
[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z88hnr9tbhtieutp49uajtd4ku37vmkhchpgfpug_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gm1ob5clh2bs)
[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb1c0ermu665er0bajmv5f43fhu12blii9nndcfg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gm1ob5clh2bs)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlf4rmsqm26g2p4fmvofmtg2ngbsc1ksc104o5so_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gm1ob5clh2bs)
[Donate $2,500 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z53qk40g3gbnnu147f9jlae77jimtnrpr7d4hfjo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gm1ob5clh2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zteh18ga19m4qqqh1usmmardo9g02k833jknv0b8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gm1ob5clh2bs)

Thank you,

Kash Patel

**P.S. The radical left cannot destroy our reputations with the media like they used to. Now, they are assisted by the two-tier justice system. A legal foundation is needed to help America-first patriots with these struggles.**

I refuse to watch this sham of justice, but I need your help defending whistleblowers and America-first patriots.

[Will you help me raise $45,000 before the end of the week to support the Kash Foundation? Click here to send $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvl50derjp0jm0mjh212rh938dbuu46ch368tgl0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1gm1ob5clh2bs)

We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing. Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below. Thank you, Kash Patel P.S. The radical left cannot destroy our reputations with the media like they used to. Now, they are assisted by the two-tier justice system. A legal foundation is needed to help America-first patriots with these struggles. I refuse to watch this sham of justice, but I need your help defending whistleblowers and America-first patriots. The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Deroy Murdock 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: I see dead people.... voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Over 19,000
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dBO-IBlpcvS5aNK31T5TMownRaMjoBu3J4jowVhypefc7IObAUIvH1aOKxSAnbj0IHRVRUSaF-gUi0VcMzH_-IRFY-bF8vX91qQ6hC7CUFKcUBDPuOgQPbenJ5zZ-baycb343P2mCwRX5XGHtlhjLhvEsrHg5jcEKP3G26gELGA=&c=1SfIZC3XXhgdcncFXvpLV8-lGt8FxhSagE2GYqyl09sJH_dzyu7iqg==&ch=yq8hc433lFUmvbo9hxNTg4_gppLWUya90HdiFADqXGGcJyo6Jkythw==)
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
We have a crisis on our hands. Something bigger than all of us! If we don't come together to clean up our voter rolls, then the very future of America is at stake. My name is Amanda Chase, and I don't just talk the talk; I walk the walk! I am the State Senator for VA-12. I have taken election integrity down the Senate Floor over and over again because it is THE most important issue facing America today! If we don't clean up our state, then no one will. That is why I decided to become THE election integrity candidate. There are very few politicians out there willing to take on election integrity. That is because if you are willing, to tell the truth about what is going on with our elections, the media will just drag you as some crazy conspiracy theorist. Well, guess what? The media doesn't control me, and the woke mob certainly doesn't control me! I will keep being YOUR election integrity candidate because our country depends on it. The Democrats have already cheated once. Do you think they won't do it again? I've learned through being a Senator that when power is at stake, there's nothing the swamp won't do to maintain power. That is why I have spent my career railing against the swamp. [The second we let them control the narrative, they've already won. I won't give up the high ground as a true and tested patriot. That is why I NEED you to rush over the largest contribution you can afford today!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dBO-IBlpcvS5aNK31T5TMownRaMjoBu3J4jowVhypefc7IObAUIvH1aOKxSAnbj0IHRVRUSaF-gUi0VcMzH_-IRFY-bF8vX91qQ6hC7CUFKcUBDPuOgQPbenJ5zZ-baycb343P2mCwRX5XGHtlhjLhvEsrHg5jcEKP3G26gELGA=&c=1SfIZC3XXhgdcncFXvpLV8-lGt8FxhSagE2GYqyl09sJH_dzyu7iqg==&ch=yq8hc433lFUmvbo9hxNTg4_gppLWUya90HdiFADqXGGcJyo6Jkythw==)
[-> Donate $15 to Join My Election Integrity Team <-](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dBO-IBlpcvS5aNK31T5TMownRaMjoBu3J4jowVhypefc7IObAUIvH1aOKxSAnbj0IHRVRUSaF-gUi0VcMzH_-IRFY-bF8vX91qQ6hC7CUFKcUBDPuOgQPbenJ5zZ-baycb343P2mCwRX5XGHtlhjLhvEsrHg5jcEKP3G26gELGA=&c=1SfIZC3XXhgdcncFXvpLV8-lGt8FxhSagE2GYqyl09sJH_dzyu7iqg==&ch=yq8hc433lFUmvbo9hxNTg4_gppLWUya90HdiFADqXGGcJyo6Jkythw==) [-> Donate Any Amount<-](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dBO-IBlpcvS5aNK31T5TMownRaMjoBu3J4jowVhypefc7IObAUIvH1aOKxSAnbj0IHRVRUSaF-gUi0VcMzH_-IRFY-bF8vX91qQ6hC7CUFKcUBDPuOgQPbenJ5zZ-baycb343P2mCwRX5XGHtlhjLhvEsrHg5jcEKP3G26gELGA=&c=1SfIZC3XXhgdcncFXvpLV8-lGt8FxhSagE2GYqyl09sJH_dzyu7iqg==&ch=yq8hc433lFUmvbo9hxNTg4_gppLWUya90HdiFADqXGGcJyo6Jkythw==) Unfortunately, I have some bad news to share. Things are much worse in Virginia than I expected. This "Just the News" headline says it all:
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dBO-IBlpcvS5aNK31T5TMownRaMjoBu3J4jowVhypefc7IObAUIvH1aOKxSAnbj0IHRVRUSaF-gUi0VcMzH_-IRFY-bF8vX91qQ6hC7CUFKcUBDPuOgQPbenJ5zZ-baycb343P2mCwRX5XGHtlhjLhvEsrHg5jcEKP3G26gELGA=&c=1SfIZC3XXhgdcncFXvpLV8-lGt8FxhSagE2GYqyl09sJH_dzyu7iqg==&ch=yq8hc433lFUmvbo9hxNTg4_gppLWUya90HdiFADqXGGcJyo6Jkythw==)
---
| What do you even say to something like this? There were a lot of races in Virginia that came within 19,000 votes. That is enough votes to sway an election and those of just the ones they found. When I stood on the Senate Floor and said this was the biggest threat to Democracy, I wasn't kidding. But here's the good news, we have had some wins on election integrity in Virginia. I worked with Jason Miyares to start our Election Integrity Task Force, and now that we know there are risks in our system, we can fix them. But fixing errors this big takes time, and this is too important of a fight to give up on. It is going to take a lot of man-hours and work to remove everyone who has died or moved from the voter rolls. Believe me when I say this is no easy task. If the Democrats win in November, they will ensure this work is never completed. That's why it's imperative you support my race today! Our future is at stake, and I won't let the Democrats exploit the Commonwealth! I know Patriots like you want to see things like this taken care of. That is why I know you will support my race. You have seen me putting in the work in Virginia to prioritize election integrity, and I'm not going to stop. [You can help ensure I keep doing the Lord's work and that we make America a freer and more prosperous nation. Donate $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000, or more today to bring election integrity to America! ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dBO-IBlpcvS5aNK31T5TMownRaMjoBu3J4jowVhypefc7IObAUIvH1aOKxSAnbj0IHRVRUSaF-gUi0VcMzH_-IRFY-bF8vX91qQ6hC7CUFKcUBDPuOgQPbenJ5zZ-baycb343P2mCwRX5XGHtlhjLhvEsrHg5jcEKP3G26gELGA=&c=1SfIZC3XXhgdcncFXvpLV8-lGt8FxhSagE2GYqyl09sJH_dzyu7iqg==&ch=yq8hc433lFUmvbo9hxNTg4_gppLWUya90HdiFADqXGGcJyo6Jkythw==)
Patriots like you have never let me down before, and I know you won't start now after this HUGE news!
---
|
---
| Amanda Chase
Member, Senate of Virginia
Business owner
Wife and Mother

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A very personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor
in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.

Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going
to stand for that.

Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and
the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs
to name just two.

Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I
worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in
Congress.

The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht,
the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving
relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an
America that lives up to its ideals.

As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned
growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.

I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re
going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18943?t=1001&akid=3200%2E346206%2El-sbvS ]Can you please split a $25 contribution between Charles Booker and my
United States Senate campaign today? I would not ask if this was not so
important.

CHIP IN →

The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to
sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do
yet, either.

Thank you, and adiós,

Ruben

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230502-3200-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3200_346206_l-sbvS&akid=3200%2E346206%2El-sbvS

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3200%2E346206%2El-sbvS

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Can I get a minute of your time?
body:
Your input is so crucial.

| |
---
| | Friend,

We haven’t received your _**Stand for America Survey**_ response yet, so we wanted to reach out. Can you add your response now? You can do this by **[taking the survey online to register your views instantly.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666591%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P5j7xQMifFB2osBl1rUwWQ&sysid=1 "taking the Survey online
to register your views instantly.")**

It’s important that my team hears from loyal friends like YOU.

Your input is so crucial. I want to know what your priorities are so I can make sure your voice is heard.

Our government is out of control, many Americans’ concerns are ignored, our borders are wide open, and crime is rampant.**We must change course and save our country’s future. **

So please, friend, fill out your Stand for America Survey, ensuring your voice is represented in my campaign.

**[Or, to make an immediate impact, take the survey online right now, and consider making an important gift of $10, $25, $30 or more to support me in this fight.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666592%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=scTKLo6cTmZW4VSO18jSYQ&sysid=1 "Or, to make an immediate
impact, take the Stand for America Survey online right now, and then consider
making a gift of $10, $25, $30 or more to support me in this fight.")**

---
My very best,

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666593%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l0USbYbLLPueXEt8oW3z%2bw&sysid=1)
---
Nikki Haley
---

P.S. I’ve never lost a campaign in my life. Because I’ve ALWAYS run campaigns guided by grassroots conservatives like you. My message must _speak for YOU._

That’s how we’ll win the White House. And that’s how we’ll save America from socialism. **[So please answer our Stand for America Survey, and when you do, please include your best gift of $10, $25, $30 or more.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666594%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CHpicnR2hsYTPPHkR3Otdg&sysid=1 "So please answer our Stand
for America Survey, and when you do, please include your best presidential
campaign gift of $10, $25, $30 or more.") **God bless!

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Good news from Colorado
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
New legislation in Colorado will create an opportunity for victims to seek fair justice in court when they are harmed by illegal conduct by the corporate gun industry.
#

Team -
We wanted to share some good news that came out of Colorado last week. The state legislature signed **The Jessi Redfield Ghawi Act for Gun Violence Victims’ Access to Justice and Firearms Industry Accountability** into law.
We are proud to have been a part of getting this law passed. It will repeal Colorado’s extreme, anti-victim gun industry immunity law and create an opportunity for victims to seek fair justice in court when they are harmed by illegal conduct by the corporate gun industry.
This law is named after Jessi Redfield Ghawi, who was killed during the 2012 shooting at an Aurora, Colorado movie theater. Her parents Sandy and Lonnie brought a lawsuit seeking improved safety practices and $0 in compensation from the companies that sold thousands of rounds of ammunition, body armor, and other products to their daughter’s killer—no questions asked.
But after one motion, the court ruled that Colorado law prohibited victims like them from bringing suit against the firearm industry and ordered them to pay over $200,000 in fees to those very same companies.
No family should face punishment or bankruptcy for seeking fair justice and accountability in court, and we’re glad that the Colorado legislature recognized this last week.
Thank you for supporting GIFFORDS. We couldn’t pass critical legislation like Jessi’s Law without your support.
Sincerely,
The team at GIFFORDS
* * *

**GIFFORDS PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws.**
[**Please consider making a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today so we can continue our work to get more commonsense gun safety legislation like Jessi’s Law passed in every state across our nation.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230502-1-15&t=1&akid=5383%2E3935704%2Ec_hCMB)
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230502-1-15&t=2&akid=5383%2E3935704%2Ec_hCMB)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=5383%2E3935704%2Ec_hCMB) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
