name: Vance Press Team
subject: Hillbilly on the Hill | May 2, 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=43c7e40367af45bca76c47ab01fbe18e&_e=rAAwzNbG61xaj-pMKmiyLP7KCMy-ydPIK39N-FqT6Mi8sM4Mwgl-kfSeDUqvgT1-7DOvBiPSiU6sRWR60eZk42PspkoBhySXLFpYIWEhOWez5xNsIMj6f3islHVPTtMsWYp710PlBWMJ_7FkAzEPsfw2dxqRGB4CCApL1x9u0Z6nUxAVusiCHbk4UXsdjxsO)
---
What another busy month it's been for Senator JD Vance!

Thank you for joining us for another _Hillbilly on the Hill_ edition! Every month, we round up the best headlines and news articles summarizing Senator Vance's last couple weeks.

Can't wait for you to hear all about how Senator Vance is working for all of Ohio! [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=43c7e40367af45bca76c47ab01fbe18e&_e=rAAwzNbG61xaj-pMKmiyLAOUO76G27_fFqHBnf1SnGNfpf37ToGLxq3rI8jOdi9CZZSqb1X042KvgVJJ1OX5d-XN44p-KINtox3hXgCkQaCSML-eFwUvAi15XYP_FxVXTzHmPOieBJK42ErWzsyFJ8ivxLoJ5e5GMUqYWsHaIJ9A23rCTr5beVfQ-8B9KAF-SviQ118eH0erCA_Xxm6XNV8uLlIhGF_RmFihNWT8YdbVfzdIXbYBaSt5XLtpuiskf2F_Kx9ks46NJ-ncsjod6-j8z5K0w0QSLd4iKEjUN1g%3D) **' SO FAR, SO GOOD WITH SEN, JD VANCE'** (**[Crain's Cleveland Business](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=43c7e40367af45bca76c47ab01fbe18e&_e=rAAwzNbG61xaj-pMKmiyLAOUO76G27_fFqHBnf1SnGNfpf37ToGLxq3rI8jOdi9CZZSqb1X042KvgVJJ1OX5d-XN44p-KINtox3hXgCkQaCSML-eFwUvAi15XYP_FxVXCUfvgLlsSIC-9nG_g0kEqhcCa-BnZMIbJdrrs6wMHEuQNJuZx-pFy-JdOnWoUS441c2xpdQABn6QazgWv_dhvVfWS9waCMVy9XL0irn9wuT9n2KUGeoPvBBWjUljajEQOS9MojM1mvgz-3sK6qUSZTBIiDXjYXsC_eTJWhjQ7Ic%3D)**) -- The arbitrary but enduring 100-day mark of assessing accomplishment in the political world arrived last week for Ohio's new U.S. senator, JD Vance.

Our early takeaway: There are signs he will be an effective advocate for Ohio...

We're encouraged, for instance, by the role he has played in the wake of the Norfolk Southern train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio, working with his Democratic colleague, Sen. Sherrod Brown, to introduce the Railway Safety Act of 2023, which would make overdue updates to the nation's freight rail safety and maintenance...

Vance has done his part, both in terms of producing serious legislation and in visiting East Palestine to advocate for local residents and to continue to call attention to ecological damage stemming from the derailment.

A lot of politicians just demagogued this issue. It speaks well of Vance that he has worked to try to make needed reforms happen...

Read _Crain 's_ full editorial **[here](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=43c7e40367af45bca76c47ab01fbe18e&_e=rAAwzNbG61xaj-pMKmiyLAOUO76G27_fFqHBnf1SnGNfpf37ToGLxq3rI8jOdi9CZZSqb1X042KvgVJJ1OX5d-XN44p-KINtox3hXgCkQaCSML-eFwUvAi15XYP_FxVXck_Qo7e60mskZQPn8nREFWFD91tgmgH58Q2rJulvHX7L_GI238rDLlHNoXooChQXQxurJN7YEPfmXyHvfMZzbgmWXbHWdyA_4Elct-0Y1gcfzCIZfsbboQcCPIxe2uzXnrgPrh9PiZBqJCse3x7ne_Cm9FP09ZsWI_OSGHXeRpY%3D)**. [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=43c7e40367af45bca76c47ab01fbe18e&_e=rAAwzNbG61xaj-pMKmiyLAlaV2q3slhHYLuVvIfpFyyffq8Q_r5-jOC5G1fccGosZwvXk85v9K8xxGkBzNiJ0JnM-eVYcG7fUs_bYNUSfs3bnscFpdfnKLKIGM8TFGxP3yS2oSbhlyZ1XF6bJcF6YjxZ9AGHflB35X6RQr4NLVToTIBmLG_W_H8TpU88Xsax4cc2kTxGGa063MxVJoarApNeqLXaDV5Nv4JZcX_XO5ywSIdkQISFyVC_8jwAU3pAsuNLRMDxUe7TzygStllzLRmoCrCHo5_K8TzKhF45VUoXwheg0CCIAXoCrM_Z2lOmxemQe-_sV-kWw5BOzcWo6A%3D%3D) **' HE'S WILLING TO WORK ACROSS THE AISLE AND ISN'T RELUCTANT TO STAND UP TO CORPORATE LOBBIES'** (**[Cincinnati Enquirer](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=43c7e40367af45bca76c47ab01fbe18e&_e=rAAwzNbG61xaj-pMKmiyLAlaV2q3slhHYLuVvIfpFyyffq8Q_r5-jOC5G1fccGosZwvXk85v9K8xxGkBzNiJ0JnM-eVYcG7fUs_bYNUSfs3bnscFpdfnKLKIGM8TFGxP3yS2oSbhlyZ1XF6bJcF6YjxZ9AGHflB35X6RQr4NLVToTIBmLG_W_H8TpU88XsaxjPXLlURe_OR1P8XAaX0cERQN1DD15oH917dzzJyFFHG_JhgDIYnJL4eIYkwALUoYETNqIpumeWulFUlgnstAUUAiWusMk7qkWyX78UqHxz6bNsOcu5wsE60tKT-xzGL0vDXxD8koIT-BwHlVf5hINg%3D%3D)**) - The toxic train derailment in eastern Ohio forced J.D. Vance to get his Senate career on track quickly...

Vance first went to the community of fewer than 5,000 people on the Pennsylvania border Feb. 16, returned the next week with former President Donald Trump, and was back in March. East Palestine seemed familiar to the native of Middletown, with similarities such as Appalachian people like those he grew up with, working-class feel, and railroad tracks in residential and commercial areas...

He was sharply critical of the Joe Biden administration response, suggesting at one point that East Palestine was "too white, too rural and too conservative" to draw its attention. However, the Republican freshman soon found himself working in unison with the liberal Democrat Sherrod Brown, a third-term senator who was holding elective office a decade before Vance, 38, was born.

...he has shown he's willing to work across the aisle and isn't reluctant to stand up to corporate lobbies...

"If you're not a jerk, if you try to get to know people and understand where they're coming from, there are definitely ways you can work with people," said Vance, who marked his 100th day in office April 13.

Read the full _Enquirer_ column **[here.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=43c7e40367af45bca76c47ab01fbe18e&_e=rAAwzNbG61xaj-pMKmiyLAlaV2q3slhHYLuVvIfpFyyffq8Q_r5-jOC5G1fccGosZwvXk85v9K8xxGkBzNiJ0JnM-eVYcG7fUs_bYNUSfs3bnscFpdfnKLKIGM8TFGxP3yS2oSbhlyZ1XF6bJcF6YjxZ9AGHflB35X6RQr4NLVToTIBmLG_W_H8TpU88XsaxB4iqk8wCXAycu-G2zzyxdPux_eN-Yb0vzRGmzPQVoEqhRuDLx_o4PRgkYMmAVRMCn0-eXSHGEtB7b3Qt2PJu_zqOyV6CbZA3TJPN9OpKawy42R8-VVKBpC1fFs-pwt3FiL9RVN37JRaqk4nyDLAoaw%3D%3D)** [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=43c7e40367af45bca76c47ab01fbe18e&_e=rAAwzNbG61xaj-pMKmiyLLC7_0alSqWHbm_0gF-OKaf0YpsJZ15H2TEQXo-cG5Mt2cYfCWljbOu-soGOAV1G4FNZ5RDS8oN9sdGfHyCWdS0UsoYaxQ-BguVPVXNsd6u_KZXz0QqH4QBDgtBgVhbRd1ek6wkjRIxsoDSx4YJJ77Kbt2Sr7OpySpUEjORx_PEZnhRI_qxE5MVctqw9TtE2Qyr_1xlDutkglHm6p0My-wkXY0N_tXw9Ngs5kwwG5R2ktTDQG0jbUHuElxvsb_Hqq4H8QQChWUGYmpBlXA_ZQLA%3D)
[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=43c7e40367af45bca76c47ab01fbe18e&_e=rAAwzNbG61xaj-pMKmiyLLC7_0alSqWHbm_0gF-OKaf0YpsJZ15H2TEQXo-cG5Mt2cYfCWljbOu-soGOAV1G4FNZ5RDS8oN9sdGfHyCWdS0UsoYaxQ-BguVPVXNsd6u_KZXz0QqH4QBDgtBgVhbRd9MzCWXC-WD281lCAgIjCZfZwnDWD_y9nP_O7IWIm2UilFUF2ijcscm_mV9g026uKgc1_YQCYmpCYt2wGWvEw2ABv8wrVaC1-27ZGOFN9WmG0gVSuWLUJU-qJibwNc94JWLy0DLKPaFAD3g7Q6aCdQA%3D) **' WE HAVE THIS INCREDIBLE AMOUNT OF TALENT IN OUR YOUNG PEOPLE'** (**[Spectrum News](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=43c7e40367af45bca76c47ab01fbe18e&_e=rAAwzNbG61xaj-pMKmiyLLC7_0alSqWHbm_0gF-OKaf0YpsJZ15H2TEQXo-cG5Mt2cYfCWljbOu-soGOAV1G4FNZ5RDS8oN9sdGfHyCWdS0UsoYaxQ-BguVPVXNsd6u_KZXz0QqH4QBDgtBgVhbRdz0AZ6K-m7tmDJ-pC0D0iCsB_f31V4WQLZK0eX0-oBftAqFLOTRYtDZ4xfDV0fSXtQqAEj05gwPDhPtW4cdGXi67aBR3RQ4IsniIzSpywkETssX-joD_jcZohANw7cFI0jqIBa_pc3UjuatJT3PLjv0%3D)**) -- U.S. Senator JD Vance paid a special visit today to a career tech school in Southwest Ohio.

He toured all parts of the campus, including the culinary arts, electrical trades, auto technician programs. Staff were excited to have him on campus and showcase all that they have to offer. Senator Vance said he was impressed with not only the facility but the work of the students as well.

"We have this incredible amount of talent in our young people and this school is figuring out innovative ways of marshaling that talent and getting these kids the skills that they need so that they can succeed in the future," he said.

clean_body: | What another busy month it's been for Senator JD Vance! Thank you for joining us for another Hillbilly on the Hill edition! Every month, we round up the best headlines and news articles summarizing Senator Vance's last couple weeks. Can't wait for you to hear all about how Senator Vance is working for all of Ohio! ' SO FAR, SO GOOD WITH SEN, JD VANCE' () -- The arbitrary but enduring 100-day mark of assessing accomplishment in the political world arrived last week for Ohio's new U.S. senator, JD Vance. Our early takeaway: There are signs he will be an effective advocate for Ohio... We're encouraged, for instance, by the role he has played in the wake of the Norfolk Southern train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio, working with his Democratic colleague, Sen. Sherrod Brown, to introduce the Railway Safety Act of 2023, which would make overdue updates to the nation's freight rail safety and maintenance... Vance has done his part, both in terms of producing serious legislation and in visiting East Palestine to advocate for local residents and to continue to call attention to ecological damage stemming from the derailment. A lot of politicians just demagogued this issue. It speaks well of Vance that he has worked to try to make needed reforms happen... Read Crain 's full editorial . ' HE'S WILLING TO WORK ACROSS THE AISLE AND ISN'T RELUCTANT TO STAND UP TO CORPORATE LOBBIES' () - The toxic train derailment in eastern Ohio forced J.D. Vance to get his Senate career on track quickly... Vance first went to the community of fewer than 5,000 people on the Pennsylvania border Feb. 16, returned the next week with former President Donald Trump, and was back in March. East Palestine seemed familiar to the native of Middletown, with similarities such as Appalachian people like those he grew up with, working-class feel, and railroad tracks in residential and commercial areas... He was sharply critical of the Joe Biden administration response, suggesting at one point that East Palestine was "too white, too rural and too conservative" to draw its attention. However, the Republican freshman soon found himself working in unison with the liberal Democrat Sherrod Brown, a third-term senator who was holding elective office a decade before Vance, 38, was born. ...he has shown he's willing to work across the aisle and isn't reluctant to stand up to corporate lobbies... "If you're not a jerk, if you try to get to know people and understand where they're coming from, there are definitely ways you can work with people," said Vance, who marked his 100th day in office April 13. Read the full Enquirer column ' WE HAVE THIS INCREDIBLE AMOUNT OF TALENT IN OUR YOUNG PEOPLE' () -- U.S. Senator JD Vance paid a special visit today to a career tech school in Southwest Ohio. He toured all parts of the campus, including the culinary arts, electrical trades, auto technician programs. Staff were excited to have him on campus and showcase all that they have to offer. Senator Vance said he was impressed with not only the facility but the work of the students as well. "We have this incredible amount of talent in our young people and this school is figuring out innovative ways of marshaling that talent and getting these kids the skills that they need so that they can succeed in the future," he said. Watch Spectrum 's full interview with Senator Vance . ' WRIGHT-PATT IS A GREAT ECONOMIC ASSET FOR US'() -- Ohio Senator JD Vance visited Wright-Patterson Air Force Base on Monday, in order to speak with leaders of the intelligence committee in the United States Air Force, and Space Force. When Vance spoke to the media on Monday afternoon, he said that he had a very good, yet very sobering visit at Wright-Patt... "Obviously you know Wright-Patt is a great economic asset for us here in southwestern Ohio. We want to make sure that we continue to have a well staffed and well supported Wright-Patterson Air Force Base, and I think we continue to make sure that we do that," said Vance. Watch Dayton 24/7 Now 's Full interview with Senator Vance . ' WHILE THE RADICAL LEFT CONTINUES THEIR OBSESSION WITH HARASSAING DONALD TRUMP, THE AMERICAN PEOPLE ARE SUFFERING'() -- Today's indictment of President Trump is political persecution masquerading as law. Donald Trump is the former President of the United States, the leader of our nation's political opposition, and the presumptive Republican nominee in 2024. Alvin Bragg's decision to indict him is blatant election interference and a direct assault on the tens of millions of Americans who support him. To make matters worse, this entire charade is predicated on an unprecedented, doomed-to-fail legal theory and a baseless misdemeanor charge from seven years ago. While the radical left continues their obsession with harassing Donald Trump, the American people are suffering. Families are struggling to put food on the table, violent crime is running rampant in our cities, and thousands have been poisoned by the fentanyl pouring across our southern border. Instead of working to improve the lives of the Americans they are supposed to represent, the ruling party is focused on kneecapping their greatest threat in the next election. The American people will see this for exactly what it is: a grave miscarriage of justice. Read Senator Vance's entire statement ' WE DO NOT MAKE ENOUGH IN THE UNITED STATES' () - Senator JD Vance joined Fox & Friends to discuss America's weakness in manufacturing. ' WE'VE GOT TO PROVIDE BETTER RAIL SAFETY IN THIS COUNTRY' () -- Ohio Senator JD Vance expressed concern over the long-term health effects from the East Palestine train derailment and says he is working with several federal agencies to make sure that East Palestine is safe. Long-term, Vance is also working on the Railway Safety Act of 2023. The bill needs to get marked up in the committee. Vance and Senator Sherrod Brown introduced the bill back in March. "We've got to provide better rail safety in this country," Vance said. "We can't have these terrible train crashes where we don't notify the firefighters about what's in these trains, you have to install more safety detectors to make the train crashes less likely. Really some common sense stuff." Senator Vance is hopeful the markup hearing will happen next month and that the Senate will vote on the bill by June. Watch WKBN 's full interview with Senator Vance . ' ENSURE THE GREAT LAKES ARE PROTECTED NOT JUST TODAY, BUT FOR GENERATIONS TO COME' () -- Newly elected Sen. J.D. Vance of Ohio earlier this year said that he will do all he can "to ensure the Great Lakes are protected not just today, but for generations to come." He's also agreed to co-chair the Senate Great Lakes Task Force. Sen. Vance's predecessor, Sen. Rob Portman, was known for his bipartisan approach and strong support for the Great Lakes. We hope that Sen. Vance is on the way to following in his footsteps as a Great Lakes champion. Read Cleveland.com 's full editorial . ' ENGLISH IS THE OFFICIAL LANGUAGE OF THIS COUNTRY' () -- U.S. Sen. JD Vance, an Ohio Republican, is introducing legislation that would establish English as the official language of the United States, taking up a cause that Republicans have repeatedly pursued without success in past Congresses... "This commonsense legislation recognizes an inherent truth: English is the language of this country," Vance's statement said. "The English language has been a cornerstone of American culture for over 250 years. It is far past time for Congress to codify its place into law, which is exactly what this bill does." Read Lima News ' full article . Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. | Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. JD Vance for Senate Inc., 1391 W 5th Avenue, Suite 314, Columbus, OH 43212 Copyright (C) 2023 JD Vance for US Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: A Donald Trump yes-man running against me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi, friend, it’s Sen. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean all work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you.
I’m running for reelection so I can keep fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. As the only remaining statewide Democrat in Ohio, analysts at CNN say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me.
The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio – so please, I’m personally asking: Will you give $20 or more right now – split between my campaign and Serve America – to help defend this battleground seat and keep the Senate blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-sherrod]
I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American.
But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and NBC News reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”
The long and short of it is, I can’t win – and Democrats simply can’t hold onto our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots support from folks like you.
That’s why I’m asking for your support today, friend: Please, will you chip in $20 or more now – split between my campaign and Serve America – so we can win in Ohio and defend the Senate? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-sherrod]
With gratitude,
Sherrod Brown

CNN should not be giving this known liar and con artist a platform to spew his vitriol and lies. We need to speak up and demand CNN cancel this event and refuse to let Trump on air. name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: COVID Death Certificates
body:
my interview with Jordan B Peterson | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/certificates?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

My [interview with Dr. Jordan B Peterson](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=dc3f3c849a&e=9828080a05) has garnered nearly 1 Million views on YouTube. This critical conversation around health freedom, my treatment by the [Board of Medical Practice](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=4e85dbf66e&e=9828080a05), and the current state of healthcare is resonating. One clip I wanted to point you to was centered around how COVID-19 death certificates were counted. Please click the thumbnail below and take 10 minutes to [watch it](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=ae7d25cd13&e=9828080a05):
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=97deeb05d2&e=9828080a05)
---
| It is so critical for us to remember the horrendous policies our leaders forced on us, because bad actors like [Randi Weingarten](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=7b901fc375&e=9828080a05) (head of the teachers union) and [Anthony Fauci](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=4074b01b7c&e=9828080a05) try to rewrite history about the role they played in harming our children and our elderly population.

Our current economic situation is due in large part to the fact that we printed and [s](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=e5dd0dac67&e=9828080a05)[pent more money on COVID-19](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=b0eba2d8bc&e=9828080a05)[ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=57f2352994&e=9828080a05)than we did on World War II (even adjusted for inflation). Our children have fallen behind because of the heavy handedness of unnecessary school closures and the [teachers unions](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=36b6439593&e=9828080a05) not letting schools reopen - despite the science telling us it was safe. Thank God this has opened the door faster to school choice across the country! Mask mandates, vaccine mandates, and forceful decrees dominated our society (the Biden administration is now [quietly dropping their vaccine mandates](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=f400aa0151&e=9828080a05) for federal employees, by the way).

My point is this: much of our social, economic, and educational cohesion was torn apart because of the leaders who let politics (not science) dictate their course of action. Suicides, depression, and general hopelessness continue to rise. That's, in part, why I'm so committed to pursuing this [lawsuit against Keith Ellison and the Minnesota Board of Medical Practice](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=4e9cd745e6&e=9828080a05). Those who operate under a licensure, and had their careers threatened or destroyed based on political opinions, need vindication and a new free speech precedent going forward. This is one small part I will use my voice to lead on. Justice must be served.

We cannot forget what's been done to us, our businesses, and our children. As we move forward with solutions and political accountability, we must remember what these bad actors in [Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Big Government](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=8794b925c1&e=9828080a05) tried to do us. We've been played, but we won't be played again.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor

clean_body: my interview with Jordan B Peterson | | | | | | | Peter, My has garnered nearly 1 Million views on YouTube. This critical conversation around health freedom, my treatment by the , and the current state of healthcare is resonating. One clip I wanted to point you to was centered around how COVID-19 death certificates were counted. Please click the thumbnail below and take 10 minutes to : | | It is so critical for us to remember the horrendous policies our leaders forced on us, because bad actors like (head of the teachers union) and try to rewrite history about the role they played in harming our children and our elderly population. Our current economic situation is due in large part to the fact that we printed and we did on World War II (even adjusted for inflation). Our children have fallen behind because of the heavy handedness of unnecessary school closures and the not letting schools reopen - despite the science telling us it was safe. Thank God this has opened the door faster to school choice across the country! Mask mandates, vaccine mandates, and forceful decrees dominated our society (the Biden administration is now for federal employees, by the way). My point is this: much of our social, economic, and educational cohesion was torn apart because of the leaders who let politics (not science) dictate their course of action. Suicides, depression, and general hopelessness continue to rise. That's, in part, why I'm so committed to pursuing this . Those who operate under a licensure, and had their careers threatened or destroyed based on political opinions, need vindication and a new free speech precedent going forward. This is one small part I will use my voice to lead on. Justice must be served. We cannot forget what's been done to us, our businesses, and our children. As we move forward with solutions and political accountability, we must remember what these bad actors in tried to do us. We've been played, but we won't be played again. name: Fair Courts America
subject: The victims he’s created
body:
We won’t stand silent as these victims and their families suffer.| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1c2bfae96d4746299edbbb9b352d4ee5&_e=eRfKrLSwvondpp31UMKVlrI3QXtb3KazvjG9uB8T4wEke0QxV95Np1Xp8NBshyEVj8bjUzbUJZX4r7ExzfHWHGifM2WCEGJVCBlFCSZVyE2bfTrlHpcxPgNcuNh0Px_kVean3kOLaqbCa3msTU6gyOR7zy70ssui0w1q_vF_e-wSb0UfpakYBwuP1HGcerLsgjv8cR0c_r2O-Y9oiYoTx2w1vvptXG_Xn5gVeTo_2keUVWZejLe9z4H0OxURIn0yPy8ycKqZRTIToGyPFOVzWXCmAJqy_ZFxILDEkcUILHAOVOW7quZ6vvEbx7NwWWvJ-PwV0la7meL-AM7ZSKTE8JUsfr2oL9r2e4w9pKeF-3Ofzhr99Vae3IjiwJPxQCyLzEfT1jZGzAIY5zeCUB8osw%3D%3D)
---
Peter, George Soros and his band of lawless prosecutors and DAs have caused a crime wave with a trail of victims across the country. Here are their stories: _**When you think of Alvin Bragg, think of Hason Correa.**_ Hason Correa was a 35-year-old veteran with a wife and three kids. He was an incredible young man, but then he was randomly jumped and stabbed to death by four siblings outside his apartment building. His family was denied proper justice thanks to George Soros-funded prosecutor Alvin Bragg. Bragg made plea deals with all four offenders, letting one go free with only time served. To this day, his mother has never stopped fighting for justice. **_[< < HELP US DEFEAT PROSECUTORS LIKE ALVIN BRAGG >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1c2bfae96d4746299edbbb9b352d4ee5&_e=eRfKrLSwvondpp31UMKVlrI3QXtb3KazvjG9uB8T4wEke0QxV95Np1Xp8NBshyEVj8bjUzbUJZX4r7ExzfHWHGifM2WCEGJVCBlFCSZVyE2bfTrlHpcxPgNcuNh0Px_kVean3kOLaqbCa3msTU6gyOR7zy70ssui0w1q_vF_e-wSb0UfpakYBwuP1HGcerLsgjv8cR0c_r2O-Y9oiYoTx2w1vvptXG_Xn5gVeTo_2keUVWZejLe9z4H0OxURIn0y-_Gi0NqS6hVQzUaZA-VzoNE8QphEUZWGwEr-w8W9d0z-rxczh2FG-oejsYNPeTESn2KtD4vS6Am3p1M5Q7Yqdo76AF2OBMxUzlPP5sB1KTxVcg8GO0raovmIjALeqRXmNj7oQW7anDpA759RD-gSFw%3D%3D)_** _**When you think of Kim Gardner, think of Janae Edmondson.**_ Janae Edmondson was a star volleyball player from Tennessee who was visiting St. Louis, Missouri, for a volleyball tournament earlier this year. While returning to her hotel, Janae was struck by a car barreling toward her. As a result, she lost both her legs. That driver should have never been on the streets that night; he should have been in jail for prior charges. But, thanks to St. Louis DA Kim Gardner, who received more than $100,000 from Soros-backed groups, he was out free. **_[< < HELP US DEFEAT PROSECUTORS LIKE KIM GARDNER >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1c2bfae96d4746299edbbb9b352d4ee5&_e=eRfKrLSwvondpp31UMKVlrI3QXtb3KazvjG9uB8T4wEke0QxV95Np1Xp8NBshyEVj8bjUzbUJZX4r7ExzfHWHGifM2WCEGJVCBlFCSZVyE2bfTrlHpcxPgNcuNh0Px_kVean3kOLaqbCa3msTU6gyOR7zy70ssui0w1q_vF_e-wSb0UfpakYBwuP1HGcerLsgjv8cR0c_r2O-Y9oiYoTx2w1vvptXG_Xn5gVeTo_2keUVWZejLe9z4H0OxURIn0yB2XcbABaMYuJ_lzi3WMm_5YADM3qQg7bBYZHzbGdHuNuCb7bta2kvOBIMM9smrZnLPt86mdqTTAJ7MKhOe-vD7McL3xdDFRxk-Zu72B8clHatuABP4e86UKwM_TaPdBe0mrz92YvSBd5UiXJhFPwlg%3D%3D)_** **When you think of Steve Descano, think of Michelle Huntley.** Michelle Huntley was a 63-year-old woman seeking shelter at a Fairfax County, Virginia, bus stop. Then, a man approached her and senselessly beat her to death. Steve Descano, the local Soros-funded DA, is responsible for putting the alleged offender back on the street. The alleged assailant was arrested and charged just months before for assault and battery, but Descano's office let him go with a slap on the wrist and a small fee. **_[< < HELP US DEFEAT PROSECUTORS LIKE STEVE DESCANO >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1c2bfae96d4746299edbbb9b352d4ee5&_e=eRfKrLSwvondpp31UMKVlrI3QXtb3KazvjG9uB8T4wEke0QxV95Np1Xp8NBshyEVj8bjUzbUJZX4r7ExzfHWHGifM2WCEGJVCBlFCSZVyE2bfTrlHpcxPgNcuNh0Px_kVean3kOLaqbCa3msTU6gyOR7zy70ssui0w1q_vF_e-wSb0UfpakYBwuP1HGcerLsgjv8cR0c_r2O-Y9oiYoTx2w1vvptXG_Xn5gVeTo_2keUVWZejLe9z4H0OxURIn0y29B-MEYbuOg5EhKa5jY_-mxUWRMhRMT67wlo-m0ly5CZPXz8eZ9cnJedqpUbyqgJiIxmiVnysc2YFAOjRKe_wH7gLptpjf-3iW7FirXU-0eUanQQ8lYsncYH4Q5nyV46TxqLI7O4C_XrLFuJYwsARQ%3D%3D)_** Rising crime rates are horrible statistics, but the victims behind these crimes AREN'T statistics. They are fathers, mothers, sisters, and brothers. They are our friends, family, and neighbors, and we must take a stand for them. And it starts with removing radical prosecutors from office. Fair Courts America is the only organization taking a direct stand against George Soros’ prosecutors. We are taking him on **head-to-head** and **dollar-for-dollar** , but we can't do it without the support of patriots like yourself. **Peter, please contribute to the Stop George Soros Fund here: **
---
[**STOP SOROS FUND**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1c2bfae96d4746299edbbb9b352d4ee5&_e=eRfKrLSwvondpp31UMKVlrI3QXtb3KazvjG9uB8T4wEke0QxV95Np1Xp8NBshyEVj8bjUzbUJZX4r7ExzfHWHGifM2WCEGJVCBlFCSZVyE2bfTrlHpcxPgNcuNh0Px_kVean3kOLaqbCa3msTU6gyOR7zy70ssui0w1q_vF_e-wSb0UfpakYBwuP1HGcerLsgjv8cR0c_r2O-Y9oiYoTx2w1vvptXG_Xn5gVeTo_2keUVWZejLe9z4H0OxURIn0y87KUOBv7smptZEmfjG-p_coaCxVCmdbfxy_7UnCDUNbHPPo0GM2msVT7NZcdSPyPl1SnodYwHFPFWHMRvR-cSlPBCs2d5pj7rvVcXw5jHZzKQ2WLfU_JWJX5xLhnxzN3zXcLS_9MgcJ3z3lPR5ez7Q%3D%3D)
---
In justice, Fair Courts America

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=58102c589c934766ba21dd2f9a21a79c&_e=oKuQKaXLe9fikKHQqds5ZqNKVUcz0nAUo-CD2SRMZz7b-pOyncRTYZIM8x5HLWu2CSSn13OffieWFYxhcMEXdxBCej99LdiroT_DlVfnLTQG9ZkgIyUtjysYrTXMtU9rM_LfRcu7AiURYq2gqLPwF4c-TRG_WuwtTZ3hu3HPdPuylIr3mZSPpDqo12MHNi7Iil79LYzeKRRCkdKYgQp0fBUctAIftMgyqdtVrMT4oXR5TWc-Yo5XKzURsDxFedwGeTB3SYlT6QOY4mAY9a_AJnz2tbjXkjOYa2ZVEl4DZN2I0DsXQFDAzCD8NfY62Ww7uL1tqaGYw7-B1ocffBmFKP7xn6SgmAzYxcBvFSMWQ51Rq3-uzkwsYdeQ37ObtJp_37jtMLHCBYYAOSIB2n45ylcGjw0eWoA6HByTepbzDtc%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
We might not be able to guarantee another Macarena dance party, but when you donate to the DNC today, we can promise that you’ll be automatically entered to win a trip to witness the 2024 Democratic National Convention firsthand. | |
---
Derek, do you remember the last time the Democratic National Convention was hosted in Chicago? The year was 1996. The first Nintendo 64 gaming console had just been released. _ER, Friends,_ and _Seinfeld_ topped the TV ratings. And the hit song of the summer -- and the convention -- was Los del Rio’s “Macarena.” It didn’t take long for politicians, delegates, attendees, and volunteers alike to break out in song and dance. **Don’t believe us? Just take a look:**
[](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJUl5eZEyRBJUYTz1wW8h3cfbAe4bSWpGeyxqfEnPlvAKOcVb36FFe2J76NGT_zB3L_-N0w-7ACWizZcJV5DGIPZdXySGAPn4w0ixu9vZuf480abWA55JD4BnWC_R5upgGxVim1mZDp_I7KjbvWf68qPyYo75x18ambl2W4tLxJhfxTwe9heKwA5shrMmLL5mzi_e1m__L1yfulgOqPpZaBdAPDGMzv8Zmo-n19m_ZiJBIPUgIe-gORkAfJMZn9iQTHupGg_r-RurFCSyzBQPB61-f7Fu4iqsahvx1WoaDz6jRkEG0WXwNgDazRsE4knYd0MFjjeiAVCw7nLxd3UTO0Xg-8bZHN1nA4D35npokCyrOAQod0He0OpOfMoe1NIcJmM9_M_GgSqd9fQdqwYYDZqYgZjYy5nNuQygS7lcEXI-Aly4YBjmSHwzHbAiH2bVWWQUFSA7mZFn2R2FP0M3U15X70Nt1xPjQcIknQ3RVMM8c4kUBfHqdGsABqWfL9CNABFYAcuJHWqoG0LKyvBOA2yZfvG9_ZFoyzNBfH5Pk4jQ/3vu/yB2OvbKUT2a3dICSpm0ayQ/h0/MnxVwxiWkXBvo530EA3E1nzrslMqBGRorYNAM7kZ0-Q)

clean_body: We might not be able to guarantee another Macarena dance party, but when you donate to the DNC today, we can promise that you’ll be automatically entered to win a trip to witness the 2024 Democratic National Convention firsthand. | | Derek, do you remember the last time the Democratic National Convention was hosted in Chicago? The year was 1996. The first Nintendo 64 gaming console had just been released. ER, Friends, and Seinfeld topped the TV ratings. And the hit song of the summer -- and the convention -- was Los del Rio’s “Macarena.” It didn’t take long for politicians, delegates, attendees, and volunteers alike to break out in song and dance. Don’t believe us? Just take a look: Now, we might not be able to guarantee another Macarena dance party...but when you donate to the DNC today, we can promise that you’ll be automatically entered to win a trip for you (and a friend!) to witness the 2024 Democratic National Convention firsthand. Chip in $7 for your chance to win. Democratic National Conventions are not just about politics, but are also moments of joy and celebration. They’re powerful demonstrations of the strength and unity of our party, and we couldn’t be more excited to invite you to join us, Derek. Don’t wait, Derek -- this is an opportunity you won’t want to miss! name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhv545u57pjiv4gbpul089al1orjbh6ukuh779g0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1im4oj4cth2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1ett4hvrf5jptulj0u6ls57ej6mnjli9r3b165g_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1im4oj4cth2bs)
---
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh2m8u1kcoqp6ov1kgamlr92fimr0dr7t275jvn0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1im4oj4cth2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4pqdb1fcuccat7r3qkhmd5a7cbntu7krd2j3p1o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1im4oj4cth2bs)
---
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsh0mprstsnmsu3svoln4emag0m2qeb1gh4isd1o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1im4oj4cth2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3cmer0vttffcj24rgl0ej49jvpt7hlm2p0v30uo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1im4oj4cth2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbd5dgqqcrcful0m2oqvnuds72g3bnqusbv6gec8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1im4oj4cth2bs)
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
We knew hitting this goal wouldn’t be easy [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62671616/404189220/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzc4N2YwNC1mYWU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y9YZAuM2bMA53Uq2fGR_5E3L94MFH2tGufdvz6A0Yd4=&emci=662f4f91-29e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d3787f04-fae8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Last month, we set an ambitious end-of-month fundraising goal to build another winning campaign capable of withstanding anything that national Republicans and my opponents throw my way.

We knew hitting this goal wouldn’t be easy, but thanks to your support, **we reached our goal!**

The race is on, and the opposition will stop at nothing to reclaim this seat and grow their narrow House majority. We have a tough fight ahead of us, but I know that with your support, we can protect this seat and reclaim the House majority in 2024.

Thank you once again,

Kim

| Peter,

We can’t afford to wait.

This year alone, Republicans have already introduced legislation to make firearms more accessible.

→ **Lawmakers in Tennessee proposed bills to arm teachers and allow college students to carry weapons on campus.**

→ **In several Republican-led states like Texas and Ohio, lawmakers have pushed to remove background checks and roll back red-flag laws.**

→ **And in Florida, Republican Governor Ron Desantis signed off on a bill to allow permitless carry.**

body:
The opening act for Josh Hawley’s first “Manhood” book tour stop vs. his record on veterans
#
Peter,
Josh Hawley’s new book “Manhood” is coming out on May 16th — and at the first stop of his book tour over the weekend, this was the warm-up act the night before:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31948?refcode=em20230502-3070&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3070%2E614464%2Ec8ztV0)
Hawley might be a fan of playing toy soldier... but when it comes to actually standing up for the real people who put themselves in danger for our country, he’s already proved that he’s a fraud and a coward.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31948?refcode=em20230502-3070&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3070%2E614464%2Ec8ztV0)
**I’m the 13-year Marine veteran and Democrat running to replace Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat – and I need your help to get it done.[So Peter, will you add a donation of any amount to my campaign right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31948?refcode=em20230502-3070&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3070%2E614464%2Ec8ztV0)**

clean_body: The opening act for Josh Hawley’s first “Manhood” book tour stop vs. his record on veterans Peter, Josh Hawley’s new book “Manhood” is coming out on May 16th — and at the first stop of his book tour over the weekend, this was the warm-up act the night before: Hawley might be a fan of playing toy soldier... but when it comes to actually standing up for the real people who put themselves in danger for our country, he’s already proved that he’s a fraud and a coward. I’m the 13-year Marine veteran and Democrat running to replace Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat – and I need your help to get it done. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: It’s about time Missourians had a real warrior for working people standing up for them in the U.S. Senate — and I’m ready to serve. Thanks for all your support, Lucas | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This isn’t the email we planned to send today, but after reviewing our
April fundraising numbers, it’s the message we need to send you today.

We fell short of our April fundraising goal by $7,205. Our fundraising has
been on a slow but steady decline since January 2021, so we can’t afford
to miss a single goal that we set.

Imagine Congress without AOC, Cori Bush, Summer Lee, or Jamaal Bowman
championing progressive causes. We recruited each of these transformative
leaders to run for Congress.

We will never scare you into donating like the DCCC. You shouldn’t kiss
all hope goodbye and the sky is not falling.

But we will politely ask: [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134247?refcode=em20230502-28757&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28757%2E1203867%2E_qb9su ]Will you make
your first
contribution of $3 right now to help us make up for this

Democrats’ work!

As a grassroots-funded organization, every single contribution we receive

-Justice Democrats

Georgia Republicans currently control the state House, state Senate, and governorship, meaning they’ve been able to pass restrictive voting laws that have closed polling places, made lines longer, and hurt Democrats' chances at victory.
Not only that but after working to overturn President Biden’s decisive victory in key battleground states, we know that national Republicans are hellbent on making it harder to vote across the country.
**This could spell disaster for Democrats at every level of the ballot – from the state house to the White House – and we need a strong response to stop the GOP in their tracks _right now_ and prevent them from doing any more damage to our democracy. **
[We know we ask a lot of you, but the Georgia election is fast-approaching, and your donation makes an incredible impact. clean_body: Georgia was critical to President Biden’s victory in 2020 and it will be crucial to winning again in 2024. That’s why state Dems need to be in the strongest position possible and WIN later this month. | | | | | There’s a must-win special election in Georgia in just two weeks. Georgia was critical to President Biden’s victory in 2020 and it will be crucial to winning again in 2024. That’s why state Dems need to be in the strongest position possible to protect President Biden’s electoral path to victory. It starts with winning this month’s special election. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Georgia Republicans currently control the state House, state Senate, and governorship, meaning they’ve been able to pass restrictive voting laws that have closed polling places, made lines longer, and hurt Democrats' chances at victory. Not only that but after working to overturn President Biden’s decisive victory in key battleground states, we know that national Republicans are hellbent on making it harder to vote across the country. This could spell disaster for Democrats at every level of the ballot – from the state house to the White House – and we need a strong response to stop the GOP in their tracks right now and prevent them from doing any more damage to our democracy. Your support means the world. Thanks for all that you do. name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Poll: 2nd Amendment Under Attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Help us stop Biden and the anti-gun Left from taking away our fundamental rights.
| [](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=f3fc763fe77f4c44a4553fd4e43a509c&_e=IFU-VGI6I6Mknj7ggW3kCfCbueLHgiH6QYVa01mTAjO-WsgH5oHyVMD01bgf0nMxLhY4tFJlgXk3M2QhiaqGjjQJoo0ak-n9hm-WaajJEYnCEx2Itjlw0G640N83ByJrXmUg5_K_W5i-KC13j9bNGeuf_5ZAkVJ4CJcEEAzIqlc9mDSKBsbUETWb6w0tV1Wf61eXyqnHopvQaAnfT9O4UhPVAZoQM2my4Z7PbSkr7WnRbd5vImuWpXmF2GmounWGr7ozERglwzVrAS-M9r-xKzoe4DIJP3-gUS2DI9Zv23Kjo2fVIb4KFimqDNDs01jq1VvZ4G9B6OynTWOg2DyI2akDa4pueQTP89nNVxbnUZLrUXTTRQUwIS4QqgiGO5J08I9cUfiQ_wMNllFFDaRkxnbZRsuA2ZT2sCVTIyktW7vU_bB0RI_Bjgi9JPQvsZXSMDFEDFXI0YgCvetgCMwS8Q%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
It’s time to say the quiet part out loud.
---
**The radical Left’s “gun control” agenda is not about safety but about eradicating YOUR constitutional rights for a completely unarmed America.**
---
_Compromising our fundamental rights will not keep citizens safer._
---
That’s why we’ve been working long and hard to preserve and protect the 2nd Amendment against Biden and the radical Left’s attacks.
---
While we secured one win with the Judiciary Committee’s repeal of the unconstitutional ban on pistol braces, this fight is far from over.
---
That’s why I had my team commission this poll to hear from you about these relentless attacks against the 2nd Amendment.
---
**[Please take our official 2nd Amendment Poll to let us know your thoughts on the Left’s attack on your constitutional right.](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=f3fc763fe77f4c44a4553fd4e43a509c&_e=IFU-VGI6I6Mknj7ggW3kCfCbueLHgiH6QYVa01mTAjO-WsgH5oHyVMD01bgf0nMxLhY4tFJlgXk3M2QhiaqGjjQJoo0ak-n9hm-WaajJEYnCEx2Itjlw0G640N83ByJrXmUg5_K_W5i-KC13j9bNGeuf_5ZAkVJ4CJcEEAzIqlc9mDSKBsbUETWb6w0tV1Wf61eXyqnHopvQaAnfT9O4UhPVAZoQM2my4Z7PbSkr7WnRbd5vImuWpXmF2GmounWGr7ozERglwzVrAS-M9r-xKzoe4DIJP3-gUS2DI9Zv23Kjo2fVIb4KFimqDNDs01jqyr6G1jUHxj6-w63hCaTWHYTixnljyCyStQKY0do-lWxdPD8-AXu0fQloxRRC99CzotCNCkzAhMy1di82BltwIY4GxNO_XfIrCAbBlsmb0F_E5_WnydA2RbKqmYmf0goS9I-CAltrLoDGrOeeo2OCHw%3D%3D)**
---

[](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=f3fc763fe77f4c44a4553fd4e43a509c&_e=IFU-VGI6I6Mknj7ggW3kCfCbueLHgiH6QYVa01mTAjO-WsgH5oHyVMD01bgf0nMxLhY4tFJlgXk3M2QhiaqGjjQJoo0ak-n9hm-WaajJEYnCEx2Itjlw0G640N83ByJrXmUg5_K_W5i-KC13j9bNGeuf_5ZAkVJ4CJcEEAzIqlc9mDSKBsbUETWb6w0tV1Wf61eXyqnHopvQaAnfT9O4UhPVAZoQM2my4Z7PbSkr7WnRbd5vImuWpXmF2GmounWGr7ozERglwzVrAS-M9r-xKzoe4DIJP3-gUS2DI9Zv23Kjo2fVIb4KFimqDNDs01jqDQO9vtRtrc3SPH3WOox8A2yBTpXC6ceHi3-QMHdqlEvKACxs95SG24-M_1x_I3sr8KqZBe0UIAhqp14f7QqJ0rcnD5zqaoHcDeLXMovi1iHFy9APZnGz3NaGZRGKYOWoD5i0zwKtOEymGe9F7FcO3A%3D%3D)
---

[TAKE THE POLL >>](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=f3fc763fe77f4c44a4553fd4e43a509c&_e=IFU-VGI6I6Mknj7ggW3kCfCbueLHgiH6QYVa01mTAjO-WsgH5oHyVMD01bgf0nMxLhY4tFJlgXk3M2QhiaqGjjQJoo0ak-n9hm-WaajJEYnCEx2Itjlw0G640N83ByJrXmUg5_K_W5i-KC13j9bNGeuf_5ZAkVJ4CJcEEAzIqlc9mDSKBsbUETWb6w0tV1Wf61eXyqnHopvQaAnfT9O4UhPVAZoQM2my4Z7PbSkr7WnRbd5vImuWpXmF2GmounWGr7ozERglwzVrAS-M9r-xKzoe4DIJP3-gUS2DI9Zv23Kjo2fVIb4KFimqDNDs01jqBSpFi-K5GxG1NkzBQ_JeKkXQBMz_JQRd5vy52rbkJb_qfEXecSJixDf8Afm_P5X_GFthZLVp0MSdZYJ_1htJu4LXTNgmqtbUQXLfh6UaZYKNDeeYxnX6NONsQ9sqBC8Mg9Uz79N7VNygCdyAx0tyHw%3D%3D)
---

The Left has been chipping away at our rights for years.
---
When they are unable to repeal the 2nd Amendment, they then call on unelected bureaucrats to issue regulations that will ban firearms and make law-abiding citizens felons overnight.
---
_This is unacceptable and un-American._
---
There’s a reason crime and violence statistics are up, and it’s not the lack of “gun control laws.”
---
**It’s a result of the Left chipping away at our core values over the years.**
---
_A Wall Street Journal survey came out and confirmed the decline of American values such as patriotism, religion, having children, and community._
---
_But the guns haven’t changed, Society has changed drastically and for the worst._
---
And as Democrat-run cities and DAs prioritize criminals over victims and law-abiding citizens, our core values will continue to diminish.
---
_The answer to lowering crime and violence is not by taking away guns from law-abiding citizens, but to remember our core American values._
---
After days of listening to the Left talk about guns, it’s clear they have no idea what they are talking about.
---
_The Left can’t tell the difference between a man and a woman, so I’m not surprised they don’t know the difference between gun calibers._
---
But the lack of knowledge and experience proves they are in no position to be enforcing unconstitutional “gun control” laws onto law-abiding citizens like YOU.
---
**[So please, take our official 2nd Amendment Poll to let us know your thoughts on the Left’s attack on your constitutional right.](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=f3fc763fe77f4c44a4553fd4e43a509c&_e=IFU-VGI6I6Mknj7ggW3kCfCbueLHgiH6QYVa01mTAjO-WsgH5oHyVMD01bgf0nMxLhY4tFJlgXk3M2QhiaqGjjQJoo0ak-n9hm-WaajJEYnCEx2Itjlw0G640N83ByJrXmUg5_K_W5i-KC13j9bNGeuf_5ZAkVJ4CJcEEAzIqlc9mDSKBsbUETWb6w0tV1Wf61eXyqnHopvQaAnfT9O4UhPVAZoQM2my4Z7PbSkr7WnRbd5vImuWpXmF2GmounWGr7ozERglwzVrAS-M9r-xKzoe4DIJP3-gUS2DI9Zv23Kjo2fVIb4KFimqDNDs01jqEde_Y0YlJH9wMjXQ1h0HUWvzEWIt1jln4cfuvdbQPCLkw5MFXZ6JBPnyPGgG0au7G65MGXNLGqT9B_r93_UlokVvzXJ0HEGwUkuup5OcgSbBMZgUr3adqt1koyr6f6riJ0edAvw2H-X6Goz5X5O82A%3D%3D) **
---
Thank you,

clean_body: Help us stop Biden and the anti-gun Left from taking away our fundamental rights. | Friend, It’s time to say the quiet part out loud. The radical Left’s “gun control” agenda is not about safety but about eradicating YOUR constitutional rights for a completely unarmed America. Compromising our fundamental rights will not keep citizens safer. That’s why we’ve been working long and hard to preserve and protect the 2nd Amendment against Biden and the radical Left’s attacks. While we secured one win with the Judiciary Committee’s repeal of the unconstitutional ban on pistol braces, this fight is far from over. That’s why I had my team commission this poll to hear from you about these relentless attacks against the 2nd Amendment. The Left has been chipping away at our rights for years. When they are unable to repeal the 2nd Amendment, they then call on unelected bureaucrats to issue regulations that will ban firearms and make law-abiding citizens felons overnight. This is unacceptable and un-American. There’s a reason crime and violence statistics are up, and it’s not the lack of “gun control laws.” It’s a result of the Left chipping away at our core values over the years. A Wall Street Journal survey came out and confirmed the decline of American values such as patriotism, religion, having children, and community. But the guns haven’t changed, Society has changed drastically and for the worst. And as Democrat-run cities and DAs prioritize criminals over victims and law-abiding citizens, our core values will continue to diminish. The answer to lowering crime and violence is not by taking away guns from law-abiding citizens, but to remember our core American values. After days of listening to the Left talk about guns, it’s clear they have no idea what they are talking about. The Left can’t tell the difference between a man and a woman, so I’m not surprised they don’t know the difference between gun calibers. But the lack of knowledge and experience proves they are in no position to be enforcing unconstitutional “gun control” laws onto law-abiding citizens like YOU. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Congressman (TX-38) U.S. Army Captain 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. body:

body:
I am Mark Levin's Choice for Kentucky Governor
| | | [](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/08aa46297ba4c936/0b47896b4f6f4d9dc3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
| | Friend, Did you hear? **_Conservative_** **_champion Mark Levin endorsed my campaign for Governor of Kentucky! _**
---
[**CHIP IN FOR LEVIN'S PERSONAL PICK**](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/08aa46297ba4c936/f37cd1ec6b5dc392c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---

name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: let me know, please?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Peter, sorry to bother you again, but this can't wait:

A few days ago, I reached out to this team of fearless fighters to join me in urging Congress to PROTECT Social Security – and the initial response from this team was incredible.

Peter, clearly, protecting Social Security is an issue that resonates with a lot of folks – especially the 3.7 million New Yorkers who receive payments from the program every month. That's why I decided to re-open my petition to garner another 5,000 signatures to make sure our voices are heard loud and clear.

So please, before 11:59 p.m. tonight, will you take a second to sign my petition and urge Congress to protect Social Security? Here's the best link:

https://petitions.signforgood.com/LJ4NY23-social-security-0323?code=jtk1058-su-text&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-social-security-0323%3F

TELL CONGRESS: PROTECT SOCIAL SECURITY >>

Thank you for your help here.

Letitia James

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Letitia James
Date: Tues, Mar 21, 2023
Subject: This move would harm nearly 3.7 million New Yorkers

Social Security is a lifeline for MILLIONS.

That’s why I am asking you to add your name now to urge Congress to protect Social Security!

Add Your Name

https://petitions.signforgood.com/LJ4NY23-social-security-0323?code=jtk1058-su-text&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-social-security-0323%3F

Peter, this is urgent: Extremist Republicans have announced a plan that would open Social Security up to SEVERE cuts – a move that would harm the nearly 67 million Americans who receive Social Security checks every month – including more than 3.7 million New Yorkers.

Here’s everything you need to know about the latest developments in our fight to protect Social Security:

FIRST, Republicans across the country began to put Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security on the chopping block.

THEN, in a heated exchange during the State of the Union, President Biden got Republican lawmakers to agree NOT to touch Social Security benefits in the next round of budget cuts.

NOW, I’m calling on 5,000 fearless fighters to join me in urging Congress to stay true to their word and protect Social Security.

I’ll be honest, Peter: I’ve seen Republican lawmakers go back on their word dozens of times. But, with nearly 3.7 MILLION New Yorkers currently depending on Social Security benefits, we CANNOT let them go back on their word.

This isn’t about politics. This is about real people who could fall into poverty if Republicans gut Social Security. So I have to ask: Will you sign my petition now to urge Congress to protect Social Security? I need to collect 5,000 signatures before 11:59 p.m. tonight.

SIGN THE PETITION

https://petitions.signforgood.com/LJ4NY23-social-security-0323?code=jtk1058-su-text&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-social-security-0323%3F

Thank you for standing with me.

Letitia

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Kirsten
subject: one year since the Dobbs decision leaked
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, one year ago today, Politico published a draft of the Supreme Court decision that would overturn _Roe v. Wade._
Since the Dobbs decision came down, states have passed dozens of increasingly extreme laws to ban abortions with no exceptions. In Texas, they've made it a **first-degree felony.** In Idaho, they've **banned interstate travel** to seek abortion care.

In the Senate, right-wing extremists have previously introduced a national ban. And now, there's a far-right campaign to ban access to the most commonly used abortion pill nationwide.
I can still remember the anger and fear that filled the days following the leak. **We knew that this ruling would trigger a wave of increasingly extreme laws restricting our reproductive freedoms. But what we didn't know was how Americans like you would rise to this moment. **
You got off the sidelines. You spoke out. You chipped in. You signed petitions. You organized. And on November 8, 2022, you defended our Senate majority, driving off a red wave and protecting reproductive rights up and down the ballot.
I know that we face tough challenges and a long road to victory. But as long as people like you refuse to ever give up, we _will_ win this fight. **That's why I'm asking 50,000 Democrats to add their names before midnight tonight to support reproductive rights.** **[_Please, friend, will you add your name now? I'm counting on people like you to recommit to this fight as we head into another tough election cycle._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62687156/404249520/2082464928?code=jtk4123-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjI0YmI1NC0yNWU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGdrbhixZEytPgTZhiFL37pyoWKlvGR3kdGWb2Dva1I=&emci=6a5695bd-6ae8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=2f24bb54-25e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

Kirsten

clean_body: | | | Friend, one year ago today, Politico published a draft of the Supreme Court decision that would overturn Roe v. Wade. Since the Dobbs decision came down, states have passed dozens of increasingly extreme laws to ban abortions with no exceptions. In Texas, they've made it a first-degree felony. In Idaho, they've banned interstate travel to seek abortion care. In the Senate, right-wing extremists have previously introduced a national ban. And now, there's a far-right campaign to ban access to the most commonly used abortion pill nationwide. I can still remember the anger and fear that filled the days following the leak. We knew that this ruling would trigger a wave of increasingly extreme laws restricting our reproductive freedoms. But what we didn't know was how Americans like you would rise to this moment. You got off the sidelines. You spoke out. You chipped in. You signed petitions. You organized. And on November 8, 2022, you defended our Senate majority, driving off a red wave and protecting reproductive rights up and down the ballot. I know that we face tough challenges and a long road to victory. But as long as people like you refuse to ever give up, we will win this fight. That's why I'm asking 50,000 Democrats to add their names before midnight tonight to support reproductive rights. | | With gratitude and hope for the future, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. And more than a dozen other states are working through the legislative process to similarly protect their state investments, industries, and pensions from ESG.

clean_body: This group of states completely debunks the Left's narrative that conservative efforts to protect their investments and citizens from ESG have been unsuccessful.| | | | | Peter, we’re making serious progress in the fight against ESG. Kentucky , Utah, and Arkansas have all successfully enacted legislation to counter the threat of the Left's ESG movement. And more than a dozen other states are working through the legislative process to similarly protect their state investments, industries, and pensions from ESG. Heritage Action is proud to see many states using model legislation or incorporating recommendations from our organization, such as... Clarifying the fiduciary duty of asset managers. Forcing financial institutions to prioritize financial criteria over a political agenda. Divesting from pro-ESG asset managers like BlackRock. These states completely debunk the Left's narrative that conservative efforts to protect their investments and citizens from ESG have been unsuccessful. But many Americans still aren’t aware of the threat of ESG to their daily lives and retirements. Thank you,Jessica AndersonExecutive Director | Heritage Action | Heritage Action is proud to be the most effective grassroots conservative organization around. body:
What are your thoughts on the Biden-Baldwin disastrous duo?
| [](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=f0a7cab77017437480de1e0d8cd926ad&_e=P4DlYbIyRyrauiZyMVJz3DNKwO_ggvyK1qfDwFbypGxoEUIu1liSTycC_0dYXP9ZDkjPYwzhuFHlb-S3Q8hSX2FQ2yjWQybM5xF3f_hGP3K_oxTxARKp5A9v6ToK8k6TBCGIek3tHEK6r3ouYhU4s2M7TV3aO9Qj_c3FT9l4-PmRNOUGQCC5PAsjpsm6Ii73NWXGYzTsYkRnP7a5G6DLDGvbGZ6IdJD8xW41x12pwUFdUfKpzB-UGv5uZQdqrZzjoIplvldvrJTqcZgPo31dwUrzRWQbax_1Zunx0f8-lhB7r5tPWExgXvFH3IU8KMbk3qQm4b7OsbWx4D3xgEQNwmlGrdXU9CYKWEWEjrBKOKM%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Can you believe that one of the most unpopular Presidents and one of the most unpopular Senators are BOTH on the 2024 ticket?
---
_Both Joe Biden and Tammy Baldwin have approval ratings in the low 40s and a record full of failures yet have still entered the race for re-election._
---
It’s clear they don’t have any intention of listening to voters who are frustrated and struggling due to their radical agenda that has put Americans last at every turn.
---
_As we continue to fight for Republican wins up and down the ballot in Wisconsin, we wanted to hear directly from voters like YOU about how you feel about the Biden-Baldwin agenda._
---
[**Please take our Official Biden-Baldwin Approval Poll today so we can prove how unpopular these candidates and their agenda are among voters. >>**](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=f0a7cab77017437480de1e0d8cd926ad&_e=P4DlYbIyRyrauiZyMVJz3DNKwO_ggvyK1qfDwFbypGxoEUIu1liSTycC_0dYXP9ZDkjPYwzhuFHlb-S3Q8hSX2FQ2yjWQybM5xF3f_hGP3K_oxTxARKp5A9v6ToK8k6TBCGIek3tHEK6r3ouYhU4s2M7TV3aO9Qj_c3FT9l4-PmRNOUGQCC5PAsjpsm6Ii73NWXGYzTsYkRnP7a5G6DLDGy6M_fPvoyk9jyjYFeBjrakSwmI1ZCvf2J3J0UKMbGlGpyLRIwdOMa_Q0gC7nkdvX4zUYrCcNFa-wUX0Z9-mh2Fy3BDfjDBduBKPD_2LjQlunAg48AhSE1e1W79iP0OzaBR7v24wU5qZ2yFTiEDLMU%3D)
---

**_Official Biden-Baldwin Approval Poll_** **Respondent:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **Status:** [Pending] [**TAKE THE POLL**](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=f0a7cab77017437480de1e0d8cd926ad&_e=P4DlYbIyRyrauiZyMVJz3DNKwO_ggvyK1qfDwFbypGxoEUIu1liSTycC_0dYXP9ZDkjPYwzhuFHlb-S3Q8hSX2FQ2yjWQybM5xF3f_hGP3K_oxTxARKp5A9v6ToK8k6TBCGIek3tHEK6r3ouYhU4s2M7TV3aO9Qj_c3FT9l4-PmRNOUGQCC5PAsjpsm6Ii73NWXGYzTsYkRnP7a5G6DLDIeM07WnCr1PlDIQnw9gzR6tgPS5ThQNVz35Nl-MQYxudlHpGTgkiorzwoxvfifb4e4V7E0I95lmql-OArVHRdW0ermsa02hZYC7K__n5DSj0_0pP2dspPg6katnAIRbw9RyEvdrCkCxOO-JcgGfZ1o%3D)
---

Biden has said that “America is back.”
---
Well since he’s taken office we have gone back, back to one disaster after another.
---
* Wide-open borders leading to an uncontrollable fentanyl crisis
* Surging crime
* Record high inflation and cost of goods due to reckless spending
* Attacks on constitutional rights

---
Meanwhile, Baldwin is happy to tie herself to Biden’s failing agenda with a record of voting alongside him 95% of the time.
---
_Biden and Baldwin’s lies about the success of their radical agenda can’t change the facts._
---
Wisconsin families are struggling more and are worse off today than they were before Biden took office.
---
And by taking our flash poll, you can have your voice heard and can show the Left what voters think of this disastrous duo.
---
[**So please, take our Official Biden-Baldwin Approval Poll today so we can prove how unpopular these candidates and their agenda are among voters. >>**](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=f0a7cab77017437480de1e0d8cd926ad&_e=P4DlYbIyRyrauiZyMVJz3DNKwO_ggvyK1qfDwFbypGxoEUIu1liSTycC_0dYXP9ZDkjPYwzhuFHlb-S3Q8hSX2FQ2yjWQybM5xF3f_hGP3K_oxTxARKp5A9v6ToK8k6TBCGIek3tHEK6r3ouYhU4s2M7TV3aO9Qj_c3FT9l4-PmRNOUGQCC5PAsjpsm6Ii73NWXGYzTsYkRnP7a5G6DLDIe9dF0jGjNPL1ZwMk4RMMzMfUMJitdymQfzUAUfs5_Cj4HoQz9ezBgq_FnFYGcmxcPKYz5bG0h1BUnUH87zGpFbL4-C9qMSYds0VL7z3QLVj-6j2-nc4glPrbWqkF7EP9n3f_fAsP9WM_MQ4S5QOeU%3D)

subject: The day the fight changed

body:
|
---
| | Pro-choice. Period. → [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62676227/404207673/-56018745?sourceid=1049996&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWMyYzU2MC0wNWU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eO-5X4tEzPhuggIAPaR7lV5jHs0IxbWvjv0xIZM10ZQ=&emci=ac1d8d5a-05e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=81c2c560-05e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter, today marks one year since the news went public that the Supreme Court was poised to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and end the constitutional right to abortion in America.

Today, millions of Americans are less free. They have been denied the care they need, forced to cross state lines just to be seen, and even arrested for making health care decisions for themselves.

Republicans at the state and local level and in Congress continue to ignore their constituents, the American people, the vast majority of whom are pro-choice, in order to keep stripping away fundamental rights.

**Standing up and speaking out to elect the women who can stop these Republicans in their tracks is what we do at EMILYs List, and we need you.****[Will you add your name now to demand that Congress restore the right to abortion nationwide?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62676228/404207674/-56018745?sourceid=1049996&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWMyYzU2MC0wNWU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eO-5X4tEzPhuggIAPaR7lV5jHs0IxbWvjv0xIZM10ZQ=&emci=ac1d8d5a-05e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=81c2c560-05e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62676229/404207675/-56018745?sourceid=1049996&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWMyYzU2MC0wNWU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eO-5X4tEzPhuggIAPaR7lV5jHs0IxbWvjv0xIZM10ZQ=&emci=ac1d8d5a-05e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=81c2c560-05e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) _Deadline: 11:59 p.m. on May 2_ There are now 15 states where nearly all abortion is illegal. Idaho went further and made it illegal for minors to travel across state lines for abortion care. In just the past month, a federal judge in Texas attempted to overturn FDA approval of medication abortion, Gov. Ron DeSantis signed a six-week abortion ban into law in Florida, and North Dakota banned nearly all abortion.

**Make no mistake: The GOP will not stop until abortion rights are ripped away from every single one of us.**

Fighting back looks like electing Democratic pro-choice women everywhere, and we need supporters like you. [**Will you join EMILYs List in demanding that Congress restore reproductive freedom? Add your name before midnight tonight >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62676230/404207676/-56018745?sourceid=1049996&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWMyYzU2MC0wNWU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eO-5X4tEzPhuggIAPaR7lV5jHs0IxbWvjv0xIZM10ZQ=&emci=ac1d8d5a-05e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=81c2c560-05e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62676231/404207677/-56018745?sourceid=1049996&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWMyYzU2MC0wNWU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eO-5X4tEzPhuggIAPaR7lV5jHs0IxbWvjv0xIZM10ZQ=&emci=ac1d8d5a-05e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=81c2c560-05e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) _Deadline: 11:59 p.m. on May 2_ Thanks for supporting our pro-choice movement,

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: This campaign is run by grassroots leaders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I've said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It's run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$25.59**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=411aaaef047a4452b1301d8be1ff3190&_e=tJOskTqRVmROTNpo8syPW_eKFOVDP3z2rPvLRfoWV0tb1fa1u-4GLEkmUdTLOelE_UD8L01yaHJDcxuYBYMQf_pRCRC6E-yOEJQUeuF3J8wQN87lbtvoZsGdJGr51_A6-34XOYAbuE19jieV8MKmES_AsEVWqDPQY2s7oaVR_qPYpvBjpRFLF97IPRuRqxT4QbEONm31TdtXOK_nRrpON3AW38Ri-FhXSB5Syxorou3gCcCEaq1PitAJD5ubhmkuSuBj1E6bi-E14Uy_HdN-9yEO7BfFXIG-iLLIDtWHIhyuCUIDSQcmQOYkSVky5HfqX3hJDLjDUD9v8vIwgyRrOwpBM6b8B4jsY9bnCyAux4WegTHfUa5RliaHYYwwC_Mio-xOXHpT2W-YyvkKMnVndIfDj9Ctt2jTTMEsDIDtPiBfEFwBhMuSxPYDmumZJJqf)
That was our average donation in April, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
Our campaign is staying prepared.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62676483/404208903/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230502OHPrimary_abortion_SB_90DO_4_NG_TESTA_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGY1OWI1ZC0wNmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EvTHKvP10JoPiH5pWou0m0f609g31V5g1xtdksB57EI=) Ohio’s primary and special elections are today, Peter.

Ohio voters will head to the polls to select local, municipal, and school board candidates for the 2023 elections. **_I wanted to reach out to encourage you to cast your ballot, Peter._** These elections often have very low turnout, meaning your vote makes an even greater impact on shaping Ohio’s future.

[**_Polls are open from 6:30 am to 7:30 pm. You can find your polling place and more information about today’s election by clicking here ➡️_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62676484/404208904/-1848430369?refcode=EM_FR_230502OHPrimary_abortion_SB_90DO_4_NG_TESTA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGY1OWI1ZC0wNmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EvTHKvP10JoPiH5pWou0m0f609g31V5g1xtdksB57EI=&emci=4dd13f00-02e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=adf59b5d-06e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811)

Today’s election also has me reflecting on the people-powered campaign we built to win in 2022. Thanks to your support, my Democratic colleagues and I have been able to deliver for Ohioians with billions in federal funding through the Inflation Reduction Act and Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill, bringing jobs to Ohio families and uplifting our communities.

I’m so grateful to my grassroots backers for supporting my efforts to continue moving Ohio forward and finish the job in Congress in 2024. **But, Peter, Ohio is one of just a handful of states that will undergo redistricting this year.** That means I’m bound to get new constituents. I’ll need to get to know them ahead of election season in 2024, and to do that, I need to stay prepared.

[**_Will you chip in $5 to maintain the momentum of our grassroots movement? We can’t predict how my district will be redrawn, but I need to have the resources necessary to reach out to my new constituents when lines are finalized. I’m counting on my most loyal supporters to keep our people-powered campaign moving, Peter, and I know you’ll have my back._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62676489/404208936/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230502OHPrimary_abortion_SB_90DO_4_NG_TESTA_l2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGY1OWI1ZC0wNmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EvTHKvP10JoPiH5pWou0m0f609g31V5g1xtdksB57EI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62676490/404208966/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230502OHPrimary_abortion_SB_90DO_4_NG_TESTA_EL1&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGY1OWI1ZC0wNmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EvTHKvP10JoPiH5pWou0m0f609g31V5g1xtdksB57EI=)**

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We only have two options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

| |
---
| | |
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---
| | [OPTION 1](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfef31rabkeipjr3jcjg9g948gmp4jt1p3bukpp8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1im9ob2cph2bs)
---

**Option 2: We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all!**

---
| | [OPTION 2](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z43fk3q3sa9qb588g0iimgrtrobcrjpk2n4etvvo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1im9ob2cph2bs)
---

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsu67jr7pnbmr1r9t580ed0frj530onldg6upv6g_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1im9ob2cph2bs "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

---
| | [REJECT BIDEN'S AMNESTY PLAN](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6t81kikqtc99setn6b6k74djvai1qp8l6n8rfsg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1im9ob2cph2bs)
---

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze600k8qg9nqeqr56hb8g2g0j3i22d5nbn3h9r4o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c1im9ob2cph2bs)
---
Kevin McCarthy
Speaker of the House

---
