Peter,
**The rogue Biden regime has recently announced that 1,500 active-duty U.S troops will be sent to the southern border** in the coming days due to concerns that tens of thousands of illegal immigrants will surge into the country.

As someone who has been recognized as a True Reformer and received an A+ Rating for my position on immigration reform and border policy from NumbersUSA, I believe it's critical that we hold our elected officials accountable for their actions on this issue.

For those of you who may not be familiar with NumbersUSA, it's the nation's largest grassroots immigration-reduction organization, dedicated to educating policymakers and the public on immigration legislation and policies that affect all Americans.

---
My opponent, Corrupt Marcy Kaptur, has an F- Grade from NumbersUSA, indicating that she has consistently supported policies that have allowed excessive immigration numbers to indiscriminately enlarge the U.S. population, the labor force, and government costs, while neglecting the interests of Americans

I have made it a priority to support immigration policies that protect all Americans and ensure that present and future generations can enjoy a stabilizing U.S. population, high degree of individual liberty, mobility, and fiscal responsibility.

**We need leaders who will prioritize the needs of Americans and take a responsible approach to immigration and border policy. Select an option today to join Team Majewski in our fight to close the border.

As your representative, I will always put the interests of our community and our country first.

You have my word.

[600x300] [] Exclusive: Mexican Migrant Wanted for Murder of 5 Hondurans Deported 4 Times, Says Texas Sheriff [] Source: Breitbart [] Immigration officers deported the Mexican man wanted in connection to the alleged murder of five Honduran nationals on three occasions, according to the Texas sheriff leading the investigation. A multi-agency task force continues to search for Francisco Oropeza Perez-Torres in the deaths of five people who lived next door to him in a rural area of Cleveland, Texas. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] 2020-10-20 Seventy Percent of Illegal Aliens in Federal Prisons Convicted of Non-Immigration Crimes [] Source: Judicial Watch [] The U.S. government spent at least $162 million in 2019 to incarcerate tens of thousands of criminal illegal immigrants for committing crimes that include rape, murder, kidnapping and terrorism. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] 2023-01-06 ICE Arrests Double in 2022; Thousands with Multiple Convictions, Terrorists, Gang Members [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Arrests of illegal immigrants inside the United States nearly doubled last year over 2021 and tens of thousands had serious criminal histories that include multiple charges and convictions, according to a recently published Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) report. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] 2022-03-14 Fourth Deportation for Illegal Alien Wanted for Murder in Mexico, Arrested Thrice by U.S. Police [] Source: Judicial Watch [] How porous is the southern border? An illegal immigrant arrested three times by local police in the U.S. and wanted for murder in Mexico just got deported for the fourth time. Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, The 2024 Presidential Election is rapidly approaching, and the Republican Party needs YOUR help! The pundits had it all wrong in 2016: it was the VOTERS who decided the winner and that's how it will be in 2024 as well. Recent polls show that Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is emerging as a leading alternative to former President Donald Trump among GOP primary voters, and former UN Ambassador and South Carolina Governor Nikki Haley has also entered the race. It's crucial that we hear from YOU on who you support for President in 2024. |
## Official Republican 2024 Survey

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: JUDICIAL CORRUPTION UPDATE: A $1.6 Billion "Gift" Has Been Discovered That Was Used To Corrupt Republican Justices
body:
ongoing judicial corruption trainwreck
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7be92083-73a7-4a84-bdf6-fc4d6ce2160c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**_JUDICIAL CORRUPTION UPDATE: A $1.6 Billion "Gift" Has Been Discovered That Was Used To Corrupt Republican Justices_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1d5ad7e-be52-4af2-9764-71ec0256c1d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _I mean, you just can't make this up anymore. If it were a movie you wouldn't believe it. _ **_Another story's exposed that the corrupt, cretinous legion of extremist doom, the Federalist Society--organized a generation ago as a secretive cabal the Right likes to pretend exist on the Left--has used a $1.6B slush fund to pack our courts with lying, autocratic, corrupt Republicans in robes. _And doing it illegally.__** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf1db5b26-3ba3-4338-a8fc-f5da9692cded/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Wonder why Clarence Thomas goes on super-yacht trips with a billionaire who bought his mom a house with business before the Court? Why Gorsuch sold land to a partner at a corporate law firm with cases before him, reporting the sale, but not the buyer's name? Why "I like beer Senator" Kavanaugh, skated on scores of sexual harassment/assault accusations with NO REAL Senate Judiciary Committee or FBI investigation?_ **_Because they're owned by the wealthy, Federalist-Society cabal. It's to rich, corrupt corporate law firms what the NRA is to rich, corrupt gun pushers. Yep, this Court (and some lower ones) is irredeemable, creating a democratic crisis, unless you want voting rights only for white male landowners, the right to own a bazooka, the Handmaid's Tale becoming 100% reality & legalization of Putin's right to donate to Republicans. If you think I'm exaggerating, I am..But not by as much as you think. _** [**_The ONLY answer is to expand the Court & bring justice to these Justices. Will you join Blue Amp in this fight, taking back the Supreme Court from these contemptible zealots, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Demand Justice?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td26cdae2-9c47-4771-b683-d3091f6178a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for knowing when to stand up and fight for the very basis of our democracy._ Cliff
---
|

---

|

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8598d0bb-a436-4e9f-9449-1cf26646493e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: folks thought we couldn’t win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
It's nearly summertime and unfortunately, my campaign is still paying down the bills we accrued to win in November.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62678117/404215398/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk2268-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWYxNTBjZC0wYWU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gLM7HRje8SKo2WqT1-bH_xrohZTC1O88vwfF98QUVdo=)
---
Hi there – it's nearly summertime and unfortunately, my campaign is still paying down the bills we accrued to win in November.

You see, in the days before Election Day, pundits moved our race to a toss-up, and I was getting calls from other Senators concerned that we couldn’t win.

Polls were tightening and the GOP was shoveling money into New Hampshire to defeat us.

We had to take on debt to fund our response. The good news is that it worked, and we won.

Those outstanding bills make emails like this one extremely important.
If we’re going to pay it down according to schedule, I need 21 people to donate to this email. I hope that I can count on you to be one of them. [**Folks like you typically give about $3, but I’d be grateful for any amount you can manage.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62678119/404215400/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2268-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWYxNTBjZC0wYWU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gLM7HRje8SKo2WqT1-bH_xrohZTC1O88vwfF98QUVdo=)
Thanks so much. With our fundraising numbers made public each quarter, we can’t afford to fall short.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: It's nearly summertime and unfortunately, my campaign is still paying down the bills we accrued to win in November. | | | = Hi there – it's nearly summertime and unfortunately, my campaign is still paying down the bills we accrued to win in November. You see, in the days before Election Day, pundits moved our race to a toss-up, and I was getting calls from other Senators concerned that we couldn’t win. Polls were tightening and the GOP was shoveling money into New Hampshire to defeat us. We had to take on debt to fund our response. The good news is that it worked, and we won. Those outstanding bills make emails like this one extremely important. If we’re going to pay it down according to schedule, I need 21 people to donate to this email. I hope that I can count on you to be one of them. = Thanks so much. With our fundraising numbers made public each quarter, we can’t afford to fall short. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Cecile Richards
subject: The GOP won't stop until abortion is banned nationwide
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62679247/404219454/-498614040?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2534-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3ODRmNDMyLTBjZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JXaWU2I57fJua72uREAoz9Jwnb4GXYMoelg_RexW1Hc=) Friend – one year ago today, we got infuriating news. We learned from a leak to the press that the Supreme Court was going to overturn _Roe_ and end the constitutional right to an abortion in America. Fast-forward to today, and we see the horrifying consequences of that decision – abortion bans are in place in 21 states. Let me be clear: The GOP won't stop until abortion is banned nationwide in America.
A vast majority of Americans agree that health care decisions should be made by people who are pregnant, not by Republican politicians.

Still, the GOP is forging ahead with its plan, passing more and more restrictions on reproductive care. To stop the madness, Democrats have to flip the House, defend the Senate and win the White House. It's a tall order.

That's why I'm working with American Bridge to raise $20,000 and make early investments in key races.
**I'll never give up on the fight for reproductive freedom. clean_body: | | | = Friend – one year ago today, we got infuriating news. We learned from a leak to the press that the Supreme Court was going to overturn Roe and end the constitutional right to an abortion in America. Fast-forward to today, and we see the horrifying consequences of that decision – abortion bans are in place in 21 states. Let me be clear: The GOP won't stop until abortion is banned nationwide in America. A vast majority of Americans agree that health care decisions should be made by people who are pregnant, not by Republican politicians. Still, the GOP is forging ahead with its plan, passing more and more restrictions on reproductive care. To stop the madness, Democrats have to flip the House, defend the Senate and win the White House. It's a tall order. That's why I'm working with American Bridge to raise $20,000 and make early investments in key races. I'll never give up on the fight for reproductive freedom. I hope you won't either, friend.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Let's keep fighting. georgewhitesidesforcongress.com [georgewhitesidesforcongress.com]
Hey Peter, our campaign for CA-27's House seat was recently featured in a Washington Post column.
It's clear why our race is already getting national attention: Democrats hold a 12-point registration edge in CA-27 and are fed up with Republican incumbent Mike Garcia's extreme, partisan politics.
This race will come down to the kind of Representative CA-27 wants: someone who puts partisan politics over their constituents or someone who prioritizes the issues people in the Antelope and Santa Clarita Valleys face on a daily basis.

In Congress, George will work with other policymakers, scientists, and tribal communities to combat our growing climate and wildfire crisis, find common-sense solutions to gun reform, and focus on building affordable housing for working families.
He knows that the people of CA-27 deserve better. By donating today, you can help him flip this seat and put the people of CA-27 first >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw4cemail?refcode=X_050223_Post_Article_act]
Thank you for your support,
— Team Whitesides
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90153/images/George%20Bio.png] It’s time we have bold, new leadership in this district. As a former NASA Chief of Staff and community leader of wildfire mitigation efforts, George Whitesides is ready to deliver.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: From the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Thank you for everything you do
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=246%2E35263%2EoP0rVB)
Peter — It’s been about three weeks since I launched my reelection campaign, and I can hardly describe how excited and honored I am by the outpouring of support this team has shown me since I made my announcement. I appreciate all the words of encouragement. When we launched this campaign, so many of you reached out to let me know you are ready to support our team on the path to victory once again. I’m glad we get to keep working together to continue making progress for working families. It isn’t always easy, but with you by my side, I know we can make big change happen. I’m also grateful for all of you who have pitched in to our reelection campaign. No matter how big or small, your donations are fueling and preparing us for the tough fight ahead. And I can't express how much that means to me. Thank you again, Peter. I’m looking forward to what’s ahead in this campaign. In gratitude, Tammy | [DONATE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20230502_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=246%2E35263%2EoP0rVB)

As you may know, Josh has been fighting to restore abortion access in Wisconsin.

This week, the circuit court will hear arguments in the lawsuit that’s seeking to block enforcement of Wisconsin’s criminal abortion ban that has no exceptions for cases involving rape or incest.

Josh believes reproductive health care decisions should be made by women, not by politicians. And he’s committed to working to re-establish access to safe and legal abortion in Wisconsin.

name: Team Nikki
subject: Attacks on our care haven't slowed down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress
body:
Team,

A year ago today, we found out that the Supreme Court planned to overturn Roe v. Wade , ending federal protections for reproductive rights and leaving access in turmoil for millions. And ever since then, states have continued to attack reproductive healthcare access, eviscerating the right to choose across the country.

That’s why leaders like Nikki are fighting in Congress to bring clarity to patients and doctors, and ensure the right to choose no matter your zip code.

We need strong champions for our reproductive rights representing us in Congress, and Nikki is showing up and working to protect healthcare access nationwide. Will you support her fight in a competitive district by contributing $3, $10, or whatever you can today?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-fr?refcode=_PT&amount=1

It’s been a year since the Dobbs leak, but the attacks on our care haven’t slowed down one bit. Legislatures and courts are using our rights as political pawns, criminalizing doctors and patients making personal healthcare decisions. Nikki knows that healthcare is a right, and she’s using her platform in Congress to guarantee the right to choose at the federal level.

Nikki is fighting for our reproductive rights, but she’s in a hotly contested seat where a Republican challenger has already filed to run against her. Can you help us keep a champion for reproductive freedom in this seat by giving $10 now? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-fr?refcode=_PT&amount=10

Thanks for standing with us,

Team Nikki

--

Paid for by Nikki For Congress

Nikki for Congress
PO Box 5171
Springfield, IL 62705
United States

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

Please, consider making a one-time contribution by clicking here: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-fr?refcode=_PTfooter&amount=10

It’s because of grassroots supporters like YOU that we’ve been able to consistently call out the Fake News media EVERY SINGLE TIME they try to spread misinformation or outright LIES about the important work President Trump is doing to SAVE AMERICA. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://saveamerica.nucleusemail.com/amplify/subscriptions/unsubscribe?hids=lJNyIKm2p)

Team -- Like so many of us, Justice Sonia Sotomayor says she was shocked and saddened when the Supreme Court's far-right majority overturned _Roe v. Wade._

**But she isn’t giving up.** Justice Sotomayor says she'll keep fighting for us every single day, and we MUST follow her example!

We’ve launched an URGENT petition to show that Democrats won’t back down. We’ll ALWAYS fight for reproductive freedoms. And with Republicans doing everything they can to take away our rights, _now is the time to step up._ **Let's stand with Justice Sotomayor TODAY:**

**[Sign our MASSIVE Democratic petition to show that you stand for reproductive freedoms at this critical moment in American history >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/11585?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230502-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230502-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&akid=10637%2E9716520%2EEsSLX5)**

| | **Over the last few months, we've watched as the farthest of the far right ram their most dangerous and extreme policy ideas through red state legislatures nationwide.** From conservatives going after abortion medication, to school boards banning and censoring books, to Republican legislatures introducing bills targeting trans children, to lawmakers purposefully making it harder to vote – and everything in between – far-right conservatives are doing everything in their power to force their extremist values on the American people. **Some of the most concerning players are the current front runners for the Republican presidential nomination: Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis.** With these two leading the pack, there's no way around it: Republicans across the country are embracing the most policies and ideas to undermine our democracy and turn back the clock on progress. Now is the time to stand up and defend our country from the far-right's undemocratic takeover of our institutions. But this requires an all-hands-on-deck response. **[Will you donate now to help fuel the movement to elect leaders who will protect our democracy – not undermine it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62682968/404232402/-2044921950?refcode=2023-05-02-trump-desantis&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=d4456000-18e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDQ1NjAwMC0xOGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O84HeSQqxsc4X-qaIbLLmHyZV9g5eDKgQK4LxhFjQr4=)** Both Trump and DeSantis have shown disdain for the democratic process, preferring to dictate their dangerous agendas and attack anyone who disagrees. Republican party leadership has not only tolerated them, but welcomed them with open arms. It might seem early to be talking about presidential elections. But this is about more than one election. It's about the future of our country. I worry that our history is repeating its worst episodes, as a major political party is willing to throw away democratic principles and vilify our own citizens in pursuit of power. **Here's the good news: In the last election, this movement pushed them back.** But democracy is not something to be won in a single election. I worry that our history is repeating its worst episodes, as a major political party is willing to throw away democratic principles and vilify our own citizens in pursuit of power. Here's the good news: In the last election, this movement pushed them back. But democracy is not something to be won in a single election. We must continue to work for it by showing up again and again for every election—= Together, we can and will win the fight for our democracy. body:
The PA primary is in just two weeks!

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62683797/404234522/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230502Twoweeksheat_N_TEAM_90do_4_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0MjgxZGJhLTE5ZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U7BhDIa9LOayGpVNgJmcAJBKW8tmD4Lh6-lyDU4iMC4=)
| Fellow activist,

Time really does fly, and we have to ensure we are not letting a single moment slip us by.

We’re now just **two weeks** out from the 2023 Municipal, Local, and Judicial Primary Election in PA, and voter registration for this election is now over — but our work is far from it.

As a voting rights organization that centers the Commonwealth’s Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth, we know how important consistent engagement is. Without voter engagement in the primaries, candidates who best represent our values may never even get a chance. And in Allegheny and Philadelphia, this primary election really is THE election when we look at the local races including county executive and mayor. **[With just two weeks left to engage and educate voters for the May 16th Primary, it is time to bring the heat! Can we count on you to donate $10 right now to help us reach historically disenfranchised and neglected voters across Pennsylvania before the clean_body: The PA primary is in just two weeks! = | Fellow activist, Time really does fly, and we have to ensure we are not letting a single moment slip us by. We’re now just two weeks out from the 2023 Municipal, Local, and Judicial Primary Election in PA, and voter registration for this election is now over — but our work is far from it. As a voting rights organization that centers the Commonwealth’s Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth, we know how important consistent engagement is. Without voter engagement in the primaries, candidates who best represent our values may never even get a chance. And in Allegheny and Philadelphia, this primary election really is THE election when we look at the local races including county executive and mayor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to : May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project __

name: Team Lizzie
subject: #TeamLizzie Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230502update?refcode=folf230502update_nd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230502update?refcode=folf230502update_nd]
We’re working hard to send Lizzie back to the House, and we’ve been busy sharing that message at events around the district. We’re connecting with voters and volunteers as we gear up for a big year in Texas next year—the primary is less than a year away and we will be working to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot across Texas and across the country.
Here are a few highlights of Lizzie’s trips around the district to meet with the people who are doing the work on the ground from the Bellaire/Braeswood Democrats to Fort Bend’s Front Porch Democrats to the Houston LGBT Caucus.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230502update?refcode=folf230502update_nd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230502update?refcode=folf230502update_nd]
May is Asian American Pacific Islander Heritage Month!
Lizzie is so proud to represent the rich and diverse AAPI community in TX-07—including advocates, business leaders, and cultural ambassadors who have long been a part of our city’s history. As a member of the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus, Lizzie proudly works with AAPI members of our community to promote equality, reject prejudice, and improve access to opportunity for all.
Lizzie has also been working hard to make sure people know about the good work President Biden and Congressional Democrats have done together. Recently, Lizzie spoke with Khambrel Marshall on KPRC2’s “Houston Newsmakers” to discuss the historic investments from the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act , the Inflation Reduction Act , and how she is working to make sure they touch every corner of Texas.
WATCH NOW [https://www.click2houston.com/news/local/2023/04/08/fletcher-on-front-lines-of-pro-choice-fight/]
https://www.click2houston.com/news/local/2023/04/08/fletcher-on-front-lines-of-pro-choice-fight/ [https://www.click2houston.com/news/local/2023/04/08/fletcher-on-front-lines-of-pro-choice-fight/]
Also—in case you missed it—Lizzie received a 100% pro-retiree rating from the Alliance for Retired Americans!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230502update?refcode=folf230502update_nd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230502update?refcode=folf230502update_nd]
Lizzie consistently stands up for seniors in Congress to ensure that they can retire confidently. She voted to allow Medicare to negotiate lower prescription drug prices, and she continues to fight to protect Social Security and Medicare from those who seek to undermine and weaken the programs seniors depend on.
That’s a little bit of what we’ve been working on here. We know you are working, too, and want to thank you for being part of the team.
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230502update?refcode=folf230502update_nd]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

name: Nelini Stamp, Working Families Party
subject: Tell the CEOs of Netflix, Amazon, Warner, Disney: Pay your writers!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Stand with Hollywood writers on strike today! | | | Peter, **At midnight last night, the Writers Guild of America, officially went on strike to demand fair compensation for their work.**
This may sound like a battle of the bougie against the billionaires, but Hollywood writers are fighting the same fight against corporate greed we all are. As television has evolved in the streaming era, corporations are shortchanging the writers of some of our favorite TV shows like Westworld and Abbott Elementary. Now, instead of being compensated based on ad revenue from replaying shows on network TV, massive corporations like Netflix, Warner Bros, and Disney rake in billions from streaming services, while the writers get pennies. I was a child actress, a card carrying member of the Screen Actors Guild. The place where you start is the script, it’s the heartbeat of a film or TV show. What writers do is tell the stories and actors bring them to life. Without writers there is no content. ****[**Writers are struggling to claw back to the same slice of the pie that they had 10 years ago — and they need our support. Click here to watch a video by our friends at More Perfect Union breaking down the issue, then send a message to the CEOs of the biggest streaming services in America to demand they fairly compensate writers!**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlJd1SK3o71vMaKl8B6rk6Im1tER0bsExT0dkO10F0tndXSZzeZHHKb87aShVs8TnxYX_2c6M2g12l2GsizlsTk5LTyq6FETL6DnLnnqcKmXOTuPAaVETVXjnGIvjDmfnRB-yinHIc-34NBdfP0q3lvHMU7LPQbZ5FFgg_JwrRhj7_Bswbc3i5PwxUhwHoSEMpqISMZX2HsVxrnBgaKy_b0EOzlaSxRZcfJFDOPNVjgugadPEKf8IaU0KjTe26hrLwsAGZtzWVvSD4DMC4z3q_4HscnlpJSJYewA9okJjDtP1eiq07tkf3Aklosu8i5SeuSD7ZFA-QX7VVFkDdl5K8pDAm1biYwVlqj8W-va3Hj8e_9_kfViDZH9uU2BvSObEmHrpbKisdXSqsMNu22fHgpM9aw52o6PevW7XBzJmHxjmgK7bU7Iu5THy9SCcxYmkN3GYAyn_JtjYYX0ZsR6o5K-P4TZweDvWxwaQpyPkMngPAjybwC8zu1-smHkLZXVkE/3vu/dVDhqRT6S3S5YOj6i9KzAw/h0/MtVa4WM2-mtq5cm66bP-9s36LY0mxd03fqMnpw0xDOY)**** **[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlJd1SK3o71vMaKl8B6rk6Im1tER0bsExT0dkO10F0tndXSZzeZHHKb87aShVs8TnxYX_2c6M2g12l2GsizlsTk5LTyq6FETL6DnLnnqcKmXOTuPAaVETVXjnGIvjDmfnRB-yinHIc-34NBdfP0q3lvHMU7LPQbZ5FFgg_JwrRhj7_Bswbc3i5PwxUhwHoSEMpqISMZX2HsVxrnBgaKy_b0EOzlaSxRZcfJFDOPNVjgumWuu3k97r6bH6m9Qnp6FmpmI3B9TI9ZeoFo4RghGnnsfBAYXMMLgNQAPQ5-t8vvrS0qD9vI2QIZ_SAk7MkxjGipl1We-KPKBnCaLCmdOwmIMH6HW35mo9pzcFR7BnxqJHd6_RLWlV39wMhEkbSCPKe8EZ7jCMgxuE-X4mmCMCSzaSSLwwEJ6Ghfw-YB207tqTdAk5TulEezDfWT7wGlNAJ3mu0LDr9oRtP4FJrtoKoGKoE16oH6Ls8ZJInm4rzEte5Jc7tNSTHpT8A303o3cSI/3vu/dVDhqRT6S3S5YOj6i9KzAw/h1/Qt6hNl4S137BOnCEyKXgriFoZahSIEco6IXASem9Pcs)** **[Watch, Sign,& Send »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlJd1SK3o71vMaKl8B6rk6Im1tER0bsExT0dkO10F0tndXSZzeZHHKb87aShVs8TnxYX_2c6M2g12l2GsizlsTk5LTyq6FETL6DnLnnqcKmXOTuPAaVETVXjnGIvjDmfnRB-yinHIc-34NBdfP0q3lvHMU7LPQbZ5FFgg_JwrRhj7_Bswbc3i5PwxUhwHoSEMpqISMZX2HsVxrnBgaKy_b0EOzlaSxRZcfJFDOPNVjgukmJzfNMXi8bPRjScWxtnQEI0nY7Cn5xo7Rg2nFO1y1iSTPZGUOJlboCRDwerZCqBvQpD-bfXHlOZkBh9KVXBSaT-ylla9CJrBNeK5CkoWcLrZA1Vx43VEf3GMuWC6R4In_S0CCxzhzXFegBywdTwLyXHLVqKPpjzkcgcKv9lAeP6_7F_msSzGN1iIcPtWSV2StjZEltMPLxrXQLo-NwOYNnwLZY2l-RDOzk-dnjqPizwwy0I61gegLOG8DJ5kGYd434q5nOwPnow0F9VVkfX8k/3vu/dVDhqRT6S3S5YOj6i9KzAw/h2/NWsq98gF3XS9sQtR-A5tfZGJ85CFpmXtOy1tAXfe5K0)** Here’s how it used to work for Hollywood writers: The vast majority of television shows were aired on broadcast networks, which made money from airing ads during the show. When those shows aired reruns, everyone who worked on the show was entitled to a portion of the additional ad revenue that the networks collected.
**Anyone who watches TV in 2023 can tell you why this approach is broken:** instead of airing reruns, networks license out shows to streaming services like HBO Max, Disney Plus, Netflix or Amazon Prime. They don’t air ads, so the writers receive only fractions of a penny on what they would have under the old system. **The corporations are making even more money than before — they’re just doing it in a way that they won’t have to share. Hollywood writers just want to be paid what they’re owed.** [**Sign a message of support for the WGA’s demands, and send it directly to the CEOs of Amazon, Netflix, Disney and Warner Bros!**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlJd1SK3o71vMaKl8B6rk6Im1tER0bsExT0dkO10F0tndXSZzeZHHKb87aShVs8TnxYX_2c6M2g12l2GsizlsTk5LTyq6FETL6DnLnnqcKmXOTuPAaVETVXjnGIvjDmfnRB-yinHIc-34NBdfP0q3lvHMU7LPQbZ5FFgg_JwrRhj7_Bswbc3i5PwxUhwHoSEMpqISMZX2HsVxrnBgaKy_b0EOzlaSxRZcfJFDOPNVjgujfkjltQQtJASrGpxhlIwqdFt2voKId8LCZeheF7Tde1t1smDjg8Byh1gJnJuB-vf6zYwfBDlEPNkE3XsXWhoDVPqGqj63h1_kMVim55gS72hmxsKXo8hw0JMsSWXqbQEgwJTANjUU7qb0wKMXHEuUfGhgbuIwI0Xu0hSbU_WTLR6iH9moQLy5FrbbSuos8CFnad9jlOZzU8lNBjd5y9bnF3KjsHLLnzFz5nMmpfih-KYm6zVNflSlV4MhmXOnad3HYMuMli82I6tQEGQ9fZ48o/3vu/dVDhqRT6S3S5YOj6i9KzAw/h3/cKoQg7KeYjgd6y9fHH7BTkXkBWNsJP8K1m6YBcrqdEE) In solidarity, Nelini Stamp

I was a child actress, a card carrying member of the Screen Actors Guild. The place where you start is the script, it’s the heartbeat of a film or TV show. What writers do is tell the stories and actors bring them to life. Without writers there is no content. ** Here’s how it used to work for Hollywood writers: The vast majority of television shows were aired on broadcast networks, which made money from airing ads during the show. When those shows aired reruns, everyone who worked on the show was entitled to a portion of the additional ad revenue that the networks collected. Anyone who watches TV in 2023 can tell you why this approach is broken: instead of airing reruns, networks license out shows to streaming services like HBO Max, Disney Plus, Netflix or Amazon Prime. They don’t air ads, so the writers receive only fractions of a penny on what they would have under the old system. The corporations are making even more money than before — they’re just doing it in a way that they won’t have to share. Hollywood writers just want to be paid what they’re owed. In solidarity, Nelini Stamp Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: If you’re able, please support the National Network of Abortion Funds today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
I can remember everything about the moment I found out. I’m sure you can clearly remember, too. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62705999/404270194/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ13M_ROE_E_20230502_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDZhYTkzYi0zZGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYc6kKlAEZUAdl9C0Aa0XaNviTqsj-hqzT9AQGPGFt8=&emci=776aa93b-3de9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7d6aa93b-3de9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
One year ago today, we learned of the leaked decision suggesting that the Supreme Court was poised to strip away the constitutional right to an abortion. I can remember everything about the moment I found out. I’m sure you can clearly remember, too. I was in my kitchen on the phone with my daughter. We were in the middle of talking about something and she said, “Oh, my God — oh, no, no, no.” I thought, “Oh, dear, one of the grandchildren has been hurt, something’s happened right in front of her.” I kept saying, “What?” And finally she said, “I don’t understand the Supreme Court, they put up an opinion, they’re gonna take back Roe v. Wade.” She obviously was reading her phone while she was talking to me. I started punching on my own phone at the same time. It felt like a full-body smack from the top of your head all the way down to your toes. My mind went back to when I was a girl. I grew up in Oklahoma when abortion was illegal. I saw the harm that was caused. All of that came flooding back. I had thought my daughter and my granddaughters would be protected and have more rights than we did. But the Supreme Court decided they will not. I was so angry then — and I still am. But this extremist court will not get the final word. That was my commitment a year ago when we protested on the steps of the Court — and it still remains my commitment today. I’m continuing the fight for the big, structural changes that will reverse this injustice and prevent it from happening again — like expanding the Supreme Court to rebalance it, electing more anti-filibuster Senators to end this archaic rule and pass national abortion protections, and fixing the Electoral College so popular-vote losers like Donald Trump can’t stack the courts again. And I’m going to continue to support pro-abortion candidates and ballot measures at the state level. It’s clear that when we run on abortion rights, we win on abortion rights — and we must do everything we can to expand abortion protections or defeat attempts to restrict access. But until we get this done, we must continue to look after each other, and help ensure safe, accessible abortions to everyone who needs or wants one. [_**So if you can, please make a donation to the National Network of Abortion Funds, who will help patients across the country still access the abortion care that they need. 100% of your contribution will support this vital organization.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62706000/404270195/-114817269?refcode=EMZ13M_ROE_E_20230502_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDZhYTkzYi0zZGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYc6kKlAEZUAdl9C0Aa0XaNviTqsj-hqzT9AQGPGFt8=) We are not powerless. We can still fight back. And we must. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62706001/404270196/-114817269?refcode=EMZ13M_ROE_E_20230502_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDZhYTkzYi0zZGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYc6kKlAEZUAdl9C0Aa0XaNviTqsj-hqzT9AQGPGFt8=)
---

body:
Republicans call for a NATIONAL abortion ban
| | [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support-choice/?source=VPP_20230502_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=7437%2E878179%2EZvtMhz) MAGA Republicans across the country are ramming through EXTREMIST anti-abortion laws — **_and Mike Pence just called for a NATIONWIDE ban!_**

And now we’re starting out from behind on our May fundraising goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your help, Katie HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: This fight is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I am proud to announce that I am endorsing my good friend Barbara Lee for Senate.
#
Hi Peter, it's Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal.
I wanted to check in today to personally share some exciting news with you: **I am proud to announce that I am endorsing my good friend Barbara Lee for Senate.**
Congresswoman Barbara Lee is a progressive champion you can count on to fight for our values and get things done. And I know that in my heart, because I’ve been honored to see Barbara in action.
Barbara is a fearless leader of progressive efforts to fight income inequality and poverty. I’ve seen her stand up, time and again to ensure that the underrepresented have a voice in the halls of Congress. Now more than ever, our country needs bold, progressive solutions to the problems we’re facing — and we know Barbara will deliver those solutions in the Senate.
**[Peter, please stand with me in support of Barbara Lee’s candidacy for U.S. Senate and make a split contribution to our campaigns today. We need your support to make sure our democracy mirrors the true reality of our communities.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41815?refcode=em20230502-2438&t=1&akid=2438%2E420207%2EmZUMNg)**
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41815?refcode=em20230502-2438&t=20&akid=2438%2E420207%2EmZUMNg)**
This fight is personal to Barbara. From her segregated home town to the halls of Congress, she has never stopped fighting for what’s right. She’s lived through the challenges and issues that many of our communities still face today — and that’s what makes her such a valuable and fierce advocate for progressive change.
Barbara was once a single mother on public assistance, who couldn’t afford childcare so she had to bring her children to class with her to keep working towards higher education and set herself and her family up for success. She then escaped a violent marriage and went on to author California’s first Violence Against Women Act.
She knows what it’s like to stand in solidarity and be the only “no'' vote against the open-ended authorization that led to our costly, unjust forever wars overseas. And her experience with a back-alley abortion as a young woman led her to become a fierce defender of abortion rights.
Whether she’s leading the charge to protect a woman’s right to choose, fighting to lift people out of poverty, recommitting herself to the fight for civil rights, voting rights, women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights and more — Barbara is not afraid to stand on the side of justice.
**[Let’s continue paving the way for a multi-racial, multi-generational coalition together. Please chip in today to support our two campaigns with a split contribution of $3 or whatever you are able to contribute today.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41815?refcode=em20230502-2438&t=21&akid=2438%2E420207%2EmZUMNg)**
Thank you for your support and faith in our movement, Peter.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230502-2438-footer&t=22&refcode2=2438_420207_mZUMNg&akid=2438%2E420207%2EmZUMNg)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=2438%2E420207%2EmZUMNg)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2438%2E420207%2EmZUMNg)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

Dear Peter, I'm writing to you today with a message of urgency. **[Far-Left Socialist Bernie Sanders is wielding unprecedented power in Washington thanks to Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and the Democrats’ Senate Majority.](https://vtgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYgU6j7Am6gC471idLqEyVog3X3bJydQQdN8trraBLJqZT17RAoUVaUUmVD6wqfozsp36DQ9dMgu0ebAx_pJEVeROd2CJB-Pz-gI1uzst0sP91frGMK2j12qhT0By4tLjbgTipgSR_QhzocytptNKW0QXYwF3wMOHDx49SnWTlh3-sFB8sQItUJd_r3jiU1cEb6A5nqT2mp6n2VkEdtOLygO_1G4h5c3x9f7hOXm-MdczoxND24H6MxXyklYChmRkSnSYQ2KpP2I1C2bcQ63Ms1ta7nQiKqLlaHSb60H3VUjYccYBGR56EG4LBEYufo9FvdfDjbyWVdFV-fgfP5EPL2i5i4dIZYqD2-P2aGBuY_Mr7OH6wb51NKqqhfYxPKtAXfZybm87TfPUCsibvyhLkZUiqD6gj29A96vHSiVRpso7pYkd_1EI9Ka7DTy11bRqN6zEOtUyMZw_ubHYAk5rBosgJwsiFt-xuv99p21TqRYp&e=541e81b2a652adbc7e93973f82cc3809&utm_source=vtgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230216_hd_stop_bernie_92_552&n=4)** He has tremendous influence over many key issues, and he’s intent on dragging our nation into socialism. [America will NEVER become a socialist nation under our watch, Peter.](https://vtgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYgU6j7Am6gC471idLqEyVog3X3bJydQQdN8trraBLJqZT17RAoUVaUUmVD6wqfozsp36DQ9dMgu0ebAx_pJEVeROd2CJB-Pz-gI1uzst0sP91frGMK2j12qhT0By4tLjbgTipgSR_QhzocytptNKW0QXYwF3wMOHDx49SnWTlh3-sFB8sQItUJd_r3jiU1cEb6A5nqT2mp6n2VkEdtOLygO_1G4h5c3x9f7hOXm-MdczoxND24H6MxXyklYChmRkSnSYQ2KpP2I1C2bcQ63Ms1ta7nQiKqLlaHSb60H3VUjYccYBGR56EG4LBEYufo9FvdfDjbyWVdFV-fgfP5EPL2i5i4dIZYqD2-P2aGBuY_Mr7OH6wb51NKqqhfYxPKtAXfZybm87TfPUCsibvyhLkZUiqD6gj29A96vHSiVRpso7pYkd_1EI9Ka7DTy11bRqN6zEOtUyMZw_ubHYAk5rBosgJwsiFt-xuv99p21TqRYp&e=541e81b2a652adbc7e93973f82cc3809&utm_source=vtgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230216_hd_stop_bernie_92_552&n=5) We have to stop Bernie Sanders, and that means winning back control of the US Senate. As chair of the Senate’s influential Health, Education, Labor and Pensions Committee, Sanders holds unprecedented power to make good on his promises. He’s already made it clear that he wants to implement his radical agenda, including so-called Medicare for All, “free” college, and more. [If we don't take action now, his socialist nightmare will become a reality.](https://vtgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYgU6j7Am6gC471idLqEyVog3X3bJydQQdN8trraBLJqZT17RAoUVaUUmVD6wqfozsp36DQ9dMgu0ebAx_pJEVeROd2CJB-Pz-gI1uzst0sP91frGMK2j12qhT0By4tLjbgTipgSR_QhzocytptNKW0QXYwF3wMOHDx49SnWTlh3-sFB8sQItUJd_r3jiU1cEb6A5nqT2mp6n2VkEdtOLygO_1G4h5c3x9f7hOXm-MdczoxND24H6MxXyklYChmRkSnSYQ2KpP2I1C2bcQ63Ms1ta7nQiKqLlaHSb60H3VUjYccYBGR56EG4LBEYufo9FvdfDjbyWVdFV-fgfP5EPL2i5i4dIZYqD2-P2aGBuY_Mr7OH6wb51NKqqhfYxPKtAXfZybm87TfPUCsibvyhLkZUiqD6gj29A96vHSiVRpso7pYkd_1EI9Ka7DTy11bRqN6zEOtUyMZw_ubHYAk5rBosgJwsiFt-xuv99p21TqRYp&e=541e81b2a652adbc7e93973f82cc3809&utm_source=vtgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230216_hd_stop_bernie_92_552&n=6) **[That's why I'm urging you to chip in $10 or more immediately to help us take back the Senate and stop Bernie Sanders.](https://vtgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYgU6j7Am6gC471idLqEyVog3X3bJydQQdN8trraBLJqZT17RAoUVaUUmVD6wqfozsp36DQ9dMgu0ebAx_pJEVeROd2CJB-Pz-gI1uzst0sP91frGMK2j12qhT0By4tLjbgTipgSR_QhzocytptNKW0QXYwF3wMOHDx49SnWTlh3-sFB8sQItUJd_r3jiU1cEb6A5nqT2mp6n2VkEdtOLygO_1G4h5c3x9f7hOXm-MdczoxND24H6MxXyklYChmRkSnSYQ2KpP2I1C2bcQ63Ms1ta7nQiKqLlaHSb60H3VUjYccYBGR56EG4LBEYufo9FvdfDjbyWVdFV-fgfP5EPL2i5i4dIZYqD2-P2aGBuY_Mr7OH6wb51NKqqhfYxPKtAXfZybm87TfPUCsibvyhLkZUiqD6gj29A96vHSiVRpso7pYkd_1EI9Ka7DTy11bRqN6zEOtUyMZw_ubHYAk5rBotHeILpAZ-dq1KZiYbpm1Pc&e=541e81b2a652adbc7e93973f82cc3809&utm_source=vtgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230216_hd_stop_bernie_92_552&n=7)** With your support, we can defeat the socialist agenda and protect America's future. subject: We have just the person to kick Ted Cruz out of the Senate, who in recently released recordings plotted to steal the 2020 election for Trump. What we've predicted is official: Rep. Colin Allred will challenge Ted Cruz for his Senate seat in 2024.
body:
It’s official, he’s running!!!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7470e4d7-d76d-484b-935a-8e754b786799/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**_BREAKING:_** **We have just the person to take out Ted Cruz, who in recently released recordings plotted to steal the 2020 election for Trump. What we've predicted is official: _Rep. Colin Allred will challenge Ted Cruz for his Senate seat in 2024._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7949299d-e072-4e2a-b96c-58c025b2fd2b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This is huge, and by that I don't just mean Colin Allred:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13256472-42a5-4f23-acaa-f630bd8addfd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Yes, he's a large guy who played football in the NFL. But he's a real tough guy--not a petrified wimp play-acting tough like Cruz. _**_Allred was raised by a single mother and worked his way up to joining the Obama Administration. Then, in a huge upset, he knocked off GOP Rep. Pete Sessions in 2018 in a key swing seat._**_ Allred's the highest profile Black politician in Texas, with charisma as large as he is._ _Meanwhile, In addition to being a sleazoid who left Texans to freeze as he jetted off to Cancun, Cruz betrayed America. _**_Cruz is on tape talking to nutball Maria Bartiromo about creating a fake commission to steal the election in 2020._** [**_The legal system will do what it'll do. What ___we__ _ can do is kick Cruz' seditionist arse outta the Senate in '24, when Allred destroys this shell of a man who barely held on by 2.5% vs Beto O'Rourke in '18. So, will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to elect outstanding Allred and remove Cruz from public life?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T19573e1b-dedb-4dd7-bb96-53e5efe16b40/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us elect a champion, and ousting a despicable traitor._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T35daf219-9d9c-4c52-a86c-914c31913108/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Voters in Philadelphia have a unique opportunity to elect a hardworking climate champion in their city and make a lasting positive impact in their community!

_**Local elections like this one are crucial to the climate movement.**_ We need to start making changes from the ground up to see real progress and protect our planet. And electing a climate champion like **Amanda** – who has a proven record of climate action – will make an impact not just in Philadelphia but across our country. clean_body: Voters in Philadelphia have a unique opportunity to elect a hardworking climate champion in their city and make a lasting positive impact in their community! | = | Hi, it’s Jane Fonda, I’m reaching out with a special announcement! The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is proud to endorse climate championAmanda McIllmurray for Philadelphia City Council! = | = Voters in Philadelphia have a unique opportunity to elect a hardworking climate champion in their city and make a lasting positive impact in their community! Local elections like this one are crucial to the climate movement. We need to start making changes from the ground up to see real progress and protect our planet. And electing a climate champion like Amanda – who has a proven record of climate action – will make an impact not just in Philadelphia but across our country. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s demand action together, Jane Fonda = | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Earlier this week, Democrats Serve announced our first round of Congressional endorsements in our fight to win back the house in 2024.

**A key piece of that fight will be in RI-01, where the September 2023 special election to replace Rep. David Cicilline is already healing up.**

Gabe Amo’s public service background — serving as an aide to President Biden, President Obama, and Rhode Island Governor Gina Raimondo — makes him an excellent example of a Democrat running for office who can excel as a candidate and policymaker.

[We’re proud to have Gabe’s back in this crucial special election, and we need your help. Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

subject: Sign if you agree: Undergoing a medically necessary procedure should never haunt someone financially. It has no place on a credit report.

body:
Healthcare is a human right. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvpAQmRasMR2vBMvlvqPwaLFmeWMb8zAZI2xzEqHBGWWD2-2EMKdqfmPHMwj5p_Us15LVDRQ8MwlrLtiOtJAjLOj0L6f_50RUx6alkpwZC4E2Wo7zA0ptKJl2I3tOShlasuLwfeVt9DgEqt4uSuwYmr1Fvo9aiQ1HVbzUTqZ2ojPvUn2eDFOouiyQZVog2RWGspHoz5d7JHj0rhQ6SQ_siAUi3k88-qbjRU814v0GiMncu9-jEy4AJaSGoWlN-m8zxiD-DpJBQa3PHNR0OE1Pux-xULGX7qdmg7LhVTPpIY7X6qd7GsaHTak1-kPe1q9ur1h4pE-gwpyE5W-uVo9hpGQ/3vu/TC2G85NqRnS4lvI9EvC9Rg/h0/FDdgJ91qkatuGivrKtmukLHLnvf0f7iNLmVf3MJesxk)
---
Friend, Healthcare is a human right. But our country’s broken healthcare system prioritizes profits over people, forcing millions of U.S. residents into crippling debt just to afford the care they need. Nearly one in five adults in the U.S. have one or more medical debt collections listed on their credit report—which means they are more susceptible to being denied housing, transportation, or other necessities because of a sudden health crisis or visit to the emergency room. **Undergoing a medically necessary procedure should never haunt someone financially. It has no place on a credit report.** **So I recently introduced the**** _Consumer Protection for Medical Debt Collections Act_** , which would prohibit the collection of medical debt for two years and prohibit debt from “medically necessary” procedures from being included on a consumer credit report. [**Please add your name to support my**** _Consumer Protection for Medical Debt Collections Act,_****by signing on as a grassroots co-sponsor of the bill.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARkvXBqlt5f-rwlCGsl9pRx9VeEUKTHt3JtZ_qdyH8yZWyIpTQf0Bs9_3vt3Wg-g9i8axc5h2B6I6YbOjhpayz1W0b-74TRG5nDLau8Tfk73i_UZ_s3SyHK_fFDALBF_OEFPTFUfIfyIsYsMSPEziMjo2H38HubJDxiDQOnLGqg8TgYGxUcgvNqtQ3nththCbuoJzZzzLm2vIw618B_nM0kfWjydT4XgcvR7JarjdMdNT8hVWJfoQ4Pb7lVkT6Pe2c9wXzhiSv-zW_a7BryKlfmkz0-0w2BFzF9LP6c5AgX35DA6fRFd3W9pV1G1YZn197qzQA3309Y3cKvvhTkMJwR0GvsXD6j8BpcJU14AzBEJU8dr5JLknuFsBmIJh8agvQJnoLBZoy8HLxrPFeenEB7KtCUsbOcoj5h_8Mcuxqqu8EV4rxBJNxZFND8VqUgavriw26M15lGLNmb_zNQCKaURIVZCIQ582IniGv0bD1Cjg/3vu/TC2G85NqRnS4lvI9EvC9Rg/h1/xvt-5vFvgHambD0gJA-H3PwJmYBaYQn38jKLebMY3CQ) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARkvXBqlt5f-rwlCGsl9pRx9VeEUKTHt3JtZ_qdyH8yZWyIpTQf0Bs9_3vt3Wg-g9i8axc5h2B6I6YbOjhpayz1UlCVNH6lxrD94SGnPPU5UoPsdqJzBwHAV9WMzyXEy6RCfDEHYhEDB2OzWAcyZNY0sbs2ddeXL9QG2nPDQ0osbOWB3SsatO1s4_nR8rSG39z7B7-KQL9az4mM22z-9yKwJQqW7FkWWr9YuuOJ2zQIwO3wfjQvntW99DVFaHlF1Tf2X3SGqzhXg_qxN5OJ2Qp692Ae-SPxnnB1Pk1VM6yq08jwImLTDPg48LG2ybBFdSe3uH0t-XhsfEMs-LatF_taql7HTqwjLNWJMDolK2GBkljM8BgrKHX6CZZjGEMb4t4RfdT4zHLwDh8X3-iA9lyo8f4IEfX-aChUlsTH_lmoSu1EdE2FFJOqV57tNZZrRy0MF7HyX5Bv4a7nSmNob2PHTvLioEbTiwuIwtgs2EQnv8/3vu/TC2G85NqRnS4lvI9EvC9Rg/h2/DM8ObJIDOT9E_H390dBoZZMYr23Ixx5JHbD8Xb6NZEM)
---
No one chooses to get sick. No one should face financial ruin because they are diagnosed with an illness. A medical emergency should not send a family into bankruptcy, and yet medical debt is a leading cause of personal bankruptcy in our country.
Medical debt affects people’s credit scores, which are used to secure needed resources like housing. This issue is especially urgent in communities like mine, where residents already face challenges with access to credit.
**The**** _Consumer Protection for Medical Debt Collections Act_****is a major step in fixing our broken credit system and abolishing medical debt.**
Last year, we passed the bill in the U.S. House of Representatives, but it didn’t go on to the Senate. With Republicans in control of the House this year, we’ve got to build more support for this legislation, which would provide much-needed relief for people struggling with medical debt. Can you help demonstrate the public support behind this bill?
[**Sign on today as a grassroots co-sponsor of this new legislation to prohibit the collection of medical debt for two years and to prohibit debt from “medically necessary” procedures from being included on a consumer credit report.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARkvXBqlt5f-rwlCGsl9pRx9VeEUKTHt3JtZ_qdyH8yZWyIpTQf0Bs9_3vt3Wg-g9i8axc5h2B6I6YbOjhpayz1cc8CjIr_HVyRaXiaTb4tF7ywXV-1Yi2GmxYeGHGeJHVN73w-oCiwlbPqYEil12I1KrsQ3Hc3Ht1jwD5h_xnaN6NpnwCf5FFKrGdh_RdZivg8crdOxrY0Id2zO2ZumMk_D0i5EUptJkwVf292ztAPmsaaq4B_JNY151DabA5kOOGmCntnKwy-euWwmrewZ-RauxlIVdfy0WgnmWnx-L8LB8lJIGCljwiZ6a5g_nJmvjws-MvVzhMSJJ9eFBHh7xmbm1Gd95v15XRdlJMUYvbd2TGjYZdVbqcwilXpapUjeow_7tXqG12xj9x2PXCGBi5jvY7Dn8GjnTqpO5ZHkqdWtEWhFv917FusSzyFzUqNojnDg-PCsKAbY3p0tECxKLU-C01ssjxnLVV3Jsu5lZ6JxU/3vu/TC2G85NqRnS4lvI9EvC9Rg/h3/IBlOgg74IzeK2yvbj0viThPJ6ZJvCPynTzKQl2Mncns)
Thank you for being by my side as we fight for a future where all of us can thrive.
In solidarity,
Rashida

No one should face financial ruin because they are diagnosed with an illness. A medical emergency should not send a family into bankruptcy, and yet medical debt is a leading cause of personal bankruptcy in our country. Medical debt affects people’s credit scores, which are used to secure needed resources like housing. This issue is especially urgent in communities like mine, where residents already face challenges with access to credit. The Consumer Protection for Medical Debt Collections Actis a major step in fixing our broken credit system and abolishing medical debt. Last year, we passed the bill in the U.S. House of Representatives, but it didn’t go on to the Senate. With Republicans in control of the House this year, we’ve got to build more support for this legislation, which would provide much-needed relief for people struggling with medical debt. Can you help demonstrate the public support behind this bill? Thank you for being by my side as we fight for a future where all of us can thrive. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

**Team, we’re exactly two weeks from Election Day, and the Mayor’s race is still a dead-heat.** We’re in position to pull ahead because we have the strongest grassroots team in the race, but it’s going to take an all-out effort from all of us to overcome dirty attacks coming our way.
_Here’s what you missed if you blinked last week:_
**POLLS SHOW A FIVE-WAY TIE.** The first public poll in our race shows Helen in a statistical logjam at the top, but it also shows her _leading among early voters._ We have an incredibly organized and motivated coalition, and that puts us in position to pull ahead.
**LEADING PROGRESSIVES ENDORSE HELEN.** Congressmembers including Alexandria Ocasio Cortez, Ayanna Pressley, and Jamaal Bowman just endorsed Helen, joining state and local lawmakers like Nikil Saval, Elizabeth Fiedler, Jamie Gauthier, Kendra Brooks, Rick Krajewski, and Tarik Khan.
**AND WE’RE OUTWORKING EVERYONE IN THE FIELD.** We’re the only campaign in this race with a citywide organizing program — meaning we’re reaching the most voters face-to-face via door knocking, rallies, and events across Philly. Our volunteers are reaching tens of thousands of voters every single week.
**BUT WE’RE FACING BILLIONAIRE-TIED ATTACKS.** A shady org linked to far-right billionaire Jeffrey Yass (the richest man in PA) is attacking Helen on TV. The GOP and the wealthy elite want “anyone but Helen” as Philly’s next mayor because they know she’s the only candidate with a vision bold enough to change our broken status quo.
**We have a clear path to victory in this historically close election, but we can’t allow the self-funding millionaires and shady billionaires to have the last word.** That’s why we’re working nonstop to raise enough funds to increase our ad budget and expand our on-the-ground outreach.
**Can you chip in right now to ensure Helen has everything she needs to win? We need to expand our ads program, fund voter outreach, and respond to dirty attacks, and we only have 14 days left.**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

| |
---
| | |
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---
| | [OPTION 1](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08defe8a3cfa4299a467932fbf0b5cb0&_e=f0FYMX9Apk7nOY6t8nAgLNhsEoOEjEdKsImKAuqNl7nPPU6tmldRth8V75n991YZ-fISg4gchSErSUg8gu3tvPM2rvVO7GmZpH_ZsEKENHoFzxWB_7X5p9Hq5Mt18lE2uiHwzoj8uM82Fj9i1rXHEzF502jGzTbF-1Ian49xt7dWQjSGs6fFZ1cq1Y9jFs8Nng-xIcYvINa3w-RtOL0lUVfS9qCJ5Su5Nix_3-UxThaaIGR0KAb9WNko2TzeBEXZEJRvzem1DVwg0bPaCcygz0wZTNoal3koW4Q4qirDZdrpYj7Uo8GNyMBIRvhU448zXkA6AtL6ENIEo3pV3_sJOtDd2nL3GLwPmPyzgUQ9gqVnB6Su4gnUl3eRhA-cPt0mbofUq0TqSAbMnyMOmPdznvjUljnLgzjoC-vAok4z_wYdQ3MU6wY6T0NIFoOzu7TH-FyasTNcMe5wiA3O3_kM2g%3D%3D)

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08defe8a3cfa4299a467932fbf0b5cb0&_e=f0FYMX9Apk7nOY6t8nAgLNhsEoOEjEdKsImKAuqNl7nPPU6tmldRth8V75n991YZ-fISg4gchSErSUg8gu3tvPM2rvVO7GmZpH_ZsEKENHoFzxWB_7X5p9Hq5Mt18lE2uiHwzoj8uM82Fj9i1rXHEzF502jGzTbF-1Ian49xt7dWQjSGs6fFZ1cq1Y9jFs8Nng-xIcYvINa3w-RtOL0lUVfS9qCJ5Su5Nix_3-UxThaaIGR0KAb9WNko2TzeBEXZEJRvzem1DVwg0bPaCcygz0wZTNoal3koW4Q4qirDZdrpYj7Uo8GNyMBIRvhU448zAXFnaH4SFY22fjhKd23SHBaq1d-xSNivgiELi3wlU8KKvEJGvGNyAHP26TbZW1aQ2jdU77zaC0JlOkGIVXwWH8uBuTNDMmCKCTDgt-eZKpBQNiSOksd9w_Gd61meqfF9PKgzQBHA_3wCgYThPwuzAw%3D%3D "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. clean_body: 23 more monthly donors will help us hit our goal – will you be one of them? | | Friend, We set a goal last month to bring in 500 new monthly donors to help sustain our program into the election cycle ahead. We came so close to hitting our goal by April 30, but team, we fell 23 people short. = = = So much is at stake this year and next. Extremists in red states across the country are doing everything they can to ban abortion — even coming after ballot measures as a means to make it harder for voters to protect abortion access. Fueling up now — and having a constant, steady flow of funds until Election Day — sets us up to defend ballot measures against their attacks and kickstart our own 2023 + 2024 campaigns to safeguard reproductive health care, expand Medicaid coverage, raise wages, and more. = = Thank you for your support, Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . subject: Thank you so much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
I’m as energized as I’ve ever been to continue achieving for our community, and if you’re with me I hope I can continue to count on you.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62689287/404253472/-1892337098?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230502-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWZiZTY2ZjQtMjllOS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ByKMvepgXLTwUNcf_SPAqKwKAT3a4BBiZK8VPjmzz0U=)

| Peter,

I wanted to share a brief update and _**express my gratitude**_ for your ongoing support.

I know you receive a lot of messages from my team and me, and I can understand that it can be challenging to muster the energy to support a campaign right now.

But I continue to be astounded by this grassroots network’s commitment to my work in Congress. To me, it demonstrates just how passionate VA-07 is about policy that benefits our community and country at large.

I’m as energized as I’ve ever been to continue achieving for our community, _**and if you’re with me I hope I can continue to count on you.**_

Thank you again for your support,
Abigail
---

name: Quentin James, President and Co-Founder of The Collective PAC
subject: (please read), I have to explain something
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8efwwvYxKemKt2YGwTepkhQ4uQlGkudqvQtN64YTwrM8a-edvRw4ZN2C-t_i_efEEgU_3OtQJ9LE1PXd_KoCgE6boZM1wncSKc-s6yTqcttQB775KAVvlxjC-mZHQ1G8IpRVr4U3Afh2YgK1kxpoUXiIqiQxF1G8hscFBWwPVM9gIlbm1Qft3aF-uIXmc-BZBV8_5UHo6fJTkceyw6DZWBdXmRsGH9wmBTTGj9r1ruFlAw8qN_b9iASr4x38mla5dqeoAiSwbd1tOOzbC-2rGupujSROqikWW4lhlG2iEdAU/3vu/EYHWYQEWSY-FAL0Pk_Nb5g/h0/6B62ovvbmTdXUNnc2gzQjsf2HIyn3Iy2Xd6sa45gdEo)
| | I wanted to reach out to you personally to discuss our recent fundraising efforts. Despite our ambitious end of month goal of $15,000, we fell short.

So when we miss our fundraising goals, fewer folks get registered to vote, fewer folks get access to polls, and our candidates lose out on the resources they need to compete. All of which means **_fewer Black Democrats are elected into office._**

In 2023 — when voting rights and reproductive rights are being **_gutted by state legislatures_** and Kevin McCarthy and the House GOP are **_actively trying to strip millions of Black Americans of their healthcare access_** — it’s more important than ever that we hit our goals and help our candidates.

[So I’m asking you personally, Peter: Will you make a contribution of $10 or more to get off to a fast start in May and make up for our missed goal?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wcVmDVfjroFVbol-C41V4cUtwuvifKXz_6VTP12pkXQwX8t2xGtFywEIsGFUtiUuDPHSN-pKo-FFt0X_hwvCzhA8O8FDe-Kj0-CB_stkqed8PxJcE7Pp7mydAu37CHeh92ODGl0AorSlz_EsrMm-QFEubrkpA_ZNsxcDEDLRhWPrRSQ_acs_t0WTl-0GaH190yep1yYyur6TANzWE9Og134oZC09nam3HCKjGVTwqFZBpa2TbvpEdIGGIPuanZ01tg7F0smHKuDCHPiYbdO1NW49EkI-_2CK7Iq71aDPc1UmfJwT48KWIDFziiHje6iD9ni_Xvwi4MHnGE4Z4ApNOO7dk-LsSEfuaIuZVbB93u7tT97es3KKT1GjT7RQd7xOU/3vu/EYHWYQEWSY-FAL0Pk_Nb5g/h1/4yV_UafP3GriNcU6Bgd-CeVFedoZOw3RiSi2l4Q82ng)

Thank you for your support,

Quentin James
President and Co-Founder of The Collective PAC

* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLgHXhtUlc8779ZZcGzS4LV4xfnRL2dOY1Hex_kwuhMwcOUHGI7gPN_t3NQlZqPYUY2EE0nF-qQyvgASsgbY7vRENFCPCiRZsJVURzeqYUDFcOSwROMIWUfIjloaCRcIwjod9wfAz_eZbHqgOmIp89_yEeLA_j-Z5KD7GCxh--W5LRJzORMUW_zsNQJyzFtJiquq8CBFVZc9F_a0rMTPuHbkfjEfuJI1VJY-IcEE4IaH2-xxeQXTdc2v_uNjZgDF_kKV0j7GcZ5wpa1U6QaVWyhNeT3sh8abEnBNNJhDPRKc-A/3vu/EYHWYQEWSY-FAL0Pk_Nb5g/h2/J3ENISwaB7XQrfEuCENk2RvQzw25WkG7Asu-sd07WFk) | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | I wanted to reach out to you personally to discuss our recent fundraising efforts. Despite our ambitious end of month goal of $15,000, we fell short. So when we miss our fundraising goals, fewer folks get registered to vote, fewer folks get access to polls, and our candidates lose out on the resources they need to compete. All of which means fewer Black Democrats are elected into office. In 2023 — when voting rights and reproductive rights are being gutted by state legislatures and Kevin McCarthy and the House GOP are actively trying to strip millions of Black Americans of their healthcare access — it’s more important than ever that we hit our goals and help our candidates. Thank you for your support, Quentin James President and Co-Founder of The Collective PAC | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . Hey team, I know you’ve been hearing from me a lot over the past few days, but I just wanted to reach out to say thank you.

Thanks to the generosity of folks like you, we were able to reach our April fundraising goal! There’s truly nothing this grassroots team can’t do when we all come together.

The path to keeping OH-01 blue and restoring the Democratic House Majority certainly won’t be easy. But with this people-powered team by my side, I know we have what it takes to make history – _yet again_ – next November.

As always, thanks for being a part of this team. Means the world to be in this fight together.

Appreciate you,

Greg

| | |
---
_dpwillis67@gmail.com has been selected for a live poll.
Please respond immediately after opening this email._
**Friend: One year ago today, a draft decision overturning _Roe v. Wade_ was LEAKED. Since then, far-right extremists have launched an all-out war on reproductive rights, banning abortion in more than a dozen states across the country.**
But grassroots Americans like you have spent the last year rallying for reproductive freedoms, signing petitions, investing in Democratic campaigns, showing up at the ballot box and fighting to restore reproductive rights nationwide.
Now, as we head into another election cycle, it's time to show the anti-choice radicals that we won't let them win this fight – but we still haven't heard from you! **Please, before midnight tonight, respond to represent 43614 in our live poll and tell Congress where you stand:**
**Should Congress protect reproductive rights?**
