* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62708277/404293815/1575385346?code=jtk4124-su-nd&refcode=jtk4124-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWEzNTdjMS00YmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=suCX5xVLnKmr7pj0DgMA_YRMK8hs41QmSxyUk4RorSs=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62708278/404293816/1575385346?code=jtk4124-su-nd&refcode=jtk4124-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWEzNTdjMS00YmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=suCX5xVLnKmr7pj0DgMA_YRMK8hs41QmSxyUk4RorSs=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62708279/404293817/1575385346?code=jtk4124-su-nd&refcode=jtk4124-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWEzNTdjMS00YmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=suCX5xVLnKmr7pj0DgMA_YRMK8hs41QmSxyUk4RorSs=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: | | | dpwillis67@gmail.com has been selected for a live poll. Please respond immediately after opening this email. Friend: One year ago today, a draft decision overturning Roe v. Wade was LEAKED. Since then, far-right extremists have launched an all-out war on reproductive rights, banning abortion in more than a dozen states across the country. But grassroots Americans like you have spent the last year rallying for reproductive freedoms, signing petitions, investing in Democratic campaigns, showing up at the ballot box and fighting to restore reproductive rights nationwide. Now, as we head into another election cycle, it's time to show the anti-choice radicals that we won't let them win this fight – but we still haven't heard from you! Please, before midnight tonight, respond to represent 43614 in our live poll and tell Congress where you stand: Should Congress protect reproductive rights? | | | | 11:59 P.M. DEADLINE TO RESPOND | NEED 15 RESPONSES FROM 43614 | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

subject: Join the Movement
body:
Inclusivity, Women's Rights, Water Quality, and Democracy! | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/alfonsoforcongress.com/join-the-movement?e=16d812e81c)
---

**Join the Movement for Inclusivity, Women's Rights, Water Quality, and Democracy!**

In our campaign, we believe in a world where everyone's voice is heard, where women are empowered, where our environment is protected. And where democracy thrives. We are reaching out to you today to share our vision and invite you to join our mission.Inclusivity lies at the core of everything we do. We strive to create a society that embraces diversity, where individuals from all backgrounds are valued and respected.
By supporting Alfonso For Congress, you are contributing to a movement that champions inclusivity and advocates for equal opportunities for all.
We are passionate about fighting for women's rights and creating a society that empowers women. Our initiatives aim to break down barriers, challenge stereotypes, and promote gender equality in every aspect of life. By donating to our cause, you are directly supporting a campaign that uplift and empower women, fostering a brighter future for generations to come.
Water is a precious resource that sustains all life on Earth. We are dedicated to preserving and improving water quality in our communities. Through innovative projects, educational campaigns, and partnerships with local organizations, we strive to protect our water sources, ensuring access to clean and safe water. Your contribution will go directly towards our effect to implement sustainable solutions and raising awareness about the importance of water conservation.
Democracy is the cornerstone of a just society. However, it faces constant challenges and threats. We believe in defending and strengthening democratic principles to safeguard the rights and freedoms of all individuals. Your support will enable us to fight for fair elections, advocate for transparent governance, and empower citizens to actively participate in shaping their communities.
We cannot accomplish these goals alone. We need your support to create a lasting impact. By making a donation today, you become a vital part of our movement, standing up for inclusivity, women's rights, water quality, and democracy.
Here's how you can contribute:
1. Visit our website at alfonsoforcongress.com and click on the "Give Today" button to make a secure online donation. Every contribution, no matter the amount, makes a difference.
2. Share our mission with your friends, family, and colleagues. Help us spread the word by forwarding this email or sharing our social media posts.
3. Volunteer your time and skills. We always welcome passionate individuals who want to actively participate in our initiatives. Reach out to us to learn more about volunteer opportunities.

Thank you for considering supporting Alfonso For Congress. Together, we can make a significant impact in building an inclusive, equitable, and sustainable future.

With gratitude,
Alfonso Campaign Team
| [Give Today](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=1a59cbdf40&e=16d812e81c)

clean_body: Inclusivity, Women's Rights, Water Quality, and Democracy! | | | | | Join the Movement for Inclusivity, Women's Rights, Water Quality, and Democracy! In our campaign, we believe in a world where everyone's voice is heard, where women are empowered, where our environment is protected. And where democracy thrives. We are reaching out to you today to share our vision and invite you to join our mission.Inclusivity lies at the core of everything we do. We strive to create a society that embraces diversity, where individuals from all backgrounds are valued and respected. By supporting Alfonso For Congress, you are contributing to a movement that champions inclusivity and advocates for equal opportunities for all. We are passionate about fighting for women's rights and creating a society that empowers women. Our initiatives aim to break down barriers, challenge stereotypes, and promote gender equality in every aspect of life. By donating to our cause, you are directly supporting a campaign that uplift and empower women, fostering a brighter future for generations to come. Water is a precious resource that sustains all life on Earth. We are dedicated to preserving and improving water quality in our communities. Through innovative projects, educational campaigns, and partnerships with local organizations, we strive to protect our water sources, ensuring access to clean and safe water. Your contribution will go directly towards our effect to implement sustainable solutions and raising awareness about the importance of water conservation. Democracy is the cornerstone of a just society. However, it faces constant challenges and threats. We believe in defending and strengthening democratic principles to safeguard the rights and freedoms of all individuals. Your support will enable us to fight for fair elections, advocate for transparent governance, and empower citizens to actively participate in shaping their communities. We cannot accomplish these goals alone. We need your support to create a lasting impact. By making a donation today, you become a vital part of our movement, standing up for inclusivity, women's rights, water quality, and democracy. Here's how you can contribute: 1. Visit our website at alfonsoforcongress.com and click on the "Give Today" button to make a secure online donation. Every contribution, no matter the amount, makes a difference. 2. Share our mission with your friends, family, and colleagues. Help us spread the word by forwarding this email or sharing our social media posts. 3. Volunteer your time and skills. We always welcome passionate individuals who want to actively participate in our initiatives. Reach out to us to learn more about volunteer opportunities. Thank you for considering supporting Alfonso For Congress. Together, we can make a significant impact in building an inclusive, equitable, and sustainable future. With gratitude, Alfonso Campaign Team | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2023 Alfonso For Congress. All rights reserved. clean_body: What are they afraid of? | | | Friend, We’re now 2 DAYS into May, and the Biden campaign STILL HAS NOT ANNOUNCED their FIRST-MONTH fundraising haul for April. They haven’t said a word about fundraising. Could it be that Crooked Joe’s approval rating hit a RECORD LOW in April according to Gallup , so his April fundraising was horrendous? Here’s what I think is going on... ...Biden’s handlers know how much our campaign raised in JUST 24 hours when I was arrested, so they’re worried we outraised them during their announcement month! Now, they’re using the first two days of May to beg their special interest donors for more money and PAD their April numbers! Some might say that’s crooked. But we won’t let them get away with it. We need to go on a fundraising blitz over the next 24 hours. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States P.S. Biden’s campaign is funded by billionaire special interest donors, so it’s truly INCREDIBLE that our team of donors giving $1, $5, $24, $47 even has a shot at outraising Crooked Joe. NEVER underestimate the power of your contribution – no matter its size. . Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Sen. Sherrod Brown
subject: Can I tell you about my canary pin?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62696503/404259693/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk167-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDk4NTcxZi0yZmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=91xg14caOSWWu0mp9fyZM17cn6pMeRLiQp_Fo-BQzoI=)
Friend,

On the lapel of my suits (suits that I admit are sometimes rumpled), I wear a pin depicting a yellow canary in a birdcage. It was given to me decades ago by a Lorain steelworker at a Workers' Memorial Day rally – and to this day**, I wear this canary instead of the official Senate pin. Let me tell you why:**
In the early days of the 20th century, coal miners would bring canaries deep into the mines to warn them of poisonous gasses. Back then, workers didn't have a union strong enough or a government that _cared enough_ to protect them.
Together, we changed that. We passed worker safety laws and overtime pay. We banned child labor. We passed clean air and safe drinking water laws. We enacted Social Security and Medicare, and workers’ rights and women’s rights and civil rights. Because when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work, friend.
**I wear my canary pin as a symbol of all the progress we've made and as a reminder that our fight for the Dignity of Work – _all_ work – is far from over. ****This fight is why I'm running for reelection.**
**To defend my seat and keep up this important fight, I need grassroots support from folks like you. That's why I'm personally asking: **[Please, friend, will you give $5 or more now so we can win in Ohio, protect our Democratic Senate majority and continue making progress for workers and families across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62696514/404259694/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk167-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDk4NTcxZi0yZmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=91xg14caOSWWu0mp9fyZM17cn6pMeRLiQp_Fo-BQzoI=)
Thank you. I'm humbled to have folks like you standing alongside me in this fight.

In solidarity,

Sherrod
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62696516/404259695/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk167-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDk4NTcxZi0yZmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=91xg14caOSWWu0mp9fyZM17cn6pMeRLiQp_Fo-BQzoI=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: What’s your biggest concern right now?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We need to protect reproductive freedom. To ban assault weapons. Reform the Supreme Court. And abolish the filibuster.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2173%2E5257348%2EE1nwVR)
Derek,
As I’ve been hitting the road traveling the Golden State, the voters I meet with share many of my concerns.
We need to protect reproductive freedom. To ban assault weapons. Reform the Supreme Court. And abolish the filibuster.
We also need stronger ethical standards. A ban on congressional stock trading. A constitutional amendment overturning _Citizens United_.
**[If you share these concerns or just want to share a few of your own, I hope you’ll take a minute to fill out my team’s May Issues Survey:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230502-may-issues-survey.wQXzfh&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC30_20230502_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=2173%2E5257348%2EE1nwVR)**

body:
It's been just one year since the leak that would change reproductive rights
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62700147/404262011/2120995782?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.05.02_B1_Roe-Leak_Main-90o_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjdlODRlYS0zMWU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gAQBlnWuVptxapBgLPWS3-D3QkLpgm1GvjEPQa3Yk28=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62700148/404262012/2120995782?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.05.02_B1_Roe-Leak_Main-90o_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjdlODRlYS0zMWU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gAQBlnWuVptxapBgLPWS3-D3QkLpgm1GvjEPQa3Yk28=) Folks,

A year ago, an opinion leaked from the Supreme Court that weeks later would overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , a 50-year precedent that protected millions of Americans' right to an abortion.

If we weren't fighting an uphill battle before _Roe_ was overturned, we are definitely fighting one now. Extremist politicians across the country are introducing new restrictions and blocking any laws attempting to put reproductive freedom back into the hands of Americans.

**_[But Lisa has never – _and will never_ – stop fighting for safe and legal abortion access. In this post-_Roe_ era, it's never been more critical to elect pro-choice champions like Lisa to Washington, especially now that anti-choice Republicans have the House majority. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: URGENT: 4,211 signatures needed to help save vulnerable polar bears from Big Oil
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1753262?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | A hungry lone polar bear scours the Arctic water for something to eat. She’s suffering from starvation and malnutrition and is too weak to keep paddling. As she desperately grasps onto the nearest ice patch that has melted offshore like a liferaft, she drifts along the water, hoping to make it back to land... Due to human-driven global warming, the Arctic is melting **_TWICE as fast_** as the rest of the world. Within the next 31 years, scientists predict the region will be **completely ice-free,** and _**polar bears will completely lose their fragile habitat.**_ As a result, polar bears are clinging to survival, and the Southern Beaufort Sea population is the **_most imperiled in the world,_** with _**only 900**_ of these beloved animals remaining. Now, the Biden administration has just approved a rule allowing increased oil and gas activities in the Arctic, putting this vulnerable species at even great risk of _**EXTINCTION.**_[**Please don’t let Big Oil WIPE OUT these endangered polar bears. Act now before it’s too late! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1753263?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1753264?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
If this new administrative rule is enacted, the fossil fuel industry will have FREE REIGN to bombard the Arctic with **reckless oil drilling and massive construction** \--_bringing in industrial-size vessel traffic, harmful noise and air pollution, and toxic waste into delicate polar bear habitats._
This increase in oil and gas activity will drive away**critical food sources,** disrupt**bear denning sites,** and could even **impair polar bear survival mechanisms,** such as their ability to feed, hunt, and tend to their baby bear cubs.
The U.S. The Fish and Wildlife Service has confirmed a _**95% probability**_ that this new oil and gas activity will cause serious _**injury or death to polar bears!**_
_**So why has FWS swept these findings under the rug, Friend?**_ It’s time for FWS to do the right thing and hold Big Oil accountable for threatening the fate of innocent polar bears. [**But if we’re going to apply enough public pressure and help save our precious polar bears, we need 4,211 more environmentalists like you to speak up before 11:59 P.M. Add your name now to tell FWS: No more dirty energy handouts! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1753265?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1753264?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Your voice is critical in this fight,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: State Freedom Caucus Network
subject: Gender Madness in Montana
body:
It was a wild week for Freedom Caucuses all over America. From Montana to Illinois, our brave legislators made national headlines taking on some of the most destructive political forces in America. They delivered wins for you - our supporters - without whom none of this would be possible. [Unsubscribe](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_s=68bec25b8ce34394909c9bdc3ee399bd&_t=I0NQZs7WSHbdkI-Kix2YoR7Dykl7IgoRga3PIg5gD0Js97LeV0s2QXb7oEy2L2tiR0mx-2j2jnxv0VafEjrcDfO6CxxoIzTCCa4FdWPKQuI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_s=68bec25b8ce34394909c9bdc3ee399bd&_t=I0NQZs7WSHbdkI-Kix2YoR7Dykl7IgoRga3PIg5gD0Js97LeV0s2QXb7oEy2L2tiR0mx-2j2jnxv0VafEjrcDfO6CxxoIzTCCa4FdWPKQuI%3D)

| | |
---
Friends, It was a wild week for Freedom Caucuses all over America. From Montana to Illinois, our brave legislators made national headlines taking on some of the most destructive political forces in America. They delivered wins for you - our supporters - without whom none of this would be possible. Here's a recap of what happened. **Montana:** The MT Freedom Caucus was in the crosshairs of the liberal media this week as their battle to ban pediatric gender mutilation received widespread national attention. Specific attention was paid to their push to censure transgender Democrat Rep. Zooey Zephyr for breaking the rules on decorum when he told them they would have "blood on their hands" for banning sex changes for children. LGBT activists even [stormed](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=68bec25b8ce34394909c9bdc3ee399bd&_e=rLUBP4CPPbklQxE4RwQEX4sT3JnaJ-ut7uzwqq53uj7h-Ng_ol5KHbwVO3-U791V-Pr9PMMOOjr0XJZTw5MOemo9HnZKRGdE44m-K-aP8qA2ZKGHsQ1WX37r74RGf-swbyZsspOMGMu_mf-3OrGbyC4b1pPmB044Smf8yRYjgQg_tFH8n1mxqktd8_mDyND9BLcryo9bEKj_40_ym-_Yq1OURwNAZNje8QydZwncT0pspGoujqaV0HjgK3M-gbSU) the state capitol to protest the MTFC holding Rep. Zephyr accountable for breaking the rules. National media also [seized](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=68bec25b8ce34394909c9bdc3ee399bd&_e=rLUBP4CPPbklQxE4RwQEX3VuAgnpO2E9Lg3xdcz0ASJDF4Las2NUJvpyuHlH12HV708QbWP42JogELXxWFTTr2tjowjGoDPKLOResvPVU8N50Ll95js__m3vhdZTKJ2hVYp56Jxuk-jB6a-YhbHIPoSkFIXEtnvpN-3vhkHE71TCUMYRs_VX2HWwJcMGAXVtfVPBUxlH2VQZErhs9V3wwM35M5ecUOzu7DIPWvQQophfwkRVVfLqIbtZ141Y491H) on the fact that the MT Freedom Caucus refused to use the "right" pronouns for Rep. Zephyr in their press releases. **The self-righteous liberal media decided the controversy was not children getting their bodies mutilated but that the MT Freedom Caucus called a man a man.** At the end of the day, Gov. Greg Gianforte signed SB99 into law, making Montana the 15th state in America to ban this cruel act of child mutilation. So much national attention was focused on the MT Freedom Caucus's role in this fight that the Associated Press decided to write [a piece](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=68bec25b8ce34394909c9bdc3ee399bd&_e=rLUBP4CPPbklQxE4RwQEX7y8UcQlh-u1sBZa2doc-Y8iTOq9stlbnSWnlHfVhaXv3FsMYRPpXRhpn3CL3ZEbxDpekCA6dkgNLnppzjKt3XD6AuydGb3JQIOY9xBcprjeomgYCTso9M89SK1bNS6tAjsv5P4t4L9KaW2m-IMAEBd5phNkav32GXCKBkYC1z8-XhMbzEP88xBjANdOCgsifpv-ZwobItGd2XBSywwM7k1RwIqUmRDXHQETMOPtRuIz2DPZbcb0XC3a373b_KnQArkeROBWeg6aWgWqQUlkqJM%3D) examining the new rise of our state freedom caucuses. Key excerpt:
> The majority of the 11 states with caucuses are controlled by Republican governors and Legislatures. Roth said that's by design. The national network advises its state members to "be loud" against Republicans who have compromised on fiscal and cultural conservative principles, Roth said. Freedom caucuses from Idaho to Pennsylvania have focused on abortion, crime and how race, gender and sexuality are navigated in schools and state offices. They've also frequently targeted what Roth called "corporate welfare" including tax incentives designed to lure Hollywood film productions to Wyoming.
**Louisiana:** The gender madness didn't end in Montana as the LAFC also battled the pronoun mafia this week in their attempts to protect children. The legislature held hearings on [bills](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=68bec25b8ce34394909c9bdc3ee399bd&_e=rLUBP4CPPbklQxE4RwQEX4sT3JnaJ-ut7uzwqq53uj7h-Ng_ol5KHbwVO3-U791VX3G56mx7Kr-7AAN4fBegCTt2JB3oSzJXw9t7rzcpykyObWl-CiPM114hqEr1V4-60Wdh9_T3-rtsl7tb8MSzo5P9F2vmx2IIZE_y03JgSIyz0bJy_3aFI47RdltXQrblkCc0qG1nIzJMSceQfZLG6QxhLTy5CruFESbdAJdyrvox5w0jSkqQYS_t9HMNWq_o) to ban teachers from sexualizing children in the classroom and from using a different name or pronoun for a child without the consent of the parents. Several LGBT activists testified during the hearing including a drag queen wearing blue face who [called](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=68bec25b8ce34394909c9bdc3ee399bd&_e=rLUBP4CPPbklQxE4RwQEX4sT3JnaJ-ut7uzwqq53uj7h-Ng_ol5KHbwVO3-U791Vn6gBM7gx79eYEMTbh5a2m4zUpZxLKzPM5M1J-xJOo0BRkFzKb38LQQq-Qn0CJfU0cDTghP9oDUWxY2hV5_hA4tbv5Wmkn-HiNTW4j17U4HQsRj1_vIc8fexVsUcvkf2QTbOz3rzrWno1P7qB5HThOEvDEFjSqzwaVncCDSDoXrC08En7MYLwAaXgPWMIRp2_) himself "big gay baby." [ ](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F4d71f562-06a6-46c9-acca-54fc115e8413_978x548.png) Just another week in paradise... **Illinois:** It's been three years since COVID began and insane restrictions are still in place in many places across America. The most ridiculous example of it lately: A 16-year-old kid in Illinois failed his driving test because he refused to wear a mask. Even hospitals in Illinois have stopped requiring masks but you still have to wear one for a test to receive your driver's license? In response, the IL Freedom Caucus immediately called for the Secretary of State to remove this ridiculous policy. Later that same day, the government complied. The mask mandate will end this month. Freedom Caucuses will always defend your rights. **Arizona:** Democrats got especially weird in Arizona this week as a liberal lawmaker was [caught on camera](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=68bec25b8ce34394909c9bdc3ee399bd&_e=rLUBP4CPPbklQxE4RwQEX8mkw9FZjJ_30GYbI69zJozfxpuSDVk5iiLix5LIIIVV4kykg4HtfSkl69A9D1r6paRzvcakC-OK8hVb6-ng3X1KZaclQw5z6hiW7mQFtA8YlvyYMQUCz8yC2KvbLjWV1txDIBMJWRTPvcHYCM4unKmHWURyLakYtOJ3YzGo_W5xOdtUZ_kCzsIvTe6i1KDq6ARcls6WyD9pfHAscoVZKVt6GVUKtBNkvmgeEtZhGNCe) swiping Bibles from the House members-only lounge, calling it a "little playful commentary" for separation of church and state. Attacks on faith like this should never be tolerated and the AZFC right away began pushing GOP leadership for consequences. **South Carolina:** Parents in South Carolina had a major victory this week as the House and Senate passed a [bill](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=68bec25b8ce34394909c9bdc3ee399bd&_e=rLUBP4CPPbklQxE4RwQEXwJX5-7CnTURhRxUZLJaEn-PJjo1haGDq-GHaUyeKlNY57Qx7p3ZkJZ9cfUKOhI_gpvy_f6YjQvGqIq7BP8HsrN35J8lEh6lgbS0vbbZA5RpiUwcEDjx5FK3SNSaUb9rum4pdWrzpJCWp5-5x9BXN5vDojqCa-W4OYGVhE3Ip7wCljsY69rlefPMMeiLIpPcg3VOZa1nD_MB79JiHo-fnXJBuN0g67fRM31AzfsNyd7e) to finally expand school choice in the state. It now heads to Gov. Henry McMaster's desk for signature. This never would have happened without the SCFC who relentlessly kept pushing the issue. **Pennsylvania:** Like South Carolina, the PA Freedom Caucus is also pushing for school choice in the Keystone State. Read this [op-ed](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=68bec25b8ce34394909c9bdc3ee399bd&_e=rLUBP4CPPbklQxE4RwQEXxXuI6DLhJT2UqrjXFCShgpw_yFWJeyzTRSRKk8BxhFnr66hX6ppjjEwyBcSwWhkreILfO-KO-wOez2kLAn3OMpj-iAVWxu_DcwOxMZG4Gd2fY83DMV7OpBPFbIeYgG9ne0v-aZLuAURq_t3Jt8keySWtH8NlGvABZASmdl3MGSFrdjyvoUTGO4_9nxz7_E0-Z15G-LowMqFNBqPfow2uRC3eOMX-5D3Fy4PQgjO7KhiwZxATyhxhXH_gizFAaBsTvFAkiNnQEpTuwj1fRrPKwQ%3D) from Freedom Caucus member Rep. Joe D'Orsie calling on Gov. Josh Shapiro to follow through when he said during the campaign that "parents need to have the opportunity to put their children into the best place for them to succeed." **JOIN THE FIGHT** Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. There are two ways you can help: **1.[Subscribe](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=68bec25b8ce34394909c9bdc3ee399bd&_e=rLUBP4CPPbklQxE4RwQEX-zKy4DnyTdxKgflhsH34YBxwUdtFmTGJq_sS24aR3Vq1RNhV2kcvORfURjAQ3MWQ0FVN_uUc3ABCHFSotidKqTiN7eWRyXTo3CyFI6uykXn-cpYDuPFJYn793HeoRlpW9EFvXO5c3ETMxMfxpoBfIPdx0iljPNJ1veSbx1_G18XUYlM7izaQ0mOx_ksh7Rn0w%3D%3D) to our free newsletter.** **2.[Make a contribution](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=68bec25b8ce34394909c9bdc3ee399bd&_e=rLUBP4CPPbklQxE4RwQEX1Uievku6rExwEMXLdiOxusuqx_LUZla_4LX_fuFK8R3uC4Sks_7uC-TGSvMMRCDFAxZaN-tITl872XVQIFjkhjcq3kiWGUb6jn5-uCGnbijID6AJzs4KUUxWpQEgDmkQ6qcYn3PN5mbmCB1bslINOe0GgeGIQyM4FzVW-yxcPRoM62_PsqU7H13x-zeA5OZBS4puZMlQ1hmizCNLQEruYuYOfYAJp5oj6gGZq_jjIXe2ZdCOslrA73VgoAFT4g9Xg%3D%3D) to help us advance the cause of liberty.** Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for freedom across the nation. **Keep fighting,**

From Montana to Illinois, our brave legislators made national headlines taking on some of the most destructive political forces in America. They delivered wins for you - our supporters - without whom none of this would be possible. | | | | Friends, It was a wild week for Freedom Caucuses all over America. From Montana to Illinois, our brave legislators made national headlines taking on some of the most destructive political forces in America. They delivered wins for you - our supporters - without whom none of this would be possible. Here's a recap of what happened. Montana: The MT Freedom Caucus was in the crosshairs of the liberal media this week as their battle to ban pediatric gender mutilation received widespread national attention. Specific attention was paid to their push to censure transgender Democrat Rep. Zooey Zephyr for breaking the rules on decorum when he told them they would have "blood on their hands" for banning sex changes for children. LGBT activists even the state capitol to protest the MTFC holding Rep. Zephyr accountable for breaking the rules. National media also on the fact that the MT Freedom Caucus refused to use the "right" pronouns for Rep. Zephyr in their press releases. The self-righteous liberal media decided the controversy was not children getting their bodies mutilated but that the MT Freedom Caucus called a man a man. At the end of the day, Gov. Greg Gianforte signed SB99 into law, making Montana the 15th state in America to ban this cruel act of child mutilation. So much national attention was focused on the MT Freedom Caucus's role in this fight that the Associated Press decided to write examining the new rise of our state freedom caucuses. Key excerpt: The majority of the 11 states with caucuses are controlled by Republican governors and Legislatures. Roth said that's by design. The national network advises its state members to "be loud" against Republicans who have compromised on fiscal and cultural conservative principles, Roth said. Freedom caucuses from Idaho to Pennsylvania have focused on abortion, crime and how race, gender and sexuality are navigated in schools and state offices. They've also frequently targeted what Roth called "corporate welfare" including tax incentives designed to lure Hollywood film productions to Wyoming. Louisiana: The gender madness didn't end in Montana as the LAFC also battled the pronoun mafia this week in their attempts to protect children. The legislature held hearings on to ban teachers from sexualizing children in the classroom and from using a different name or pronoun for a child without the consent of the parents. Several LGBT activists testified during the hearing including a drag queen wearing blue face who himself "big gay baby." Just another week in paradise... Illinois: It's been three years since COVID began and insane restrictions are still in place in many places across America. The most ridiculous example of it lately: A 16-year-old kid in Illinois failed his driving test because he refused to wear a mask. Even hospitals in Illinois have stopped requiring masks but you still have to wear one for a test to receive your driver's license? In response, the IL Freedom Caucus immediately called for the Secretary of State to remove this ridiculous policy. Later that same day, the government complied. The mask mandate will end this month. Freedom Caucuses will always defend your rights. Arizona: Democrats got especially weird in Arizona this week as a liberal lawmaker was swiping Bibles from the House members-only lounge, calling it a "little playful commentary" for separation of church and state. Attacks on faith like this should never be tolerated and the AZFC right away began pushing GOP leadership for consequences. South Carolina: Parents in South Carolina had a major victory this week as the House and Senate passed a to finally expand school choice in the state. It now heads to Gov. Henry McMaster's desk for signature. This never would have happened without the SCFC who relentlessly kept pushing the issue. Pennsylvania: Like South Carolina, the PA Freedom Caucus is also pushing for school choice in the Keystone State. Read this from Freedom Caucus member Rep. Joe D'Orsie calling on Gov. Josh Shapiro to follow through when he said during the campaign that "parents need to have the opportunity to put their children into the best place for them to succeed." body:
First Ron DeSantis and now Betsy DeVos...?
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62702265/404263284/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGI3MGIwMy0zNGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZkTsCsDAXn237XyymwexRo1TsKSrLS3aikKKk84SwyM=) | Team,

**FIRST:** Florida's extremist Governor, Ron DeSantis, came to the Buckeye State to rally support ahead of an expected presidential run in 2024.

**THEN:** Disgraced former Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos — _who supported gutting funds for Ohio public schools during the Trump administration_ — announced she'll be speaking at an event in Ohio this evening.

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62702470/404263400/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20230502_PT_xylazine_0_3MO_TeamPanetta_NA_NA_xylazine&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWRmNTI0OS0zNGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykVPXIMpJeQLvm3PorY6NF53bs-btNSIl_pagS0jc-s=&emci=1fdf5249-34e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=2adf5249-34e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

A frightening and dangerous new street drug called **xylazine** is proliferating across our communities.

Xylazine is used by veterinarians and cattlemen to sedate horses, cows, and other large animals. It’s also known as the **“zombie drug”** because drug dealers now are mixing it with fentanyl and selling it on the streets. This combination is highly addictive and can actually cause flesh to deteriorate at injection site, if it doesn’t kill the user first.

In response to this newest threat during an opioid crisis involving more overdose deaths every day, **Jimmy authored, introduced, and is leading a bipartisan bill called the Combating Illicit Xylazine Act**. The bill will ban xylazine for human use and increase penalties against drug dealers who sell it.

**Jimmy is advancing his bill through Congress** with the support of lawmakers on both sides of the aisle and in both chambers of Congress.

His bill recently caught the attention of the Biden Administration, which has directed the Office of National Drug Control Policy to declare xylazine an emerging threat. This is an important designation that will give law enforcement the tools it needs to immediately deal with this threat.

However, we have more work to do, including passing Jimmy’s bill. [Peter, sign your name today if you support Jimmy and his work to pass his bill, the Combating Illicit Xylazine Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62702471/404263401/1620268177?source=EM_NBI_JP_20230502_PT_xylazine_0_3MO_TeamPanetta_NA_NA_xylazine&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWRmNTI0OS0zNGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykVPXIMpJeQLvm3PorY6NF53bs-btNSIl_pagS0jc-s=&emci=1fdf5249-34e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=2adf5249-34e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6108787)

Thank you,

Team Panetta

| | | Fellow American, **Our****EXTENDED DEADLINE** **is[TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT...](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=3716a7293a07428e9e75080f85db82d1&_e=Z6n8qwKz0_oQIv5_stXBvzvM_A-kbC5e5BY_82DpGDXmxnJBlTtp4QeGH017byR6-mwFOOgJ3wj_tktjxVqCSrhfISySBNjhIt_oXf75IPWhaQhvVqhdZ51SvRT-S78M9G-0CpFOkr6ivhfjtQBg0Uspdx8Hdjka2EKqlpXIRDMNHLoIsnyqhTwejQj9zRvqh_zxO3xrICEn4nSqx0DVQhvlJg9Gnjb3hw0gd69UKsoDYYVcZ1pixSwOrZ2UkAxjvezwaFEn44P_3XrUOABH688dkgV-Et6CT9EZVw2QCBE_JFqqQbro0gsflLi89ULlIiJnHT8U2ewAOQ6jv6G6ZsTmEQvyJSWjk2Ba421yWq24YBixUaFHiDhkP53lkgP1) **
_**...and only 124 of our top 250 patriots have stepped up.**_

name: Felix Frisch
subject: a 24,000-mile father-son road trip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
Hey there. It’s Felix Frisch – Adam Frisch’s son.
When my dad told us that he was going to run against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I did what most 16-year-olds would do: I took a year off from school to be involved in the campaign.

Technically, I went “online” for school – and yes, I definitely missed all my friends. But I wouldn’t go back and change it for the world.

My dad and I hitched a trailer to our red pickup truck and crisscrossed the entire district, taking turns at the wheel. He shook hands with voters, while I organized 130 interns virtually to make 700,000 phone calls for the campaign.

It felt like a 24,000-mile father-son road trip; just my dad, me... and the thousands of people we met at every stop along the way.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62704292/404265751/-321553144?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2532-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhMWM1YzY1LTM1ZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5HPmJnxaCpUhtWRIaixyzPt9CcS63hQre4EGDMZwXUA=)
The campaign was hard. My sister and I knew they’d probably make up and say a lot of false things about our dad. But hearing and seeing the lies all over TV and social media is another thing entirely.

It was all worth it, though. We made hundreds of stops, met so many people, ate so much good food... And Dad came so close to winning and defeating Boebert! It was an experience I’ll never forget.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62704293/404265753/-321553144?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2532-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhMWM1YzY1LTM1ZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5HPmJnxaCpUhtWRIaixyzPt9CcS63hQre4EGDMZwXUA=)
Now, Dad’s running again, and I know that, with your help, he _will_ defeat Lauren Boebert this time.

**[It means a lot to our entire family that people like you have got his back. So if you can, please split a donation now between my dad Adam Frisch’s campaign and American Bridge PAC and help him defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62704294/404265754/-321553144?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2532-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhMWM1YzY1LTM1ZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5HPmJnxaCpUhtWRIaixyzPt9CcS63hQre4EGDMZwXUA=)**
__If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Frisch and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately:__ | | | [Donate $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62704295/404265755/-321553144?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=jtk2532-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhMWM1YzY1LTM1ZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5HPmJnxaCpUhtWRIaixyzPt9CcS63hQre4EGDMZwXUA=)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62704296/404265756/-321553144?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk2532-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhMWM1YzY1LTM1ZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5HPmJnxaCpUhtWRIaixyzPt9CcS63hQre4EGDMZwXUA=)

Felix

body:
In case you missed the interview.
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kU-PmzAQxT-NuYGcMdjmwGF3rRyKVKk9NNteoon_JLPCBoFZtN--Ikr2-ntPo_fTYJwGCl8dU68M4EZuYQBMvDCAvn59_yn7U2_KX71WpZFNve0pvDGA_DX57-rjSuUj0rBTZQrXgdVgbeG7g9SCy6YWvLh1dbgEedFtaFHChTdWg0KtWq4aHoLSBXXAQfCGA8CBg65QXGpoHeetla3wgdV8o1S5MeHgPvK8xqmyYyyG7pbztNwnHRkcF2_X2Vcbpdm7vbEz_PQlRj-TxfJjpJTLsCY3Iy2UrqUdY6ScvWdwTHZAx33AWrWHcOAgkInjmuM5ekdrZMI8fOUOl3GdrWfCWDrjg1mME9I1MWGeTs9kTNmnzITRWjYM5DkN5Jgw_97N39Nn--dlvcP7R4TxvD-9bfj7RzF3btpoGGiRitX8ui_Y3f4HAAD__4Z6jN4)

Friend,
I recently sat down with Steve Bannon to talk about our campaign’s America First platform.
_**He asked me if I still would’ve run for president back in June 2015 if I had known what the Deep State would do to me and my family.**_
I answered, _**“ABSOLUTELY.”**_
Even right now, I could close down my presidential campaign tomorrow and all of the many witch hunts and political persecutions would magically disappear overnight.
_**But the battle to save America is worth the hell they’ve put me through.**_
Friend, I always knew the Deep State would put a bull’s eye on my back for vowing to take on the Washington machine that has bled our country dry.
_**They hate me because I’m a political outsider who fights for the men and women of the country who’ve been ruthlessly abandoned by the Washington ruling class.**_
But, there have been many other great patriots who’ve dutifully run for president before, so there’s something about _our movement_ that’s different...
...And that difference is **YOU.**
**The Swamp knows I’ve flat out REJECTED the TAINTED money that comes from special interest donors and instead turned to millions of patriots like YOU for support.**
_Your $1, $5, $10, $15, $24, $47 terrify the powers that be, because it PROVES that the American people can stand united and take back the reins of our country. _
**[If you’re not doing poorly right now, please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA for 1,500% impact.](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuYHM2IA5cGjWyqGoVdvL9hZN7CGZLTYUTNH--4oou9fvPY3ep8Ewjzy8d6I5CYA7-1UACPVFAPT69Pt73b_2Nv_Zmya3daX3I4UXAZDeZ_qsPq8UFJDHgzY28x04A85l1JW1UbKutJLZvUOjS6OUB6kbA6XUV2ilJnlF5Vxjqow7kKBkJQGglGAKVFcNrZeydXWraBBa7hwLP0Uc_VtatjAXbgrZ2N1TmtfHpLOA80puW6jYOS7kj8bB8B_lGGhhh_nbxDHlwxb9grxyvOVuCoFTIhJwjm5EL2lA3bTlUEpQKNR5S-ESyPMWhLJP3_qA67QtjoSyji_4ZA7DjHyLQtkPp49kioliEsoaU1cC6ksc2Qtl_5zSt-sP_RfjAz4-oizJ_vVlx19fs6Xz887jyGvdCC1vx4LD7X8AAAD__5S3jFU)**

clean_body: In case you missed the interview. | | | Friend, I recently sat down with Steve Bannon to talk about our campaign’s America First platform. He asked me if I still would’ve run for president back in June 2015 if I had known what the Deep State would do to me and my family. I answered, “ABSOLUTELY.” Even right now, I could close down my presidential campaign tomorrow and all of the many witch hunts and political persecutions would magically disappear overnight. But the battle to save America is worth the hell they’ve put me through. Friend, I always knew the Deep State would put a bull’s eye on my back for vowing to take on the Washington machine that has bled our country dry. They hate me because I’m a political outsider who fights for the men and women of the country who’ve been ruthlessly abandoned by the Washington ruling class. But, there have been many other great patriots who’ve dutifully run for president before, so there’s something about our movement that’s different... ...And that difference is YOU. The Swamp knows I’ve flat out REJECTED the TAINTED money that comes from special interest donors and instead turned to millions of patriots like YOU for support. Your $1, $5, $10, $15, $24, $47 terrify the powers that be, because it PROVES that the American people can stand united and take back the reins of our country. | | [Pictured: President Trump sitting down with Steve Bannon at Mar-a-Lago in a recent interview] Thank you, | Donald J. Our team works tirelessly to ensure activists and donors -- like you -- only receive the amount of information they’re comfortable with. But we haven’t heard from you yet! | |

It’s no secret: We send a lot of emails, Derek. The reason is that emails -- like the one you’re reading right now -- are one of the most powerful ways for grassroots activists to get involved in the work of our party. name: Replace Sinema
subject: Who Sinema is repping in the Senate
body:

Friend, it’s Raul. I know you’ve had to endure a flooded inbox these last few days, but I just wanted to reach out and say **_thank you!_**

Your support, and the support of hundreds of grassroots supporters across our district (_and the country!_) has made a critical impact in the early days of our re-election campaign.

Whether you stepped up with a donation of $1, $5, or $100 – I can’t thank you enough, nor begin to explain the lasting impact you’ll have on this race.

Folks, this race will only get more challenging from here as we fend off relentless attacks from National Republicans aiming to undo all the progress we’ve made.

But today – and every day – I’m confident that their efforts to defeat our movement will fail. Not because of the partisan lean of our district, or because of any fundraising measure, **_but because of grassroots supporters like you._**

You’ve always had my back, friend, and for that I can’t thank you enough.

Onward!

clean_body: We would not be here without you | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Friend, it’s Raul. I know you’ve had to endure a flooded inbox these last few days, but I just wanted to reach out and say thank you! Your support, and the support of hundreds of grassroots supporters across our district (and the country!) has made a critical impact in the early days of our re-election campaign. Whether you stepped up with a donation of $1, $5, or $100 – I can’t thank you enough, nor begin to explain the lasting impact you’ll have on this race. Folks, this race will only get more challenging from here as we fend off relentless attacks from National Republicans aiming to undo all the progress we’ve made. But today – and every day – I’m confident that their efforts to defeat our movement will fail. Not because of the partisan lean of our district, or because of any fundraising measure, but because of grassroots supporters like you. You’ve always had my back, friend, and for that I can’t thank you enough. Onward! Dr. Raul Ruiz | | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]Hey there, it’s Josh.

I’ll get right to it: we fell short of our fundraising goals last month. That means we have to work even harder in May to make up the gap. The good news is that I know this team can do it.

Let me tell you why this matters. Contributions from grassroots supporters like you make all the difference in competitive districts like mine. In a time when our country is more divided than ever, it has never been more important to elect bipartisan leadership and reject far-right extremism.

Thank you for your dedication to our mission. Supporters like you are truly the most important members of our team.

Talk soon,

Josh

P.S. If you want to help us get May off to a strong start, consider chipping in today by clicking here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2305?amount=]
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Team Cori
subject: Our fight for environmental justice is 24/7
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
In 2020, Missouri was the second largest emitter of sulfur dioxide and nitrogen oxides in the nation.
#
Peter,
Last week, Cori and Rep. Emmanuel Cleaver called on the Environmental Protection Agency's Region 7 Office — the office that protects the environment and health of communities in Missouri and several other states — to implement a Federal Implementation Plan (FIP) to protect vulnerable communities from the increasingly costly consequences of air pollution.
In 2020, Missouri was the **_second largest emitter**_ of sulfur dioxide and nitrogen oxides in the country. While Missouri has its own "State Implementation Plan" — **_it does not**_ make any meaningful attempts to reduce the pollution that causes harmful haze, essentially making it useless.
Power plant pollution has a deep impact on the health of our communities by exacerbating respiratory illnesses and shortening lifespans. Oftentimes, those most impacted are from Black, brown, and low-income communities who do not have the resources to adequately fight back.
**[From the start, our people-powered movement has taken the lead on fighting environmental racism and demanding bold action to address the climate crisis. Will you stand with us today by chippoing in $5 — or any amount you can to help power Cori's climate and racial justice work in Congress?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230502.ERjkfM&refcode=em20230502-2618&t=1&akid=2618%2E1082990%2ERL2mak)**
**[Donate](https://act.coribush.org/go/2532?c0=cori-em-20230502.BuUGuN&refcode=em20230502-2618&t=2&akid=2618%2E1082990%2ERL2mak)**
This is a crisis of great magnitude and we cannot wait any longer for empty solutions. Communities are hurting because of a lack of funding and government support for comprehensive climate and environmental action.
**That's why Cori was key in securing the passage of the Environmental Justice Mapping and Data Collect Action** last year and has always been a strong advocate for the Green New Deal and a Green New Deal for Cities that would lead our communities toward a brighter environmental future.
**[It's vital that we do more to address the climate crisis and work toward bold and comprehensive solutions. Can you pitch in today to stand with our movement's fight to secure a better climate future?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230502.ERjkfM&refcode=em20230502-2618&t=3&akid=2618%2E1082990%2ERL2mak)**
**[Donate](https://act.coribush.org/go/2532?c0=cori-em-20230502.BuUGuN&refcode=em20230502-2618&t=22&akid=2618%2E1082990%2ERL2mak)**
In solidarity,
— Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230502?refcode=em20230502-2618-footer&t=23&refcode2=2618_1082990_RL2mak&akid=2618%2E1082990%2ERL2mak) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.

Peter,

I just got a call from my fundraising team, and to put it simply, **I need your help.** We’re behind on our 1,000 donor planting season goal and need a serious boost in donations today to catch up.

This is the last thing I wanted to hear since Sharla and I are busy finishing up prepping equipment and getting everything ready to start planting. So unless you're willing to get your hands dirty and spend 16 hours on a tractor with us, I need your help chipping in whatever you can.

The Democratic Party of Georgia figured they’d help me out by making sure my message goes as far as it can. I think they just didn’t want to send someone out to hop on a tractor with us, but I’ll take their help.

[**_Any amount you can contribute early in the campaign goes a long way in helping us grow our movement and reach these critical fundraising goals. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62705402/404267726/-1883314608?refcode=20230502.2_JT_5D&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjg4NGM1Mi0zOWU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T6QR9CsoiBSk5Ty9T7ahq3pxLp1nwvhbyLfndXUjwd8=)

Jon

clean_body: | | | | = Peter, I just got a call from my fundraising team, and to put it simply, I need your help. We’re behind on our 1,000 donor planting season goal and need a serious boost in donations today to catch up. This is the last thing I wanted to hear since Sharla and I are busy finishing up prepping equipment and getting everything ready to start planting. So unless you're willing to get your hands dirty and spend 16 hours on a tractor with us, I need your help chipping in whatever you can. The Democratic Party of Georgia figured they’d help me out by making sure my message goes as far as it can. I think they just didn’t want to send someone out to hop on a tractor with us, but I’ll take their help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Reaching our goal of 1,000 grassroots donors is vital. It shows National Republicans and their shady dark money groups that we have momentum and a strong team of everyday people supporting our movement. I'm incredibly grateful for your support and am fired up to win so I can keep fighting for all Montanans in the U.S. Senate. Alright, I'll get back to prepping for planting before Sharla starts wondering where I am; thanks again! Jon | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

name: Our Revolution
subject: Bernie is blocking all nominees who don’t support lower drug prices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/demand_lower_drug_prices_pt_?t=1009&akid=4239%2E5885482%2EdGK1mr ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Americans pay the highest drug prices in the
world, and millions of our neighbors suffer because they are unable to
afford needed medication.

Even though medical debt is our single largest cause of bankruptcy, Big
Pharma maintains the cruel status quo through massive campaign donations
to both parties and an army of lobbyists more than 3x the size of Congress

That’s why Bernie Sanders, in his role of Chairman of the HELP Committee,
is putting his foot down: announcing this week that he won’t vote for any
Health and Human Services Nominee who doesn’t agree to work to lower drug
prices.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/demand_lower_drug_prices_pt_?t=1010&akid=4239%2E5885482%2EdGK1mr ]Big Pharma, Republicans, and corporate Democrats are going to attack
Bernie with everything they have for daring to stand up to the power of
the drug industry. Can we count on you to stand with Bernie to demand
lower drug prices?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/demand_lower_drug_prices_pt_/?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230502_PT_HELP_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_National_HELP&t=1011&akid=4239%2E5885482%2EdGK1mr ]STAND WITH BERNIE

One in four Americans can’t afford the medication prescribed by their
doctors, more than 68,000 die EVERY YEAR unable to afford healthcare, and
half a million go bankrupt from medical debt.

Meanwhile, pharmaceutical companies rake record profits by exploiting a
patient base with no choice but to consume their drugs. America must be
better, and Bernie is leading the way.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/demand_lower_drug_prices_pt_/?t=1012&akid=4239%2E5885482%2EdGK1mr ]Sign here to stand with Bernie Sanders in his fight for lower drug
prices and save lives!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List
subject: Everything you need to know about Nevada and Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | One thing we know for sure: these races WILL be close. → [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62705441/404267852/66865039?sourceid=1050003&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmFiZmU5My0zOWU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0_gJ3a2ROenEtAN5LLYcu6aTBee6hkxuRct_zbvkD3c=&emci=feabfe93-39e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ffabfe93-39e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Sens. **Jacky Rosen (NV)** and **Tammy Baldwin (WI)** are running for reelection — and their races will be some of the toughest of the 2024 cycle. Why? Because, in our current political landscape, Nevada and Wisconsin are two of the _most quintessential_ swing states in the entire country, and I've got the data to prove it:

Let's start with Nevada, looking at just last year alone. In 2022, EMILYs List-backed Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto won reelection in the Silver State by less than 1%. But a Republican became governor, beating the sitting Democrat by 1.4%. Clearly, the 2024 Senate race is anyone's game. **[That's why early investment in our candidates is so crucial. Please donate today to help Democratic pro-choice women WIN in 2024.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62705448/404267859/66865039?sourceid=1050003&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmFiZmU5My0zOWU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0_gJ3a2ROenEtAN5LLYcu6aTBee6hkxuRct_zbvkD3c=&emci=feabfe93-39e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ffabfe93-39e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**

Now buckle up for some recent political history in Wisconsin, because it's a doozy:

In 2020, President Biden won the Badger State by just 0.7%. Two years later, in 2022, Republican Sen. Ron Johnson won reelection by 1%. Also in 2022, Wisconsinites reelected the state's Democratic governor — but Republicans grew their majorities in both chambers of the state legislature. And then, just last month, pro-choice Judge Janet Protasiewicz won her statewide race for the swing seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court in a landslide. States don't get any swingier than Wisconsin!

We can't yet know the outcome of the 2024 Senate races in Nevada and Wisconsin — but we do know that, whichever way they go, they'll be close. And our candidates will need the support of this community to come out on top. ****Donate now to help elect and reelect women like Jacky Rosen and Tammy Baldwin in some of the toughest Senate races of 2024:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-Women-This-May](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62705449/404267860/66865039?sourceid=1050003&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmFiZmU5My0zOWU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0_gJ3a2ROenEtAN5LLYcu6aTBee6hkxuRct_zbvkD3c=&emci=feabfe93-39e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ffabfe93-39e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you,

Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers)
Senior Vice President, Campaigns, EMILYs List

clean_body: | | | One thing we know for sure: these races WILL be close. → Peter, Sens. Jacky Rosen (NV) and Tammy Baldwin (WI) are running for reelection — and their races will be some of the toughest of the 2024 cycle. Why? Because, in our current political landscape, Nevada and Wisconsin are two of the most quintessential swing states in the entire country, and I've got the data to prove it: Let's start with Nevada, looking at just last year alone. In 2022, EMILYs List-backed Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto won reelection in the Silver State by less than 1%. But a Republican became governor, beating the sitting Democrat by 1.4%. Clearly, the 2024 Senate race is anyone's game. Now buckle up for some recent political history in Wisconsin, because it's a doozy: In 2020, President Biden won the Badger State by just 0.7%. Two years later, in 2022, Republican Sen. Ron Johnson won reelection by 1%. Also in 2022, Wisconsinites reelected the state's Democratic governor — but Republicans grew their majorities in both chambers of the state legislature. And then, just last month, pro-choice Judge Janet Protasiewicz won her statewide race for the swing seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court in a landslide. States don't get any swingier than Wisconsin! We can't yet know the outcome of the 2024 Senate races in Nevada and Wisconsin — but we do know that, whichever way they go, they'll be close. And our candidates will need the support of this community to come out on top. **Donate now to help elect and reelect women like Jacky Rosen and Tammy Baldwin in some of the toughest Senate races of 2024: Thank you, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) Senior Vice President, Campaigns, EMILYs List ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
I hope you read this...

| | Peter, May is Asian Americans and Pacific Islanders Month. [**Below, Rep. Mark Takano has an important and very personal message for you – but first, would you consider chipping in $7 to support a fearless Asian American leader fighting for progressive values in Congress? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62705653/404268897/322263095?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230502_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDljZGQ4OC0zY2U5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U1Qk0Bf1Xi-CmHaichvM_9y-NbS5K-KTxvxzx-9JPSU=) | [CHIP IN $7 TO SUPPORT MARK TAKANO NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62705654/404268898/322263095?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230502_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDljZGQ4OC0zY2U5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U1Qk0Bf1Xi-CmHaichvM_9y-NbS5K-KTxvxzx-9JPSU=)
---
**_As a proud Japanese American, would you allow me to take this time to tell you a little bit about my very personal family story?_ I know most people don’t read long emails like this, but it would mean a lot to me if you read the whole thing. **

Peter, I’ve been reflecting on the respective stories and experiences of my maternal and paternal grandparents, pictured below.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62705655/404268899/322263095?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230502_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDljZGQ4OC0zY2U5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U1Qk0Bf1Xi-CmHaichvM_9y-NbS5K-KTxvxzx-9JPSU=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62705656/404268900/322263095?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230502_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDljZGQ4OC0zY2U5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U1Qk0Bf1Xi-CmHaichvM_9y-NbS5K-KTxvxzx-9JPSU=)
---|---
Painfully, along with my parents,**they were all sent to Japanese American internment camps** during World War II because of racist, fear-mongering policies. They lost everything. These policies were a continuation of _a long history of Asian exclusion and discrimination in US history._

Nonetheless, we’ve persevered. My family started over and rebuilt their entire lives after the internment camps. **Asian American communities have traveled across continents** to pursue the American Dream and build a new, better life for their children.

Today, I’m feeling especially thankful for my parents, Nancy – who I miss everyday – and Willie, for everything they sacrificed for me and my brothers.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62705657/404268901/322263095?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230502_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDljZGQ4OC0zY2U5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U1Qk0Bf1Xi-CmHaichvM_9y-NbS5K-KTxvxzx-9JPSU=)
Peter, I’m proud to be Asian American. The AAPI community has persevered and thrived in the United States. And it means so much to me that our nation is collectively celebrating and acknowledging AAPI history, contributions, and culture.

**After all, Asian American history _is_ American history. **

[**Peter, as one of a small handful of Asian Americans serving in Congress, I’m proud to be a voice for Asian American communities and other underrepresented groups. If you’re with me, would you chip in $7 or any amount to help me keep up my work for the AAPI community? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62705658/404268902/322263095?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230502_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDljZGQ4OC0zY2U5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U1Qk0Bf1Xi-CmHaichvM_9y-NbS5K-KTxvxzx-9JPSU=)

clean_body: Your support means the world | Friends, I promise to make this email short and sweet, but I’m popping into your inbox today to publicly thank every person who has endorsed and supported me for Indiana’s open U.S. Senate seat. It is a great joy to know that I am not on this journey alone and that people believe in me and know that I can make a difference in the Senate. Here are a couple of folks that have already joined Team Banks : President Trump, Senator Cotton, Senator Rubio, Senator Wicker, Senator Barrasso, and so many more Hoosiers. We still have a WAYS to go to REBUILD America, but joining the fight today gets us one step closer to achieving our goals. You have the opportunity RIGHT HERE, RIGHT NOW, to make a difference and support a campaign that will give Conservatives a voice. Once again, thank you to those who have already endorsed and supported my campaign. I hope you will join us, friend. | Sincerely, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

subject: Open for an important message from President Barack Obama:
body:
President Obama is using his voice to echo the importance of state legislatures. | | |
---
| | **President Obama is using his voice to amplify the critical importance of state legislatures:** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrplTq_6v4_7gQisubd1A2bONezHh7ZdLZ59ntUIcn6onRGXpLuQQSi7DKOxoUBFt8RoE-oqoStofegFHRtoZDJSSsooLJziKHcoEqBU17GfNAWOeSupUNHE8hN7vJtqH_Wzg-CY0Gvnp33Kw1hNQhkB4ooOy5VleBLO76a-rVnV2FfL6cd7lt3XmhGp0OUhO6CL3JazSitvsijvZs3nvd3qLqriiQRZaGP84zjgDcHe7Q97K-UgtuG6FNnFLOKX9WnwFzwtacs_wgnojKfspmIb0-1La5cYehfWa7EtmOyHS0DfqbQchXcKBi9ARBuAq7ne0ajzrLJnDwopQDTBOzoVrpYTqCtCLSd2aeluCkzH9ERR9EcQVM5LTi2_P0ewaFda6NclDtz46MjqtCcqATaA/3vu/nZ07x2-nRXmyeMTat_SbOQ/h0/Rv8mq0aEMYkDZfyv_Nkubh5AUwhE22ARvmdcLoHvEZE) And no one would be better than President Obama – he served THREE terms in the Illinois State Senate! Here’s exactly why he’s so right: **While legislation stalls on the federal level, state legislators are making key decisions about access to abortion, public education, health care services, and even decisions about the roads you drive on.** Where Republicans have stripped their constituents of these rights, state Democrats have protected the right to choose, expanded early and absentee voting, and much, much more. **Simply put, state Democrats are the last line of defense against GOP extremism.** But with nine must-win special elections quickly approaching, we need every Democrat reading this to listen to President Obama and step up. [Will you listen to President Obama and chip in $7 right now to help secure victories for Democrats across the country?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrplTq_6v4_7gQisubd1A2bONezHh7ZdLZ59ntUIcn6onRGXpLuQQSi7DKOxoUBFt8RoE-oqoStofegFHRtoZDJSSsooLJziKHcoEqBU17GfNAWOeSupUNHE8hN7vJtqH_d9VSKiCK6n1avvaBLHpFJAsDatCCP-vWKUyGAt9cpLYszyW4wECS_oer4XIvy_hUa3vct7HwnivwrDcgp05WuaFTtzuTRFGRJshsBBQKoNnpGmomZcN30FE5qcknReFje9x9q_YPuhe3j9n0Zg3QMPqJiNmsbzzqE4mtdkfA8XMX1aunIKER3RMRNhuKkZhQc94dx9oaaAORf1anoGx2D3zNhFKeo4mTH_rmNO38H2Acf29gy1DbMmOcvC27-xEFzvhS745xMeakqQaQxfQZ8Q/3vu/nZ07x2-nRXmyeMTat_SbOQ/h1/l5kzYa2-l1YPxzAcDQlGdhMoojYvJ9WIth7mndKlg3M) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: President Obama is using his voice to echo the importance of state legislatures. | | | | | President Obama is using his voice to amplify the critical importance of state legislatures: And no one would be better than President Obama – he served THREE terms in the Illinois State Senate! Here’s exactly why he’s so right: While legislation stalls on the federal level, state legislators are making key decisions about access to abortion, public education, health care services, and even decisions about the roads you drive on. Where Republicans have stripped their constituents of these rights, state Democrats have protected the right to choose, expanded early and absentee voting, and much, much more. Simply put, state Democrats are the last line of defense against GOP extremism. But with nine must-win special elections quickly approaching, we need every Democrat reading this to listen to President Obama and step up. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | You have the power to help us on our path to holding, expanding, and building Democratic majorities across the country. subject: The most personal email I’ll ever send you
body:
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxckT2PnDAQhn-N6UB4BjBbUNyFkCpSUtwqVyEvHsBafyBjsiG_PgLdpdj28eh9Xs9Iuxg97g0Trwxg1mplAAxfGMAW8Srf3r6HPX2x7-m38grT8QhfGEDcF_o_-RGSkZXaHFS0iWoKkHwcEmp4VWNe1VWdJ3MDchQ1ciEuapSXgcq6vCHSABWOJCUmuoEcMC9zAMyR84yXyC81IhdcKFEUrMhPUTYGojhrd6egpDZ7NnibmGaOcVnPYh2DbqVhC5Q9tAukjgkGnfJORopeyZ1Bd5frnHrLsNui7Ve_hYEYtmNUDKoDWVJ6swzbj_-dcJB2kXpyDNuzLU9HPc3xoeN8BPanQ3vX-yVqq_9SfyOj6TcdabJ_7t4vFFbvpDkd_S34OwU5Uf-5jE-td5FcZNi6waS3CF9__RD4_sqg6p3RimH7BM-bYisKnK8__4gkNGp5aGP0WglW5NO5ysHbfwEAAP__i16ong)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxckT2PnDAQhn-N6UD2GGy2oLiEkCpSUtwqSYO8eABr_YGM2Q359RHoLsW1j0fv83pGucWacW-I_EQAZqNXAkD4CwHYEr-q19dvcc9f3K_8a3WF6XiEzwQg7Qv-n3wLKdApYw8q20w3JSg2Dhk2TNScilrUNJsbLur6orTEy63WbFDiRumIUlxKoQZdVZlpgAKnFQXglDNWsIqzS805k0xqWZakpKeoGCNimo2_Y9TK2L0YgstsM6e0rGexjkC34rBFLJ7GR9THBIFOB68SpqDVTqC7q3XOgyO825Lr17DFAQlvx6QJiAM51GZzhLdv_zvhoNyizOQJb8-2LB_NNKenSfMR2J8OE3wflmSc-Yv9Da3BBx5pqv_YvV8wrsErezr6Wwx3jGrC_n0Z79rgE_pEeOsHm9evX8bH4_tP_puA6L01mvD2AzxvyltZ8vn644_MYqOXp7HWrEKSkk7nKofg_gUAAP__e4SpNA)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxckU2PmzAQhn_NcEtkj4lhDxy2RemplVZqIvWEjD2AFX8gY5rSX1-BdnvY6-PR-7yeUX52dtgaqL4A4mTNAoggXgFxzeKubrfvaTu9-l-nb5c7jvsjfgXEvM30f_I95ExeWbfTqi1MU6Ligy6o4bIWTNayZsXUGM01k1i-aEmslxfqh16WmnrBdV2XfWEbZCjYhSEKJjg_84vgL7UQvOKVqcoSSnaIzkMiypMND0pGWbeddfSFa6ac5-UodgW8LqTXROenDYnMPgF4NTGoTDkatQFeH2qZTtGDuK7Zd0tckyYQ7ZANoNyRJ2NXD6J9_98BtfKzsmMA0R5t-Wmw45SfNk97YHc4bAxdnLP19i91PTlLv2lPU93n7t1MaYlBucPR9Sk-KKmRuo9lfGhjyBQyiDZod7r3-vbzpvHHG6DsgrMGRPsJHjcVbVWK6f72pypSY-andc4usoKSjccqdfT_AgAA___loalj)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing.

clean_body: Hello Friend, I never thought that my own government would spy on me. I have always loved my country. That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, good or bad , it had to be published. When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. But this investigation changed my life forever ... Trump did NOT collude with Russia. My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionall y to get rid of President Trump. It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news. Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began... Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees. As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters. I set a goal to raise $45,000 by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal. Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are innocent until proven guilty must join together in this fight. Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system. This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution. Due process has been destroyed. We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots. Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing. Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below. Thank you, Kash Patel P.S. The radical left cannot destroy our reputations with the media like they used to. Now, they are assisted by the two-tier justice system. A legal foundation is needed to help America-first patriots with these struggles. I refuse to watch this sham of justice, but I need your help defending whistleblowers and America-first patriots. The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible.
