clean_body: | | | | \-- - - - | Peter, We are excited to announce that starting today and continuing every week, we will be providing you with a comprehensive summary of the top news hits for Congressman Mike Lawler. Additionally, we will be showcasing his most popular social media posts, giving you a well-rounded look at the Congressman's activities, accomplishments, and interactions. Stay informed and engaged as we bring you the highlights of his work, both on Capitol Hill and within the community, right to your inbox. Don't miss out on the latest updates from one of the most influential voices in our political landscape! | Mike in the News "Members of the House Problem Solvers Caucus on the plan for raising the debt ceiling : NPR") "Brutal Dem primary could pit ex-lawmaker against gov’s sister - POLITICO") "Control of the House goes through the Empire State - POLITICO") "Swing-state Democrats fall behind GOP in fundraising as 'enthusiasm gap' drags on party | Washington Examiner") | TOP SOCIAL MEDIA POSTS | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York! Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | \- =

subject: CNN: SCOTUS “may completely hollow out the Voting Rights Act by 2024”

Unfortunately, team, it’s not an exaggeration.
**FIRST:**
The Supreme Court’s disastrous 2013 decision in _Shelby County_ gutted Section 5 of the Voting Rights Act by eliminating the formula for the preclearance requirements for new election laws in states with histories of racial discrimination.

**THEN:**
Earlier this year, Republicans urged the Court to dismantle Section 2 of the VRA, which protects communities of color against racially gerrymandered maps that dilute their voting power.

**NOW:
The future of voting rights – and the legacy of the Civil Rights Movement hinges on the Supreme Court’s upcoming ruling in _Allen v. Milligan_.**

[**_Help defend voting rights: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62706256/404271230/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230502_FR_5A_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyYzg2MDJlLTNmZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=girW5vBB4pGcyz8cNJEnUa1QN1s1Hsm2M7WgeSdEN2Q=)

And that’s not all. We’re also awaiting a decision in _Moore v. Harper_ , where Republican lawmakers have asked the Court to consider a fringe, right-wing legal theory that could pave the way for:
❌ **Purges of voters** from voting rolls
❌ Cuts to **early voting & vote-by-mail** options
❌ **Discriminatory barriers** to voting access
❌ Fewer protections against **voter intimidation**
❌ **Rigged voting maps** – even if those maps violate a state’s constitution
❌ GOP legislatures **undermining legitimate election results**
[**_Team, we don’t know how the Court will rule in _Milligan or Moore_ – but we do know that no matter what happens, we must be prepared to continue fighting for voting rights, fair maps, and a strong democracy state-by-state across the country. Will you pitch in today to help make sure the NDRC is ready for whatever comes our way?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62706263/404271237/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230502_FR_5A_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyYzg2MDJlLTNmZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=girW5vBB4pGcyz8cNJEnUa1QN1s1Hsm2M7WgeSdEN2Q=)

clean_body: | | = Unfortunately, team, it’s not an exaggeration. FIRST: The Supreme Court’s disastrous 2013 decision in Shelby County gutted Section 5 of the Voting Rights Act by eliminating the formula for the preclearance requirements for new election laws in states with histories of racial discrimination. THEN: Earlier this year, Republicans urged the Court to dismantle Section 2 of the VRA, which protects communities of color against racially gerrymandered maps that dilute their voting power. NOW: The future of voting rights – and the legacy of the Civil Rights Movement hinges on the Supreme Court’s upcoming ruling in Allen v. Milligan. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = And that’s not all. We’re also awaiting a decision in Moore v. name: Katie Porter
subject: A problem on both sides of the aisle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=22213%2E3422442%2EcqBy0x)
Members of Congress shouldn’t be allowed to trade stocks.
It shouldn’t be controversial to stop corruption, but even when Democrats controlled the House, Senate, and White House—we didn’t get this done. I pushed my colleagues to take action here but the truth is, this is a problem on both sides of the aisle.
[**Can you sign our petition to show your support for a ban on congressional stock trading?**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em20230502_congress_ban_stocks/?source=EMAH02_1_STO_20230502_V1_F&t=2&akid=22213%2E3422442%2EcqBy0x)
**[Sign the petition ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em20230502_congress_ban_stocks/?source=EMAH02_1_STO_20230502_V1_F&t=3&akid=22213%2E3422442%2EcqBy0x)**
My bill, the STOCK ACT 2.0, would effectively ban stock trading by ensuring “blind trusts” are truly blind. It would extend to Members’ spouses and children, and include real and serious consequences for breaking the law.
Americans have low trust in our government, and they’re right to be concerned. We as Members of Congress need to earn our constituents' trust and help restore faith in our democracy.
**I’m running for the U.S. Senate because we need leaders at the highest levels who are willing to stand up to the status quo and demand change.** But I can’t get there alone. Consider supporting our campaign by signing on or making a donation today. ⬇️
**[Sign the petition ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em20230502_congress_ban_stocks/?source=EMAH02_1_STO_20230502_V1_F&t=4&akid=22213%2E3422442%2EcqBy0x)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230502-1?refcode=EMAH02_1_STO_20230502_V1_F&refcode2=22213_3422442_cqBy0x&akid=22213%2E3422442%2EcqBy0x)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH02_1_STO_20230502_V1_F&t=5&refcode2=22213_3422442_cqBy0x&akid=22213%2E3422442%2EcqBy0x)**

name: Callie Barr
subject: Making grandma and her chainsaw proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress
body:
We are the grandmas with chainsaws now. | Hey Peter, Less than one month ago, I announced that I’m running to represent Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula in Congress. As you might expect, it felt like so much time and none at all. We launched this campaign and began to tour the district, speaking with voters all over Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula – and raising the money we need to defeat Snowbird Bergman. **Sunday was our first end-of-month fundraising deadline, and my jaw hit the floor when I checked the numbers yesterday. We didn’t just hit our goal of 400 Grassroots Founding Donors, we blew it _out of the water._** **572 people have joined our campaign, exceeding our donor AND our total fundraising goals!** Like my grandma with her chainsaw (which if you haven’t heard the story, scroll to the bottom of this email!), this community rolled up its sleeves and got its hands dirty. **Truly, I can’t say “thank you” enough to every person who has invested in our campaign.** Whether you donated $5 or $500 or simply told your friends about me – every little bit means the world. I appreciate you! Callie Barr [P.S. If you haven’t had a chance already, you can still become a Founding Donor by chipping in any amount today! →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62706586/404272221/-621152178?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230502eomty_cb_actives_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDUxMDFjZTgtNDFlOS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CS9aJu2sE9FtCGaCU2L-oj2cDZtfYa1iueYXh983Zh4=)

\-----------Forwarded Message------------
From: Callie Barr
Subject: Grandma with a chainsaw
Sent: April 22, 2023 **When a tree fell in my 86-year old grandma’s driveway, she didn’t complain — she got out her chainsaw.** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62706587/404272222/-621152178?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230502eomty_cb_actives_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDUxMDFjZTgtNDFlOS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CS9aJu2sE9FtCGaCU2L-oj2cDZtfYa1iueYXh983Zh4=)
---
She knew it would take days to get a crew out there to clear the driveway, and she had places to be! Grandma took the tree apart herself because folks around here have _grit_.
In Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula we work hard, we aren’t afraid to get our hands dirty, and we know how to take care of ourselves and each other. **Unfortunately, we’re represented by a congressman who doesn’t share our grit.**
While Congressman Jack Bergman is bopping between D.C. and his real home in Louisiana, us here in rural Michigan are being left out to dry.
We deserve to be represented by a _real_ Michigander in Congress — someone who will bring the same grit to the fight to lower health care costs down as we do to plowing our streets.
**I’m Callie Barr. I’m a 5th-generation Northern Michigander raised in Traverse City and Cheboygan.** I’m a military spouse, attorney, and veteran’s advocate. And my grandma with a chainsaw made sure to pass down her grit to me.
**[I’m challenging Republican Rep. Jack Bergman for OUR seat in Congress. If you’re with me, will you chip in $5 or more today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62706588/404272223/-621152178?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230502eomty_cb_actives_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDUxMDFjZTgtNDFlOS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CS9aJu2sE9FtCGaCU2L-oj2cDZtfYa1iueYXh983Zh4=)**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: We are the grandmas with chainsaws now. | Hey Peter, Less than one month ago, I announced that I’m running to represent Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula in Congress. As you might expect, it felt like so much time and none at all. We launched this campaign and began to tour the district, speaking with voters all over Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula – and raising the money we need to defeat Snowbird Bergman. Sunday was our first end-of-month fundraising deadline, and my jaw hit the floor when I checked the numbers yesterday. We didn’t just hit our goal of 400 Grassroots Founding Donors, we blew it out of the water. 572 people have joined our campaign, exceeding our donor AND our total fundraising goals! Like my grandma with her chainsaw (which if you haven’t heard the story, scroll to the bottom of this email!), this community rolled up its sleeves and got its hands dirty. Truly, I can’t say “thank you” enough to every person who has invested in our campaign. Whether you donated $5 or $500 or simply told your friends about me – every little bit means the world. I appreciate you! Callie Barr = \-----------Forwarded Message------------ From: Callie Barr Subject: Grandma with a chainsaw Sent: April 22, 2023 When a tree fell in my 86-year old grandma’s driveway, she didn’t complain — she got out her chainsaw. | = She knew it would take days to get a crew out there to clear the driveway, and she had places to be! Grandma took the tree apart herself because folks around here have grit. In Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula we work hard, we aren’t afraid to get our hands dirty, and we know how to take care of ourselves and each other. Unfortunately, we’re represented by a congressman who doesn’t share our grit. While Congressman Jack Bergman is bopping between D.C. and his real home in Louisiana, us here in rural Michigan are being left out to dry. We deserve to be represented by a real Michigander in Congress — someone who will bring the same grit to the fight to lower health care costs down as we do to plowing our streets. I’m Callie Barr. I’m a 5th-generation Northern Michigander raised in Traverse City and Cheboygan. I’m a military spouse, attorney, and veteran’s advocate. And my grandma with a chainsaw made sure to pass down her grit to me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Talk soon, Callie Barr Candidate for Congress in MI-01 | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. name: Sharice Davids
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I am writing first and foremost to say thank you.

You and I both know that your contributions matter a lot to our campaign. Every decision we make on the road to 2024 depends on how many donations we have in the door.

Our war chest needs to be full in order to fight back against the onslaught of dark money attack ads we expect in this race, so your contribution makes a huge difference.

Making sure we take back the House and expand our majority in the Senate is a critical mission. Just last month, the Senate GOP struck down the latest attempt to pass the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) into law.

Enshrining the ERA into law has never been more essential. After the overturning of Roe v. Wade, women in America have fewer rights today than we had just one year ago.

It’s been 100 years since the ERA was first introduced. The time to protect women’s rights is now. **[Are you with me? Click here to sign my petition by our Friday deadline. I need 1,000 signatures to help me prove my base is behind me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62706618/404272475/1557289134?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230502_PT_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_ERA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGYzYTM0My00MmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=puUP6mAuraYbFsT3bTwSXkMPRtVeeUrZTb4469juzUo=&emci=dd18ddf8-41e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d4f3a343-42e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)** | | [Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62706619/404272476/1557289134?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230502_PT_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_ERA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGYzYTM0My00MmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=puUP6mAuraYbFsT3bTwSXkMPRtVeeUrZTb4469juzUo=&emci=dd18ddf8-41e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d4f3a343-42e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)
---
With attacks against the right to choose mounting, women on average getting paid 82% of what a man does, and discrimination present in courtrooms, workplaces, and even doctor’s offices, we need to affirm our dedication to equal rights for all Americans regardless of gender, sexual orientation, or race.

I’m proud to have voted to pass the Equality Act in the House, along with the Women’s Health Protection Act, and to have led the charge on the Respect for Marriage Act becoming law. All these measures share the aim of making America more equal for everyone.

Now, we need to keep going in our fight for equality. **[Sign your name to support the ERA today→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62706620/404272477/1557289134?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230502_PT_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_ERA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGYzYTM0My00MmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=puUP6mAuraYbFsT3bTwSXkMPRtVeeUrZTb4469juzUo=&emci=dd18ddf8-41e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d4f3a343-42e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)**

Thank you,
Sharice

Just last month, the Senate GOP struck down the latest attempt to pass the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) into law. Enshrining the ERA into law has never been more essential. After the overturning of Roe v. Wade, women in America have fewer rights today than we had just one year ago. It’s been 100 years since the ERA was first introduced. The time to protect women’s rights is now. | | With attacks against the right to choose mounting, women on average getting paid 82% of what a man does, and discrimination present in courtrooms, workplaces, and even doctor’s offices, we need to affirm our dedication to equal rights for all Americans regardless of gender, sexual orientation, or race. I’m proud to have voted to pass the Equality Act in the House, along with the Women’s Health Protection Act, and to have led the charge on the Respect for Marriage Act becoming law. All these measures share the aim of making America more equal for everyone. Now, we need to keep going in our fight for equality. Thank you, Sharice * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS Sharice for Congress 13851 W. 63rd St. #303 Shawnee, KS 66216 United States

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: A minute to say thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Friend,
I wanted to quickly say thank you.
We launched our campaign last month, and thanks to folks like you, we're going into May with incredible momentum. From your generous donations and support on social media, to just reading this email, every bit makes a difference.
We lost last year by a tiny margin — one of the closest in the whole country.
I know that next year will be different. We already have amazing grassroots support showing up for us in this race.
Together, we'll win in November, flip this seat blue, take back control of the House, and start making a real difference for people in Southern Arizona.
Thank you so much!
- Kirsten

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Republicans just announced a ban on abortion care in North Carolina.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
This is a devastating blow to our most fundamental rights.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62706940/404273234/823540626?refcode=ea.266c6cdf-42e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.266c6cdf-42e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjZjNmNkZi00MmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qy4N8wNdJxTYRnApnSffcZEPAHbSsjJBEQOpx2t-bEE=&emci=35708dc9-3be9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=266c6cdf-42e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter, **Moments ago, Republican legislative leaders announced that they intend to pass a ban on abortion care after 12 weeks.** This is an egregious, unacceptable attack on the women of our state. As governor, I have done everything possible to protect reproductive health care access, but now Republicans are emboldened by their new supermajorities in the House and Senate. We are going to keep fighting tooth and nail to keep this bill from passing, and we will work to press Republicans in swing districts who promised they would not pass extreme abortion bans. But we know this shows us that the next elections are more important than ever. We have to break the supermajorities, take back the legislature, and secure Democratic victories at the statewide level. I’ll spend the next year and a half working to do just that — but I need your help. **[This is the moment we must act. Donate immediately to power my efforts for North Carolina Democrats>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62706941/404273235/435245919?refcode=ea.266c6cdf-42e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.266c6cdf-42e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjZjNmNkZi00MmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qy4N8wNdJxTYRnApnSffcZEPAHbSsjJBEQOpx2t-bEE=)** Republicans have gerrymandered our state to ensure that they will hold onto power no matter the will of the people — then, they can avoid any kind of accountability for their attacks on our freedom. They don’t care that the majority of voters here in NC and across the country support reproductive rights. They don’t care that this legislation will cause untold harm to patients who rely on care in North Carolina. **The far-right GOP has made it clear: They do not care about us. They care only about enacting the most radical elements of their agenda that they can get away with.** _And this is just the start._ We know that there are extremist Republicans here in NC who support total abortion bans. We know that our best way to stop them will come at the ballot box next year. **[Help me fight back against the extreme, anti-abortion GOP with an immediate donation of any size>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62706942/404273236/435245919?refcode=ea.266c6cdf-42e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.266c6cdf-42e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjZjNmNkZi00MmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qy4N8wNdJxTYRnApnSffcZEPAHbSsjJBEQOpx2t-bEE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62706943/404273237/435245919?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.266c6cdf-42e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.266c6cdf-42e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjZjNmNkZi00MmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qy4N8wNdJxTYRnApnSffcZEPAHbSsjJBEQOpx2t-bEE=)

subject: He pledged to VETO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
It’s Rick Scott and I had to share this news.

The GOP-held House passed a bill to _**PROTECT**_ women’s sports!

This bill is now headed to the Senate, and I will work endlessly to get this passed. But Joe Biden has pledged to veto it...

I need your support! Help protect women's sports: **[DONATE NOW](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=05c44d5da6ac48149c9c24a70e27af69&_e=uhtWGMlLrN26c7Fz317nl8tYSz2e0YHbiYUDVimO2yeG1TVL5wO3nw2gn0ytfljxkREwdBq_F8aCACsWlBc72cj2r1-D62hiWkQ3XPeUZGFThRpkKWxHylAj30XbW3RVmMIg4Vsq7zImECgaHIdaDq1biRB-QG9edbvi6i8FzMbEruACq29dE3z9aJiwlIoFLMj1nExTbbCrqHhXNYbkvH83n0HxjaTeOw4lflkjJL2oQyQ-KN45DXEwj7Kt_4OveY8oU7SysnMhi13scNWeS4h8oIFYgKtIeyxseyZg_43kFTznJszXkfVIPlxS2ZN-gyqPY6eTCROUo3a_HOz9VCXvh_7bXu4yOUsAxBg8XkzvxRMvudCK0nEn81q7p4P0)**
